faqs.question: How to apply for Newton School of Technology admissions?
faqs.answer:
Candidates can apply by visiting the official website. Then candidates need to sign in. After signing up candidates can fill the application form and download the brochure. Further, candidates need to apply for the Newton Scholastic Aptitude Test (NSAT) by paying the exam fee. To get admission at Newton School of Technology, candidates need to apply for it. Find below the application steps: 
Step 1: Fill out the application form - Fill out the application by including your personal, academic and extracurricular information as per requirements.
Step 2: Take the NSAT Entrance test - Complete the 120-minute assessment which includes English, Mathematics and Logical questions.
Step 3: 1:1 interview - A 1:1 interview with our experienced experts to know you better and to understand your motivation for joining this program.
Step 4: Admission - On clearing the rounds, receive an admission letter from Newton School of Technology.
Step 5: Enrollment - To enrol, Simply follow the instructions provided in the letter and submit the required documents and fees

college_info.intro:
B.Tech in Computer Science and Artificial Intelligence at Newton is a 4 years, fully residential programme. Programme specializes in Computer Science & Artificial Intelligence. Students at Newton get exclusive knowledge other than the theoretical part. Students get to have hands-on experience through a mandated six-month internship which promotes entrepreneurial skills among them. During the course duration students also get the opportunity to interact with industry leaders from top tech companies.
Eligibility criteria for the students: Candidates who have passed class 12 during 2021, 2022, or 2023 with a minimum of 50% marks from a recognised board are eligible to apply for the course.
Eligible students must appear for the NSAT, entrance test of the school.

placements.overview:
The placement cell of Newton School of Technology is dedicated to providing learning such as mentorship sessions, aptitude classes, etc., and assistance such as resume building, mock interviews, etc.

Newton School has a good placement record. The school has 1500+ hiring partners. The placement rate at the school is 98%. The average salary offered is INR 12 LPA. Some of the major recruiters at the school are:

faqs.answer: A:    There are no exit options available. You will only get a valid degree only when you complete the 4 year programme with asatisfying result on all the degree requirements.
faqs.question: Can I have exit options during the course at Newton School?

faqs.answer: A:    Eligible candidates must appear for the NSAT entrance test after meeting all the eligibility requirements of the school. The test is a 2 hours test and consists of 45 questions. Subjects covered in the exam are:1) English2) Mathematics3) Logical reasoning
faqs.question: What is the pattern of the NSAT exam and which subjects do I need to prepare?

faqs.answer: A:    After completing the 4-year program, you will get a valid UGC and AICTE recognised B.Tech. degree in Computer Science &AI. This degree also enables you to apply for government jobs or Indian and overseas higher studies, if you wish to pursuethem. Along with Newton School of Technology and Rishihood University certificate, you will be recognised by over 1500+tech companies globally.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and AI - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with college. The fact is if you enjoy working hard come here.

review_content.Placements: Newton School of Technology is new. The first batch has not passed out yet. The first batch will pass out in 2027 but if their internship record is seen approximately 93 percent of the students have got it. The second batch the placement records have not come yet but it is compulsory during their internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are 3 hostels till now 1 for girls and two for boys. Two rooms are shared by 4 students on each floor. There is a fridge water cooler balcony oven. Mess food is good and healthy and it is purely vegetarian. Classroom capacity is 120 students and 60 students for sports. Indoor sports there is a learners arena in which badminton squash swimming pool gym table tennis and pool are available. Outdoors there is basketball football, and ground volleyball. You can also play cricket but for this there is no dedicated ground.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and AI - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Newton School of Technology.

review_content.Placements: Internship culture is very good. 3 students also cracked GSOC in their first year of college. Some students qualified for ICPC (International Collegiate Programming Contests). 98%of the first-year students got internships in great companies and startups. Some students have their own startup, which is funded by the college. College also brings many CEOs and ex-CEOs for students to gain experience from them.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities are provided, like a swimming pool, cricket field, football field, tennis court, basketball court, etc. There are coaches for all sports. Hostels are also good, and students get two-sharing rooms. Both of them have their own almirah and study table.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and AI - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: CSE from the Newton School of Technology.

review_content.Placements: In CSE, there are numerous opportunities available for students. On average, 40–50% of students get successfully placed in our course. Students get placements in companies such as Genpact, HCL, TCS, Infosys, Operifsoft, etc. Most students get placed in software developer and web developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Newton School of Technology has a good infrastructure. College management has provided all the necessary facilities to the students. Computer labs and classrooms have facilities such as Wi-Fi, air-conditioned, comfortable seats, etc. Other facilities such as sports ground, parking, library, canteen, etc., are also available for the students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and AI - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Infrastructure and facilities are excellent.

review_content.Placements: The highest package is 43 LPA. The average is around 12 to 18 LPA. In our college, many companies are visiting. The first-year students got internships more than 80% because of the good curriculum and practice.
review_content.Infrastructure: Faculty members and the infrastructure are excellent. Our campus is fully Wi-Fi 24/7. There is no issue with Wi-Fi. It spreads all over the campus. The hostel is cleaned daily. Housekeeping services are available. The mess is very good.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members are very helpful and supportive. They are excellent in their fields. They have industry experts and much more experience so that we can learn and revise on a daily basis. We can't face any difficulties during exams and tests because faculty members teach from the base.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and AI - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Newton School of Technology Review

review_content.Placements: As our college is new, started in 2023, our senior had internships in their 4th semester which was running for them. The average internship stipend is 33,000, and many seniors were also selected in GSoC, ICPS, and many hackathons where they had also earned decently.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our hotels are new, and for upcoming students, new hostels are building. Mess food is awesome and very tasty. Our course is also designed well; we are learning industry things in the first year itself, and we had AC in our rooms, although it was fixed to 26°C, but it's good anyway. A common area on every floor was there, and a fridge, microwave, and water cooler were also on every floor.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and AI - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: A decent college for Computer Science Engineering.

review_content.Placements: In the CSE, there were a number of opportunities available for students. On average, 40–60% of students got successfully placed in our course. Students got placements in companies such as Genpact, HCL, TCS, Infosys, Operifsoft, etc. Most students were placed in the software development field.
review_content.Infrastructure: Newton School of Technology had good infrastructure. The college management provided all the necessary facilities to students. Computer labs and classrooms had facilities such as Wi-Fi, air conditioning, and comfortable seating. Other facilities such as a sports ground, parking, library, and canteen were also available for students.

admission_process.title: Newton School of Technology Admission Process 2024

paragraphs: Newton School of Technology offers a pioneering BTech degree programme specialising in Computer Science & Artificial Intelligence. This institution provides students with a comprehensive education that extends beyond the classroom, hands-on experience through a six-month internship, nurturing entrepreneurial skills, and ensuring the holistic development of its students. Students also have the opportunity to interact with industry leaders, including CXOs from top Tech companies. This unique blend of academic excellence and industry-relevant curriculum makes Newton School of Technology a standout choice for those seeking to learn cutting-edge technology education in India.
Newton School of Technology Eligibility Criteria:
lists: Applicants must have completed their XII (PCM) from a recognised board in 2022, 2023 or 2024 and secured more than 50%.
Applicants must have secured a minimum score in each section of the NSAT.
Applicants must clear the online interview. Our experienced faculty and admission committee assess your skills, knowledge, and passion for the tech industry

placement_data.title: Newton School of Technology Placement Overview 2026
paragraphs: Newton School of Technology has released its internship details for 2026. A total of 93% students secured internships at Newton School of Technology by their 2nd year. Over 3,500 students have secured internships during the recent placement season. The highest stipend given stood at INR 2.50 lakhs . While the average stipend recorded during Newton School of Technology placements 2026 was INR 23.066 . The average top 10% and average top 25% stood at INR 40,714 and INR 34,222, respectively.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure here is very good. We have AC in all hostel rooms. Our campus is also open 24/7, meaning we can go for walks or do anything anytime on campus. Wi-Fi is also available everywhere. The classrooms are very modern; you will just love them. We have both indoor and open libraries so that we can study in fresh air. The mess food is actually good; the only downside for some is that the food is purely vegetarian every day.

reviews.review_heading: Honest Review of Newton School of Technology by the First Batch.
reviews.review_text: If I talk about the college campus area, it's about 25 acres. As the campus is newly built, the infrastructure is very good, which includes our classrooms, hostels, and all other facilities available on campus. In sports, we have football, table tennis, basketball, volleyball, badminton, and cricket facilities available. The mess food is okay.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the professors and the curriculum.
reviews.review_text: The facilities here are really good. We have good hostel and campus facilities. The quality is very good and here are good sports facilities too. The canteen also has good food, and the mess is far better than most colleges and here we have all kinds of sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The modern infrastructure and curriculum.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is awesome and up-to-date, and the ambiance is beautiful, with a lot of trees and a lower garden. The hostels are very comfortable and clean, with furnished tables and beds, keeping in mind the infirmary or medical needs of the guests.

reviews.review_heading: It has a good learning atmosphere, helpful faculty members, and enjoyable college life.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure with Wi-Fi enabled labs, well-maintained classrooms, and a decent library. Hostel facilities are satisfactory. Hostel rooms are spacious and clean. The food in the mess is average but hygienic. Medical help and sports grounds are available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: I recommend people to join in this college. I am fully satisfied for joining in this university.
reviews.review_text: Coming to infrastructure, hostels are very clean, comfortable, and hygienic, and the college infrastructure and all are awesome. You will have very good infrastructure and greenery on our campus. The campus is open 24/7, so we can study whenever we want.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Newton School of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is very good and attractive. It provides all facilities. Our college has classrooms. The library has all books. It helps us to learn new things. The food served in the canteen is good, tasty, and healthy.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Newton School of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The hostel is well-equipped with students' requirements.

college_info.intro:
Ambalika Institute of Management and Technology courses are widely spread and offer UG, PG, and diploma courses. The institute provides programmes in Engineering, Commerce, Management, and others. Ambalika Institute of Management and Technology's flagship courses are BTech and MBA. It focuses on providing proper education with the best learning and proper guidance to the students.
Ambalika Institute Lucknow offers BTech specialisations in CSE, Mechanical, Civil, Data Science, Civil, and others. The institute offers a four-year full-time programme under the guidance of an expert. Ambalika Institute focuses on empowering students with bright futures and offering courses according to their preferences. faqs.answer: A:    Ambalika Institute of Management and Technology offers M.Tech in Automation and Robotics as well as CAD and CAM. The fee structure at Ambalika Institute of Management and Technology is bifurcated into various components, namely tuition, security deposit, and hostel fee. Certain fee elements are one-time payments to be made at the time of Ambalika Institute of Management and Technology admission, whereas others are recurring as per the norms of the institution fee policy.

admission_overview.title: Ambalika Institute of Management and Technology Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Ambalika Institute of Management and Technology admission 2025 to courses offered at UG, PG and doctorate level. The seats are granted either based on merit in previous qualifying degrees or national-level entrance exams such as CUET, JEE Main, MAT, CAT, etc. Ambalika Institute of Management and Technology follow the admission norms of Dr APJ Abdul Kalam Technical University (AKTU) for admission to BTech and MBA. To be eligible for admission to BTech and MBA candidates are required to follow eligibility and selection criteria set by AKTU. Further, for other courses, the college sets its own eligibility and selection criteria. Read the below article for more about Ambalika Institute of Management and Technology admission, inclusive of course-wise eligibility, selection criteria and admission process:

It provides UG, PG, and diploma courses such as BTech, BBA, MBA, etc. Admission to BTech and MBA is based on Dr APJ Abdul Kalam Technical University admission norms. This includes appearing and applying for one entrance exam, JEE or CUET, followed by counselling for BTech, and appearing in CUET-PG, followed by counselling for an MBA. Further for other courses college offers direct admission. admission_process.title: Ambalika Institute of Management and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Ambalika Institute of Management and Technology course admission 2025 for BBA, BCA and BCom courses is based on CUET entrance exam score, while admission to BTech and MBA courses is done based on scores of various national-level entrance exams. Check below the complete admission process for Ambalika Institute of Management and Technology:
The mode of application is online. Candidates must register online and then fill out the online application form along with uploading the relevant documents and paying the application fee.

Candidates willing to take admission to Ambalika Institute of Management and Technology must fulfil the basic eligibility criteria for the respective courses. For admission to other Management and Engineering courses, it's mandatory to submit the scores of respective entrance exams. Further, for BTech and MBA courses, the shortlisted candidates have to appear for the UPTAC counselling process for the final seat allotment.

Once the selection rounds are done, the shortlisted candidates are called for document verification. Aspirants need to pay aAmbalika Institute of Management and Technology feeto confirm their seat in the college.

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for BTech at Ambalika Institute of Management and Technology?

faqs.question: Are Diploma courses available at Ambalika Institute of Management and Technology?
faqs.answer: Yes, Ambalika Institute of Management and Technology (AIMT) offers UG & PG Diploma courses in the stream of Engineering, Management, Computer Applications, etc. To apply for these courses, candidates must pass Class 10/ 12 as per the minimum eligibility criteria. Further, as per the unofficial sources, admission to Diploma course is done based on JEECUP scores.

faqs.question: Is Ambalika Institute of Management and Technology hard to get?
faqs.answer: Depending on the course and qualifying requirements, admission at Ambalika Institute of Management and Technology in Lucknow can be challenging.B.TechA 10+2 aggregate of 45% and acceptance of tests such as JEE Main, CUET, CBSE 12th, UP 12th, and ISC are prerequisites for B.Tech programs. The 2024 UPTAC cutoff had closing ranks ranging from 32,793 to 1,400,636.MBAA 50% graduation rate is one of the prerequisites for the MBA program.PositionsAccording to some, most companies offer generous packages, and places for above-average students are frequently guaranteed. The most expensive package might reach 21 LPA. Others, however, claim that the college falls short of expectations and is mediocre.

hostel_campus.college_name: Ambalika Institute of Management and Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Separate hostels for girls and boys. Boys hostel can accommodate 300 students and girls hostel can accommodate 100 students. Facilities provided in the hostels include telephone facility, railway concession, banking services, internet and Wi-Fi facility, ambulance and medical facilities and mess.

library.description: The library has subscribed to around 75 national and international journals. The Audio-Video Section is equipped with full course lectures and VCDs of eminent professors from IITs. Also, the library operates on an open access system.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Table Tennis, Billiards, Air Hockey, Volley Ball, Air Foot Ball

library.description: The library has subscribed to around 75 national and international journals. The Audio-Video Section is equipped with full course lectures and VCDs of eminent professors from IITs. Also, the library operates on an open access system.

hostel.description: Separate hostels for girls and boys. Boys hostel can accommodate 300 students and girls hostel can accommodate 100 students. Facilities provided in the hostels include telephone facility, railway concession, banking services, internet and Wi-Fi facility, ambulance and medical facilities and mess.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Table Tennis, Billiards, Air Hockey, Volley Ball, Air Foot Ball

labs.description: Available Facilities: Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Mechanical Lab, Physics Lab, Interactive Mathematics Lab, Biology Science and Biotechnology Lab, Professional Communication Lab

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of infrastructure, facilities, and teachers are very supportive.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by college are excellent. It has bus facility and there will be neat and well-maintained classrooms. There will be many co-curricular activities organized by college like sports, fests, and many other competitions.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college delivers the best possible facilities to students.
reviews.review_text: There are plenty of courses and many more to come very soon like pharmacy. All facilities which they provide for students are much more than any other college. There is a library and labs. There is also a separate place for workshops inside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Every faculty member has good knowledge to explain anything.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are so good and our college infrastructure is excellent. This college is spread over 200 acres. This college has a good natural environment. Hostel is so good. There are many trees at the college. Most of which are mango trees. There is a sports competition every semester.

reviews.review_heading: Best engineering college in Lucknow.
reviews.review_text: Good Wi-Fi, study friendly atmosphere, and every student was free to learn and ask about the things he/she was facing problems with. The canteen food was also good for nutrition. The timings of the mess were really satisfying. The Wi-Fi was also strong and secure.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfaction with this college and better placements.
reviews.review_text: Library, Wi-Fi, labs, and full air-conditioner were available in the college. Mess was available with big area. Hostel condition was very good with good facilities. The food was also very nice. There was a very large playground where students felt very comfortable.

reviews.review_heading: I recommend this college for the mechanical branch.
reviews.review_text: I am a mechanical branch student. In this branch, very good facilities like Wi-Fi, ACs, fans, a good environment, a good library, etc., are provided. The hostel facilities are good because the food quality is super. The food is provided from time to time. The college canteen food quality is good. It provides all medical emergency services and games.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty members and best placements in 2024.
reviews.review_text: The best facilities and infrastructure are offered in this field by Ambalika Institute. All types of facilities are available like Wi-Fi, labs, library, doubt room, and air-conditioned classrooms. This college offers the best mess and hostel at low price. Canteen is also available. Medicine facilities are provided. Sports facilities are available for boys and girls both.

reviews.review_heading: 3 years overview of Ambalika Institute of Management and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in the hostel are not that good. It's okay; it means students can survive. Like I am a day scholar student, but as per my hosteler's friends, the food in the mess is average, and rooms are also average. Yes, but the infrastructure is great. It looks very nice and attractive. I will give 3 out of 5 stars for the hostel but 5 out of 5 stars for infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are so good. Infrastructure is so native. Everywhere is greenery. There are lots of mango trees, which are beneficial for students in mango season. The hostel is divided into 3 categories. First is the dormitory hostel, and you will get bunk beds. Second is standard, separate beds. The third is a new standard. Food is also good. Canteen is available every time.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in Lucknow.
reviews.review_text: In our BBA course, there are many facilities, like computer labs, libraries, and many more. We have fully air-conditioned classrooms and a huge central library with the availability of Wi-Fi and many more facilities that a student wants in their college. Medical facilities and emergency ambulances are present at the college.

reviews.review_heading: Worth the money and satisfactory results
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good, having all the required facilities. Hostel facilities are average; I Often hear my college mates complaining about the mess food. Besides this, the campus and canteen provide good facilities. Labs are quite satisfactory and have a proper net connection.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Ambalika Institute of Management and Technology.
reviews.review_text: It's infrastructure and hostel are very good; there is no doubt in this segment. Also in the college, you will see everywhere greenery, which will help you to stay positive in your mind . The interaction between senior and junior also plays a big role in staying calm.

reviews.review_heading: Ambalika Institute of Management and Technology review.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good, but the food is not that tasty or healthy. Wi-Fi is available in the hostel, but it is too slow. The labs are the worst, as all the computer systems are running on Pentium and Athlone processors and have old code editors like Turbo C++. Most of the computers don't have any code editor or compiler for Java, and most of the systems are detected.

reviews.review_heading: AIMT Lucknow - A good college in Lucknow.
reviews.review_text:
The main building infrastructure is very nice and quite big.
The campus covers an area of over 400 acres. The classrooms are well designed and spacious for projector classes. The staff of this college is very supportive, even if they are not of your department.

reviews.review_heading: My two-year experience at AIMT.
reviews.review_text: Campus infrastructure is good, but the hostel facilities are lacking. The quality of food in the mess is below average, considering the price. There are 5–6 labs in the college, along with 2 canteens. College also has 5–6 grounds, including facilities for basketball, badminton, cricket, football, etc.

data.description: AIMT has state of art infrastructure and a campus that sprawls across 200 acres of area with all the basic amenities. The institute offers well-designed and IT-enabled classrooms with projectors, al;ong with a well-stocked library. The institute also has separate and well-equipped hostels for both male and female students.

faqs.answer: A:    You can get a refund of the fee that you have paid for BTech at IIIT Nagpur. For this you have to submit a request to the college to cancel your admission within 15 days from the start of classes. In this case you will get a refund of 75% of tuition fee when the Admission Cancellation Process gets completed. But if you submit this request after 15 days from the start of classes, then you will not get any refund.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: We are not satisfied with our college.

review_content.Placements: College placements are good. Many companies do not visit. However, better companies visit, with around two to three vacancies for our college students each year. The highest package is around 42 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our infrastructure is very limited. We do not have a badminton court, football field, or cricket ground. There is no sufficient place to play outdoor games, and indoor facilities are also not available. One badminton court is there, but it does not have a mat.
review_content.Faculty: The college faculty comes from higher professional colleges like IIITN, IIT, and NIT. They did their Ph.D. at those professional colleges and have around 3 to 4 years of research experience. They are experienced and friendly with our college students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Good college, peaceful, but in a rural area, which can be a drawback.

review_content.Placements: The placement rate is 80%. The package is from 4-68 LPA. Top recruiters include Nvidia and Mindtickle. Internship data is not updated. But it is 90%. The main roles SDE and similar positions. Overall, placements are decent compare to IIIT Vadodara. It makes solid choice from placement perspective.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus has Wi-Fi, labs, Central AC and latest computers. The infrastructure is decent. The hostel is small. It is bit pricey. But corridors and common areas are cleaned regularly. It makes much better. The infrastructure is best. Even though the campus is not near the main city, but alright. However, mess has only veg food.

review_summary.college_name: IIIT Nagpur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Decent placements, dull college life, and hectic classes.

content.Placements: I would say the placements are average. Mostly, the data shows that 11 LPA is the median. But the official data also shows that a huge number of students were not available for placements. Most of the time, this case is seen in IIITs. But the official told us that the data included only on-campus, and many get off-campus placements too.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite good, as the college is still new and only a decade old. However, there are only two buildings, one for the classes and the other for the office staff. Also, two hostels, one for students and the other for the facilities. But the path that students have to walk from the hostel to classes is too long and tiring. Also, cycles are not there for long-distance travel, which I have seen in VNIT Nagpur.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering (Internet of Things) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My experience at IIT Nagpur.

content.Placements: The placement cell of our college is good, as of now I am in my second year of college. The placement cell is making good efforts to get everyone for the 3rd year internship. The main placement to look out for will be in 2026 as it will be the first time. There will be 600 students for placements.
content.Infrastructure: College is new, so there is only one hostel as of now, accommodating around 800 boys and 150 girls. The remaining boys have to get accommodation outside. Accommodation is on first come first basis. The hostel food is average, there are 4 meals per day and on Sunday something special is served.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: We are not satisfied with our college.

content.Placements: College placements are good. Many companies do not visit. However, better companies visit, with around two to three vacancies for our college students each year. The highest package is around 42 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Our infrastructure is very limited. We do not have a badminton court, football field, or cricket ground. There is no sufficient place to play outdoor games, and indoor facilities are also not available. One badminton court is there, but it does not have a mat.
content.Faculty: The college faculty comes from higher professional colleges like IIITN, IIT, and NIT. They did their Ph.D. at those professional colleges and have around 3 to 4 years of research experience. They are experienced and friendly with our college students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good college, peaceful, but in a rural area, which can be a drawback.

content.Placements: The placement rate is 80%. The package is from 4-68 LPA. Top recruiters include Nvidia and Mindtickle. Internship data is not updated. But it is 90%. The main roles SDE and similar positions. Overall, placements are decent compare to IIIT Vadodara. It makes solid choice from placement perspective.
content.Infrastructure: The campus has Wi-Fi, labs, Central AC and latest computers. The infrastructure is decent. The hostel is small. It is bit pricey. But corridors and common areas are cleaned regularly. It makes much better. The infrastructure is best. Even though the campus is not near the main city, but alright. However, mess has only veg food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Best faculty, but the infrastructure is not good.

content.Placements: According to our system, a CGPA above 7 is considered good for getting a job in our college. Good internships also come based on CGPA. If you have strong coding skills and participate in activities like hackathons. Placements are good.
content.Infrastructure: We do not have very good infrastructure. We do not have sufficient playgrounds to play cricket or other outdoor games like volleyball and football. There is one badminton court, but it is not good. We have only four buildings. The academic building, administrative building, residential building, and hostel building. That’s it.

admission_overview.college_name: IIIT Nagpur Admission 2025: Cutoff, Fees, Eligibility & Application

admission_process.title: IIIT Nagpur Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: IIIT Nagpur admissionis completelyentrance-basedfor both its BTech and PhD programmes. Admission to the flagship BTech course is based on JEE Main scores followed by JoSAA Counselling. For PhD, however, eligible students must have a valid GATE score and must participate in the personal interview.IIIT Nagpuris one of the20IIITs established under the Public Private Partnership (PPP) scheme. The admission and application process of the institute is conducted online. Read on to learn more aboutIIIT Nagpur admission 2025.

IIIT Nagpur admissionis conducted via JEE Main for admission to its flagship BTech course. Additionally, CSAB Special Rounds of counselling are conducted by the Central Seat Allocation Board for seats that remain unfilled in JoSAA. The institute offers its programmes through full-time modes across multiple specialisations. Students can refer to the following table to know the eligibility and selection criteria forIIIT Nagpur courses:
Eligibility Criteria
Selection Criteria
Class 12 or equivalent with a minimum total of 75% from a recognised board
JEE (Main+JoSAA/CSAB Counselling
Master's degree in Engineering/ Technology with Bachelor’s in Engineering/ Technology in ECE/ IT/ CSE
Written Test + Interview/GATE

Indian Institute of Information Technology (IIIT) Nagpur feeis inclusive of various components, such as medical insurance, tuition fees, cautionary deposits, and more. Some of the fee components need to be paid only once at the time of admission, while the remaining components need to be paid semester-wise or yearly. When it comes to affordability, the fee can be quite expensive however, the institute provides scholarships and tuition fee waivers to students. Aspirants can refer to the table below to know about course-wiseIIIT Nagpur feeand average package:
Note: This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
IIIT Nagpur Fee

IIIT Nagpur offers a limited number of seats for its BTech programme. students must participate in the JoSAA/CSAB counselling for seat allotment. The institute follows the seat reservation policy as per the government of India. Find below theIIIT Nagpur seat intakefor its BTech course:
Note: This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Indian Institute of Information Technology, Nagpur admission processincludes JEE registration, IIIT Nagpur application form, JoSAA counselling, etc. Students looking to apply for the programmes offered at the institute must satisfy the admission criteria prior to applying. Aspirants can follow the steps mentioned below to complete theIIIT Nagpur admission process:
Check out more details in the below video:

headings.text: Steps for IIIT Nagpur Admission Process 2025

lists: students looking for admission at IIIT Nagpur are required to complete theJEE Main application. For PhD admissions, the college accepts GATE/ CSIR/ UGC NET scores. Eligible students can visit the official website of the institute and fill outIIIT Nagpur's PhD applicationform.

After the application process, students are shortlisted for the counselling process. students must register for the counselling process by visiting their official website. BTech students must fill out theCSAB application formorthe JoSAA application form.

The counselling bodies release a course-wise cutoff list. The cutoff list indicates the minimum required score in the respective entrance exam for a candidate to become eligible for admission. students with a score equal to or more than the cutoff marks can apply.IIIT Nagpur cutoff 2024will be released after each round of JoSAA counselling for admission to the BTech courses.

BTech students are required to fill out the IIIT Nagpur's application form after the final allotment of the institute through JoSAA/CSAB rounds. students must bring the application form along with all the supporting documents while reporting to the institute. students must pay the course-wise fees to finalise the seats at the institute.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam should I write to get into PhD at IIIT Nagpur?
faqs.answer: Candidates, to be eligible, must write GATE exam. However, for final selection, the institute conductes a college-level entrance and also conducts a Personal Interview round to shortlist students. In addition to this, candidates must have also completed their master's degree in Engineering/ Technology along with a bachelor’s degree in Engineering/ Technology with 60% aggregate.

faqs.question: How to apply for PhD at IIIT Nagpur?

faqs.question: Are the admissions at the IIIT Nagpur open?
faqs.answer: Yes, admission are open at IIIT Nagpur. The institute offers undergraduate and PhD programmes. Students can apply directly through the official page. It is mandatory for students to qualify the eligibility criteria before applying for admission.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to IIIT Nagpur?
faqs.answer: To get admission to IIIT Nagpur, candidates are required to appear for JEE Mains and secure a good rank. The right approach accompanied by a preparation strategy is all that is required to ace JEE Main exam. A prep plan for the exam is as follows:Choose the reference books wiselyCross-checksection-wise weightage & syllabus for all subjects covered in JEE MainSolve as many Mock Tests as possible. Shiksha.com is providingFREEJEE Main Mock Test Paper (with Solutions).Revise as much as possibleKeep your focus on NCERT books at this pointSolve previous year’sJEE question papersthere are high chances of getting questions from thereTo secure admission into prestigious institutions such as the IITs, NITs and IIITs, it is essential for the aspirants to have a strong command on the material taught in their class 11 and class 12. Shiksha is offering free NCERT questions and solutions to aid JEE candidates in excelling in these classes. To access the NCERT solutions, click on the below links:NCERT

faqs.question: What is the placement percentage at IIIT Nagpur?
faqs.answer: Yes, based on the placement and academic track record it can be said that Indian Institute of Information Technology (IIIT), Nagpur is a very good public institution which is primarily established for high quality education and research in the fields of Engineering and Sciences.Given below are the two main factors based on which the above statement can be verified; one is the total tuition fee and average package offered for the flagship BTech programmes at IIIT Nagpur:CollegeTotal tuition feeAverage packageIIIT NagpurINR 7.9 lakhINR 14.03 LPA

faqs.question: How much percentile is required for IIIT Nagpur?
faqs.answer: The overall percentile required for the BTech programme is75% (65% for SC/ST/PwD) in Class 12 or be within the category-wise top 20 percentile in his/her respective Class 12 board examination. Admission to the BTech programme is based on candidates performance in the JEE Main exams. Also, participating in the JoSAA/CSAB couselling is required for the seat allottment.

faqs.question: Can an average student get admission in IIIT Nagpur?
faqs.answer: IIIT Nagpur is certainly a prestigious institute for Engineering. With increasing competition and high cutoffs, securing admission can become a challenging task. Students must have dedicated and continuous efforts. Students can seek preparation tools such as sample papers etc. for assistance.

placement_data.title: IIIT Nagpur Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: IIIT Nagpur has released its placement statistics for its BTech batch 2025. Out of 332 students , 207 were eligible for placements. A total of 200 students secured placements in top companies during IIIT Nagpur placements 2025. The institute attained a placement rate of 97.10% for its 2025 BTech batch. The highest and the average package offered during IIIT Nagpur placements 2025 stood at INR 60 LPA and INR 14.96 LPA, respectively. Further, the median and lowest package provided to the students stood at INR 12 LPA and INR 8 LPA , respectively. Some of the top recruiters that participated in the IIIT Nagpur placement session were Adobe, TCS, EY, Google, Cisco, Accenture and many more.

description: IIIT Nagpur cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the IIIT Nagpur JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:
Important: Top IIITs Cutoff for JEE Main: Past Years Cutoff Ranks and Trends

In this section, candidates can view the last 8 years of IIIT Nagpur JEE Main cutoff ranks for various courses and categories by clicking on the download now links provided below to understand the past years' trends.

IIIT Nagpur JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the IIIT Nagpur CSE cutoff 2025 was 30331 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. For other core branch, such as ECE, the JEE Main last round closing ranks for admission was 53384, for the General category. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cutoff rank for admission.

For the General AI category students, the IIIT Nagpur B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 30331 and 56011 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 30331 and 35506, B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering (Artificial intelligence and Machine Learning) and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at IIIT Nagpur. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. Students who appeared for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise JEE Main cutoff lists for BTech admission at IIIT Nagpur to understand the cutoff trends.

Tabulated below are the BTech specialisations available for admission based on the last round closing ranks of JEE Main. This will help students to make an informed decision to get the right college and specialisation for admission. reviews.review_heading: Inside details, IIIT Nagpur 2025 review.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure, like fully AC classrooms, computer labs with good specs, and ECE labs. The college provides its internet, which is usually fine, but sometimes it doesn't work. In the hostel, Wi-Fi doesn't work, but internet is provided through LAN cable, which most of the time provides high-speed internet. Our college has a library and a reading room, but they are just 2 normally spaced rooms. The library mostly has books related to courses. The mess and canteen provided in ...

reviews.review_heading: This college is good for bookworms but not good for all-rounder students
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, Wi-Fi, labs, and classes are all decent and well managed. Academically, it has been really great with all the facilities provided. A sports ground has been made, although it is not in use as of now, and the ground is said to be used mainly for football and cricket. Mess food is a bit lower than okay, not much to be expected, but okay for survival.

reviews.review_heading: This college is very good for studies but not for sports.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, with Wi-Fi, labs, and classes all decent and well managed. Academically, it has been really great with all the facilities provided. A sports ground has been made, although it is not in use as of now, and the ground is said to be used mainly for football and cricket. Mess food is a bit lower than okay, not much to be expected, just okay for survival.

reviews.review_heading: Indian Institute of Information Technology Nagpur - Is it worthy?
reviews.review_text: Average infrastructure with all the basics available like library, reading room, and hostel but there is one point. There is only one hostel, therefore the location goes on a first-come cum first-served basis. Otherwise, the college tasks students to stay by finding their own means or to take a hostel which is in contact with college but is extremely expensive.

reviews.review_heading: I'm impressed by the placement information that is given on the website of this college.
reviews.review_text: Labs are new and better compared to other colleges, classrooms are AC-enabled 24/7, and good facilities and library should be improved. Hostel infrastructure should be somewhat better, and gym, mess, music room, and all the stuff like that are given in a single block. This should be corrected by the management. The medical facility is good, sports are going to be good, as a new ground is constructed.

reviews.review_heading: Self study and good facilities. Faculty members are best in helping students to study.
reviews.review_text: College hostel was good when compared with the outside private hostel. The food they served was northern food. Wi-Fi facilities were better. Each student was given ethernet separately. Medical facilities were good in hostel. Coming to sport, the certain ground was not present one problem.

reviews.review_heading: Academic focus is good, sports are lacking, and overall campus life lacks its shine.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is good.  Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are all decent and well-managed. Academically, the facilities provided are excellent. A sports ground has been developed, although it is currently not in use; it is intended mainly for football and cricket. The mess food is slightly below average, not much to expect, but sufficient for survival.

reviews.review_heading: Emerging tech institute with strong placements and modern infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi and classrooms are very good. The classrooms are fully specialized with good AC and a projector. But the library in our college is small, and the canteen is also a disadvantage one not so large. Sports and games are good. Indoor and outdoor both are available. Here, every lab will be available. Hostel rooms are clean and neat, and 2 and 4 seaters are available.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are good. Placement record is appreciable.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available for my course CSE include labs with fully equipped with ACs and monitors. Classrooms are spacious and with ACs. Mess food is not that good. Night canteen is open till 1:00 AM. Sports facilities are too less. We don't have a sports complex and not even a big ground.

college_info.college_name: IIIT Nagpur Scholarship Details

paragraphs: You can get a refund of the fee that you have paid for BTech at IIIT Nagpur. For this you have to submit a request to the college to cancel your admission within 15 days from the start of classes. In this case you will get a refund of 75% of tuition fee when the Admission Cancellation Process gets completed. But if you submit this request after 15 days from the start of classes, then you will not get any refund.

IIIT Nagpur BTech annual tuition fee is INR 1.98 lakh. Therefore, the total tuition fee for all 4 years is INR 7.92 lakh.  The total fee for all four years includes the tuition fee as well as other fee components. It amounts to approximately INR 9.3 lakh. This fee is subject to change.

Yes, IIIT Nagpur offers various scholarships to students as financial assitance. These scholarships helps students to study in the college without any financial tensions. Social Justice & Special Assistance scholarships are provided. Under this scholarship,  Government of India Post-Matric Scholarship and other scholarships are provided. The aim of the scholarships is to provide equal education rights to students.

college_info.intro:
Bharati Vidyapeeth College of Engineering offers programmes at the UG, PG, and PhD levels in the stream of Engineering. The popular programmes include B.E./ B.Tech and M.E./ M/Tech.
B.E./ B.Tech at BVCOE Mumbai is offered in 6 specialisations, including Mechanical Engineering, Computer Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Information Technology, Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering, and Instrumentation Engineering. The duration of the programme is 4 years and costs around INR 3.7 Lakh, with an annual intake varying from 60 to 120 students, offering different specialisations.
M.E./ M.Tech is offered across 3 specialisations, namely Computer Engineering, Product Design and Development, and Mechanical Engineering. The 2-year programme is offered in full-time mode, and the average tuition fee is INR 1.8 Lakh with an annual intake of 18 students each. Bharati Vidyapeeth College of Engineering courses are offered to students mainly in the field of Engineering. The college offers various programmes at the UG, PG, and PhD levels. Further, the BVCOE Mumbai courses are offered to students in full-time mode and are approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE).

Admission to the respective courses is based on merit and valid entrance scores. The frequency of the fee payment may vary from course to course. The common payable components for every course at BVCOE are Tuition Fees, Admission Fees, Examination Fees, etc. BVCOE course-wise are mentioned below:

faqs.answer: A:    Bharati Vidyapeeth College of Engineering offers BTech as a 4 year UG level programme. The Institute offers it in various specialisations such as Mechanical Engineering, Computer Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Information Technology, Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering, Instrumentation Engineering and many more. faqs.answer: A:    Bharati Vidyapeeth College of Engineering offers a BTech in Mechanical Engineering which is a 4 year programme offered with an annual intake of 120 students. The Institute offers admission to the respective course based on Class 12 or its equivalent examination with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with one of the Chemistry/ Biotechnology/ Biology/ Technical Vocational subject/ Computer Science/ Information Technology/ Informatics Practices/ Agriculture/ Engineering Graphics/ Business Studies/ Electronics/ Entrepreneurship. Candidates must have obtained at least 45% (at least 40% marks, in case of  Economically Weaker Section belonging to Maharashtra State only) in the above subjects taken together are eligible to apply. individual_reviews.title: Overall, my college is good.

The Institute offers the respective course with a total tuition fee worth INR 5.2 Lakh. Admission to BTech is offered on the basis of Class 12 45% aggregate and valid scores of JEE Main or MHT CET.
faqs.question: What is the total fees of BTech at Bharati Vidyapeeth College of Engineering?

faqs.answer: Bharati Vidyapeeth College of Engineering offers a BTech in Mechanical Engineering which is a 4 year programme offered with an annual intake of 120 students. The Institute offers admission to the respective course based on Class 12 or its equivalent examination with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with one of the Chemistry/ Biotechnology/ Biology/ Technical Vocational subject/ Computer Science/ Information Technology/ Informatics Practices/ Agriculture/ Engineering Graphics/ Business Studies/ Electronics/ Entrepreneurship. Candidates must have obtained at least 45% (at least 40% marks, in case of  Economically Weaker Section belonging to Maharashtra State only) in the above subjects taken together are eligible to apply. In addition to this, candidate must have appeared in all the subjects in MHT-CET and should obtain non zero score in MHT-CET.

admission_process.title: BVCOE Mumbai Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: BVCOE Mumbai admissionsare based on entrance exam scores of the candidates. The college fills seats through the Centralised Admission Process (CAP) by the Government of Maharashtra. The remaining seats after CAP are filled through institute-level Spot Round. Below is the completeBVOCE admission process:
Step 1: BVOCE Mumbai Application Process 2025

Candidates have to first fill out the application form for any of the accepted entrance exams for admission. Once, the candidates have appeared for the entrance test, they can participate in the counselling rounds for seat allotment.
Step 2: Entrance Exam

Candidates need to have a valid score in MHT CET or JEE Main for BE and GATE score for ME programmes. Those with a score in any of these entrance tests can further apply for CAP conducted by the Government of Maharashtra. Candidates must score equal or above theBVOCE Mumbai cutofffor admission.
Step 3: Counselling & Seat Allotment

Once selected, aspirants have to fill out the CAP application form. The seats are allotted to aspirants based on their rank in the entrance exam. For ME, students are offered seats through Centralised Admission Process (CAP), Maharashtra MTech Counselling. In case the seats remain vacant after CAP, candidates can then register for institute-level seats. A merit list is released for candidates who are shortlisted in Spot Round on the college's website. Aspirants who are allotted a seat need to report at the campus for document verification. Candidates also need to pay theBVCOE feeto confirm their seat.

faqs.answer: BVCOE Mumbai offers a full-time BE programme for four-years at the UG level. The course is divided into eight semesters. faqs.question: How much is the fee for BE at BVCOE Mumbai?
faqs.answer: The total course fee for BE at BVCOE Mumbai isINR 1.30 lakh. Candidates who are selected for admission need to confirm their seat by paying some part of the fee. The total course fee above excludes the hostel fee. The annual hostel fee for boys isINR 96,000. The hostel fee for girls isINR 1.66 lakhfor single seater,INR 1.46 lakhfor two seater andINR 96,000for three seater rooms.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for BE at BVCOE Mumbai?
faqs.answer: There are a total of540 seatsavailable in BE programme of Bharati Vidyapeeth College of Engineering. Candidates are offered seat in the BE course based on their entrance-exam scores. Aspirants with a valid score in JEE Main or MHT CET are offered seat based on their rank. Once selected, aspirants have to participate in CAP rounds for seat allotment.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at BVCOE Mumbai?
faqs.answer: Bharati Vidyapeeth College of Engineering Mumbai does not offer direct admission to UG and PG courses. The college offers admission based on entrance exam scores of the candidates. The college accepts scores in MHT CET, GATE or JEE Main for specific programmes. Admission to BVCOE courses is offered through the Centralised Admission Process or CAP conducted by the Government of Maharashtra. Those who are allotted seat are required to report for document verification and fee payment.

faqs.question: What is the difference between the CAP round and the institute-level Spot Round at BVCOE Mumbai?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission at BVCOE Mumbai have to register for CAP or Centralised Admission Process conducted by the Government of Maharashtra after appearing for any of the accepted entrance exams. The seats are offered to candidates through various CAP rounds. In case of vacant seats after CAP, students can register for institute-level Spot Round. The remaining seats are offered to aspirants through the Spot Round. There is a separate application form for Spot Counselling.

faqs.question: Is entrance exam required for admission at BVCOE Mumbai?
faqs.answer: Bharati Vidyapeeth College of Engineering admissions are entrance-based. Candidates are offered a seat at the college based on their score in national or state-level entrance exams. The college accepts JEE Main or MHT CET scores for BE admission. For ME, selection is based on GATE scores. Selected candidates have to participate in CAP rounds conducted by the Government of Maharashtra for seat allotment. For ME, seats are allotted through Centralised Admission Process (CAP) Maharashtra MTech Counselling.

hostel_campus.college_name: BVCOE Mumbai Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Overall, my college is good.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good labs. There are ACs in all classrooms. It conducts a task in each lab, and we need to do it with full focus. Daily, a 1 lab session is conducted, and 20 students in each batch do the practical work in the lab time, for example, Python, code, web development, C++, and DSA.

reviews.review_heading: Decent college with good infrastructure, average faculty, and improving placements.
reviews.review_text: College hostel is in good condition, not much, but you can stay there. The facilities provided by the hostel are good enough. The Wi-Fi system is not good, and there is a range issue in the college building. One thing is good about college hostels, that there are 2 different hostels, one for girls and one for boys. Security matters the most.

reviews.review_heading: Average college with bad infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The canteen is very hygienic. Labs, classrooms, and the library are average. Hostels are also not in good condition. Though the college provides sufficient parking space for students, it is also within walking distance from Kharghar station. It takes only 2-3 minutes to reach the college from the station.

reviews.review_heading: It has good faculty members and a campus.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided are average. Wi-Fi works well in some classrooms and labs, while in others it does not work well. Desktops are just fine, and they allow us to bring our own laptops for comfort levels. All classrooms have a smart board as well as a normal board for efficient teaching. It has a separate reading room to focus on study, which can easily accommodate 100 students. I stay in a locality, but students living in the hostel have told me that the food is good and they provide Wi-Fi faci...

reviews.review_heading: Life at Bharati Vidyapeeth, Navi Mumbai.
reviews.review_text: The department offers state-of-the-art labs, smart rooms, 24/7 Wi-Fi, and access to a well-stocked physical library. The mess food is average but hygienic, while the canteen offers more variety. The medical support is available on campus, and there are excellent sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The campus is fully air-conditioned with a 24-hour Wi-Fi facility. The library is open from 9 AM to 9 PM, and classrooms are equipped with projectors. The food quality in the mess is also good, and both outdoor and indoor games are available on campus. The music room has all instruments for students to use.

reviews.review_heading: Our college really focuses more on placements and studies over fests and events.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure here is quite average. To be honest, this college really needs a renovation. Labs and classrooms on the other hand, are very good. Every classroom has a smartboard. Hostels are also quite affordable. Mess and canteens are not that good and hygienic. We have numerous kinds of sports and games available, and you can actively participate in all kinds of sports.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college in terms of sincerity, seriousness, canteen, and sports.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are available within the college, and nearby PGs are also an option. The college provides good Wi-Fi service, and all classrooms are neat and clean. The library has a huge variety of books. The college canteen has a mess that offers very good quality food at a very nominal price.

reviews.review_heading: Overall chemical engineering in Bharati Vidyapeeth College of Engineering, Navi Mumbai is too good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is decent. Classrooms are okay. Labs are good. The library is quite good. Our college has a hostel for both boys and girls. The food in the hostel is better than others. The environment of the hostel is good. Seniors always advise best for you.

reviews.review_heading: Bharati Vidyapeeth college of engineering and technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is so good, and it includes a very nice library, office, hostel, FE workshop, central computing facilities, language laboratory, institution innovation council, IIT remote center, culture cell, and consumer stores. The hostels are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus & infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Excellent faculty, infrastructure & campus is fine. Hostels are just like other college hostels, average. Canteen is fine. Classrooms are spacious & have digital boards. Wi-Fi, never used, so can't tell about it, but those living in the hostel say it is also fine. Mess is worse (those who live in hostel).

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with college life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really great and I love all the facilities provided by the college. There are Wi-Fi situated on every floor of the building and there are two different wings for seniors and juniors. Classrooms have smartboards inside them. The canteen and medical facilities are good. It consists of a different library building as well.

reviews.review_heading: Good college and placement.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms/Lecture Halls: The college has an adequate number of spacious, well-lit, well-ventilated, and furnished classrooms, which can accommodate more than 70 students with the best seating arrangements to facilitate proper teacher-student interaction.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college review is very good.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is good. All the labs are equipped with necessary equipment, and all books are available in our library. There is full access to Wi-Fi across the campus. The hostel is very good, and the food in the hostel is also good compared to other hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied, overall best college.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available. Good infrastructure. Classrooms, library, and labs are good. Best quality of facilities in the hostel. Also, good quality food is available in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities are available for students in case of an emergency.

college_info.college_name: BVCOE Mumbai Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Bharati Vidyapeeth College of Engineering offers BTech as a 4 year UG level programme. The Institute offers it in various specialisations such as Mechanical Engineering, Computer Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Information Technology, Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering, Instrumentation Engineering and many more. The Institute offers the respective course with a total tuition fee worth INR 5.2 Lakh. Admission to BTech is offered on the basis of Class 12 45% aggregate and valid scores of JEE Main or MHT CET.

Bharati Vidyapeeth College of Engineering students are open to scholarships offered by the state or central government. Students can apply for Rajarshi Chhatrapati Shahu Maharaj Shikshan Shulkh Shishyavrutti Yojna (EBC),  Scholarship for students of minority communities pursuing Higher and Professional courses (DTE),  Post Matric Scholarship to OBC Students,  Post Matric Scholarship to SBC Students,  Post Matric Scholarship to VJNT Students,  Government of India Post Matric Scholarship, etc. Students must fulfill the criteria to apply for a scholarship.

The total course fee for BE at BVCOE Mumbai is INR 1.30 lakh. Candidates who are selected for admission need to confirm their seat by paying some part of the fee. The total course fee above excludes the hostel fee. The annual hostel fee for boys is INR 96,000. The hostel fee for girls is INR 1.66 lakh for single seater,  INR 1.46 lakh for two seater and INR 96,000 for three seater rooms.

reviews_list.review_title: It is a good government college. I got decent marks in JEE Main.

review_content.Placements: This course is new, and in this college, this is the first year of this course. Overall, across all CS branches, the highest package offered is 57 LPA. Microsoft, Google India, Infosys, Wipro, Amazon, Adobe, etc., are the main companies that came for placements. 70 percent of students got internships from this course in small tech companies. Sports and games happen in college.

faqs.answer: No, Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya does not give direct admission to the students. Admission to various courses is based on merit and scores of entrance exams. Candidates need to write the CUET entrance exam which is conducted by the NTA. After clearing the CUET entrance exam, students may get a provisional allotment of seats in the college. Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya admission to most of the undergraduate and postgraduate programmes is offered on the basis of marks scored in the Common University Entrance Test.Candidates can choose the type of admission they are seeking, which can be through one of the following:Type 1 - Through CUETType 2 - Through Department level TestType 3 - Through merit in the qualifying examination.The application fee for all types of admissions is INR 1,550.

overview_faqs.question: Is Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Takshashila a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: In India, Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya (DAVV) Takshashila is recognised as a respectable university. The college is renowned for offering high-quality academic programs, especially in subjects like humanities, management, and commerce. It provides a supportive learning atmosphere with knowledgeable instructors committed to the growth and research of its students. Libraries, labs, and extracurricular activities are among the contemporary amenities on campus that support a well-rounded educational experience. Students are drawn to DAVV Takshashila because of its excellent placement record and the numerous organisations that visit for recruitment. All things considered, DAVV Takshashila is a wonderful option for students looking for high-quality education and job possibilities because of its academic rigour, teaching knowledge, and placement opportunities.

overview_faqs.question: What is the application fee for the B.Tech. program at Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Takshashila?
overview_faqs.answer: To be eligible for admission to the B.Tech. program at Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Takshashila, a candidate must have qualified in the 10+2 examination and appeared in the IIT-JEE examination.The application fee for the B.Tech. program at Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Takshashila is INR 750 per program. For SC/ST candidates of M.P. domicile, the fee is INR 400 per program.The application fee can be paid online through mponline.gov.in. For other programs, the application form must be submitted to the respective teaching department along with a demand draft drawn in favor of “Registrar, D.A.V.V., Indore”.

overview_faqs.question: Can Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya, Takshashila Campus be considered a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya, Takshashila Campus is a reputed institute for M.Phil, UG Diploma, B.Tech, B.A., M.A., M.E./M.Tech, B.Ed, M.Ed, Certificate, PG Diploma, M.P.Ed, MBA/PGDM, B.Lib.I.Sc., B.P.Ed, LL.M. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Law, Hospitality & Travel, Engineering, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Teaching & Education, Humanities & Social Sciences, Beauty & Fitness, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Mass Communication & Media, Banking, Finance & Insurance, Medicine & Health Sciences, Design, Science, Accounting & Commerce. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya, Takshashila Campus has a review rating of 4.1 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 4.1 on campuslife, 4.1 on placements, 4.1 on faculty and 3.7 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya, Takshashila Campus Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: DAVV Indore is a good college.

content.Placements: Many companies come for placements. Top companies from Indore also come for placements. The DAVV Placement Cell conducts exams for particular companies. Around 70 to 80 percent of students get placed with good packages. In 2026, the average package at Infosys is 3.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Boys’ and girls’ hostels are available with proper hygiene. The boys’ hostel closes at 11 PM, and the girls’ hostel closes at 9 PM. Two students share one room. Each room has an almirah, table, chair, and internet connection.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. + M. Tech. in IT - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: My life at the IET DAVV Indore (Madhya Pradesh).

content.Placements: I am currently in the 1st semester, so I don't know too much about placements, but I can say that placements are not too good in our college as compared to NITs and IIITs. The highest package offered is 39 LPA, which was offered in the year 2023. The average package offered is around 6 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, a library, etc., are available.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are extraordinary. They have a good sense of humour, so they can make us laugh. They do not insult anyone to make us laugh. They are just good human beings. There are 4 exams per semester, 3 MSTs, and one end-semester exam. The best of 2 out of 3 will be taken as a result of MST. I am currently in the first semester of the Information Technology course. My course is about the IT sector, and I know the value of that. Our faculty members are good at teaching and friendly with students like us who didn't get the lecture the first time.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with the food in the hostel.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed is 8 CGPA or more. No backlogs. The highest package is 28 LPA, the lowest package is 3 LPA-4 LPA, and the average package is 7 LPA- 8 LPA. Companies are Wipro, Infosys, and TCS. The percentage of students is about 8 CGPA, and the company is Accenture.
content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi of the hostel network is good. Labs are also outstanding, but the lectures are minimal. My suggestion is that the food in the hostel and the water are not good, so I do not eat there. Medical facilities are not available in the college. These are outside the college. I have no idea about sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It is a good government college. I got decent marks in JEE Main.

content.Placements: This course is new, and in this college, this is the first year of this course. Overall, across all CS branches, the highest package offered is 57 LPA. The average package ranges from 10-12 LPA. Microsoft, Google India, Infosys, Wipro, Amazon, Adobe, etc., are the main companies that came for placements. 70 percent of students got internships from this course in small tech companies. Senior and junior software engineer roles are offered in this course.
content.Infrastructure: The college campus area is good and huge. The college campus is covered with many trees and plants, and it seems like college is in the jungle. Wi-Fi, labs, library, and all good facilities are available in the college for students. Mason canteen food is acceptable. College is directly connected with Indore Icchapur Highway. Sports and games happen in college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Ground-level information of DAVV.

content.Placements: Above 60 percent of students got placed from every batch every year, and the remaining 40 percent are trying to find off-campus placement, but they don't get any support from the college. 1.5 LPA to 20 LPA is the package offered, and the average is 5 LPA to 8 LPA. TCS and Infosys are recruiting companies. 25 percent of students got internships in mostly TCS and Infosys. Web developer is the role offered.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is too good, but cleanliness is average, and all are available. The hostel is pretty nice, but the food quality is, as expected, average and sometimes below average. Medical facilities are available, and a canteen too, but the sports are rarely played.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Takshashila?
faqs.answer: No, Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya does not give direct admission to the students. Admission to various courses is based on merit and scores of entrance exams. Candidates need to write the CUET entrance exam which is conducted by the NTA. After clearing the CUET entrance exam, students may get a provisional allotment of seats in the college. Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya admission to most of the undergraduate and postgraduate programmes is offered on the basis of marks scored in the Common University Entrance Test.Candidates can choose the type of admission they are seeking, which can be through one of the following:Type 1 - Through CUETType 2 - Through Department level TestType 3 - Through merit in the qualifying examination.The application fee for all types of admissions is INR 1,550.

faqs.answer: The ultimate date to use for admission to Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Takshashila for the present day year is usually around mid to late July, but precise dates can change. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 33433, B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 42100.
