hostel_campus.college_name: Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya

reviews.review_heading: DAVV Indore is a good college.
reviews.review_text: Boys’ and girls’ hostels are available with proper hygiene. The boys’ hostel closes at 11 PM, and the girls’ hostel closes at 9 PM. Two students share one room. Each room has an almirah, table, chair, and internet connection.

reviews.review_heading: My life at the IET DAVV Indore (Madhya Pradesh).
reviews.review_text: Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, a library, etc., are available.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the food in the hostel.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi of the hostel network is good. Labs are also outstanding, but the lectures are minimal. My suggestion is that the food in the hostel and the water are not good, so I do not eat there. Medical facilities are not available in the college. These are outside the college.  I have no idea about sports.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good government college. I got decent marks in JEE Main.
reviews.review_text: The college campus area is good and huge. The college campus is covered with many trees and plants, and it seems like college is in the jungle. Wi-Fi, labs, library, and all good facilities are available in the college for students. Mason canteen food is acceptable. College is directly connected with Indore Icchapur Highway. Sports and games happen in college.

reviews.review_heading: Ground-level information of DAVV.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is too good, but cleanliness is average, and all are available. The hostel is pretty nice, but the food quality is, as expected, average and sometimes below average. Medical facilities are available, and a canteen too, but the sports are rarely played.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, college is good, especially for the core. Mechanical is best for core.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are good in terms of infrastructure. All students live like a family. A single room is allotted for the final year. Wi-Fi facility is available on campus. VLSI lab for Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering. Mess is also available. Medical facilities are also good. For sports, you have to go to the main campus.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of high ROI.
reviews.review_text: Faculty isn't good as we expected. Rather than Wi-Fi, labs and library are more than good. Food quality is the worst I have seen, no sports and medical facilities, and no games have been played yet. The hostel warden is also very rude towards students regarding mess food and health issues.

reviews.review_heading: Rude faculty, no proper water coolers, and no digital screens.
reviews.review_text: Ragging cases are reported. There are not sufficient rooms for students, so some students live in rented PG flats. Food is not included in the hostel fee. There is no proper equipment and playground facilities on the IET DAVV campus. Wi-Fi passwords are provided at the end of the semester. There is no proper mobile network or Wi-Fi connectivity in the college. There are no smart classrooms, projectors, or LED screens in classrooms. Computer labs are available, but faculty does not take students ...

reviews.review_heading: It has decent infrastructure. It offers quality education with a good placement rate.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available on the campus. A decent library is provided with the availability of books in all courses. The quality of food provided is also decent in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities are available, and basic medicines are available in each department block.

reviews.review_heading: It is really good in all respects except for the low infrastructure and hostels.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are not good. The mess is also not good. Wi-Fi is okay in many rooms. The library is good with a big reading area and a lot of books. There are no medical facilities in the hostel because the college is in the centre of the city. There are no sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is good government college strong placement in CSE, IT, ECE ROI is very good.
reviews.review_text: Above average infrastructure, decent classroom, lab, library, good Wi-Fi facility, big campus full of greenery hostels are basic. Mess food is very poor, campus life is simple not very luxuries not more comfort are there. Every month mst are held I did say it is solid and reliable.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, second best college in Madhya Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of CSE department at my college is decent. We have Wi-Fi facility in every department of our college and its library, we have updated computer labs and access to a large central library. Hostel facilities are average, rooms are simple but livable, and the mess food is okay, though great. The campus has basic medical facilities, a sports ground, and areas for games.

reviews.review_heading: Best in Indore for the IT branch. Its most famous in Indore for its huge campus.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for you in the IET department on the bypass are available in libraries. Classroom is very neat and clean. The facilities are available in the hostel, just like a water cooler, a mess canteen, Wi-Fi, and a very clean environment.

reviews.review_heading: School of computer science and information technology, DAVV, Indore.
reviews.review_text: I would say the infrastructure is good because it contains big grounds, an athletics ground, a basketball court, a volleyball court, a tennis court, and cricket grounds. And whole sports are just like a dream university, and for a sports person, it's the best place for this amount.

reviews.review_heading: Short review about SCSIT.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. The college provides a good campus with greenery all around. The labs are okay, not the best, they are average. The Wi-Fi of the college is good for basic tasks, and the library has all the essential books you need during your academic period.

college_info.intro:
GD Goenka University comprises more than 9 constituent schools and departments, including the School of Engineering & Sciences, the School of Management, and the School of Liberal Arts, among others. These schools extend a wide range of courses at the UG, PG, and PhD levels, across various streams. Among these courses the GD Goenka MBA and BTech are among the most popular programmes offered at the university.
GD Goenka University Gurugram offers a full-time, two-year MBA programme at the PG level. The MBA programme offered at the university covers core courses in the areas of Marketing, HR, International Business, etc. during the first year. While in the second year, the university extends various major and minor specialisation options to students. Students also have the option to pursue their MBA degree with an additional specialisation in either Fintech or Business Analytics.
The GD Goenka BTech programme offered by GD Goenka University is a four-year programme. It is offered in several specialisations, including Civil Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, etc. Check out the below video to know all about BTech at GD Goenka University:

review_summary.college_name: GD Goenka University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am very glad to take admission in such a good university.

content.Placements: I don't know more about placement because last year I took admission here. But I heard from our seniors that placement depends on the student's results, and top companies participate here. All students get internships in special hospitals like Fortis and Medanta. It provides very good facilities by the university.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the building is well-built and of high-quality labs. Classrooms are digital. Library is very well furnished, and all books are available here. The quality of hostel is like a 5 star hostel, and medical facilities are also available. Food quality at hostel is very excellent.

individual_reviews.course: M.Pharma. in Pharmaceutics - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: GD Goenka University is a good private college recognized by UGC, BCI, ICAR, PCI, and NAAC.

content.Placements: About 70% to 80% of students in our M.Pharm course get placed. The highest package is 18–20 LPA, the lowest is 3–7 LPA, and the average is 10–12 LPA. Recruiting companies include Medanta, Sun Pharma, Fortis, GRC Healthcare, and others. Around 80% of students get internships at Sun Pharma, like Regulatory Affairs and QA/QC.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, pharmaceutical labs, library, CIL labs, machine room, gym, cafeteria, swimming pool, football ground, archery room, badminton rooms, table tennis court, lawn tennis court, pool room, steam and spa rooms are all available. The quality of the food is amazing. There is centralized AC, a study room, a common room, a fridge, Wi-Fi, a smart TV, and hygienic washrooms in every room. Medical facilities are available 24/7.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Optometry - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with it. Students must visit the university.

content.Placements: Around 70-80% of students get placements. The package offered is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Lenskart and Indira Gandhi Eye Hospital. 100% of students got internships from Indira Gandhi Eye Hospital, Dayal Eye Centre, and Ahooja Eye Hospital. In our course, mostly, roles are offered to all students.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available for students like a peaceful library, Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms. The infrastructure is very attractive and unique from other universities. The hostel is similar to the classroom building. It has all facilities in the hostel like Wi-Fi, mess food, and all these things are very good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Medical Radiology and Imaging Technology (BMRIT) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with my college.

content.Placements: The placement was really not good. You had to work on yourself for your placement. Only 10% of students got placed through the university. By teacher referrals, they also provided internships. Overall, the system or university was good if you could work hard on yourself.
content.Infrastructure: Faculty members were good. The library was well-maintained, and medical facilities were also good. Sports facilities were also good. You could participate in any co-curricular activities, as all were conducted by the university. The university environment was good for improving your personal growth.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) by NVIDIA Deep Learning Institute (DLI) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The facility is good, the environment, and facilities are good. All is good.

content.Placements: It is based on the person and no one on our campus is out for jobs. Top roles offered are like manager, HRO, and high- to low-paid jobs. IBM, Tata, TCS, and some others visit. Maybe 75% are placed in the course. I think. The higher package is 25 LPA and the lower package is 5 LPA, based on students.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, classrooms, labs, and library are good. Food is mostly North Indian, somewhat nice, and desserts are really tasty. All facilities are excellent. Wi-Fi provides personal access, and daily cleaning of rooms and washrooms, It provides good service in a hostel-like, home-environment.

admission_overview.college_name: GD Goenka University Admission 2026: Eligibility, Process, Fees & Last Dates

admission_overview.title: GD Goenka University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Goenka University admission 2026 is based on the entrance exam. The university offers more than 20 courses including PhD courses under the schools, i.e., School of Engineering and Science, Law, Agricultural Science etc. GD Goenka admission is merit-based and accepts CUET scores for all UG and PG courses. GD Goenka University also accepts national-level entrance exams such as MAT/CAT/CMAT for admission to MBA courses. Furthermore, the institute has introduced the Center of Excellence Occupational Health, Safety, Fire and Environment. The university also accepts national-level exams such as the JEE Main/ GD Goenka Test for BTech programme.

admission_process.title: GD Goenka University Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: GD Goenka University admissionsare entrance-based for the majority of the programmes. Students who are interested in taking admission for at GD Goenka University can check the points mentioned below:
1. Application Process

The admission process starts with filling GD Goenka University application form. Interested candidates can visit the official website to apply for the course of their choice along with making the fee payment of INR 1,100 for all courses.
2. Selection Process
For MBA courses candidates need to clear CAT/ CMAT/ MAT/ CUET/GD Goenka Test and fulfil of latest eligibility, i.e., class 12. However, for the BTech programme, students need to clear JEE (Main).
3. Admission Confirmation

After completion of the selection rounds, the shortlisted candidates are called for verification of the documents. Aspirants need to payGD Goenka University course feeto confirm their seat in the university.

placement_report.college_name: GD Goenka University Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Recruiters

placement_data.title: GD Goenka University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Over 300 companies took part during the GD Goenka University placements. The top recruiters were EY, KPMG, PWC, Protiviti and many others participated during the placement drive.

At GD Goenka University , the Corporate Resource Center (CRC) offers skill development programs. These programmes make students ready for the professional world. The center provides 100% placement assistance to students. The institute has a strong relationship with leading companies to provide employment to students in and outside India. Trainings are conducted for successful placements such as mock interviews, pre placement briefings and personality development programmes. The CRC has a one student, one job policy to make sure every student has a job when they graduate.
Refer to the CRC activities listed below:
1. Student Centric Active Learning Workshop
4. Resume building workshop

hostel.description: GD Goenka University hostels provides around 500 rooms which are shared by undergraduate and postgraduate students. The hostel provides common room which ]can be shared by 4 or 8 students which has the facility of LCD T.V and refrigerator.
facilities: Visit the admission portal of UID at uid.edu.in/admission/.

library.description:
GDGU Library and Information Centre consists a Reference Section, Circulation Section, Audio-visual Section, Periodical Section, Book Bank and Digital Library. It has automated all its library activities through Library Software to provide the effective and wide range of academic resources such as books, journals, online databases, DVDs, CD-ROMs, e-journals and other useful materials.
Library has Institutional Memberships of DELNET, Shodhganga (INFLIBNET) and many more. The library is subscribing more than 29450 e-journals and magazines National and International in full-text through the online databases especially for the academic and research needs of the GDGU academic community.

reviews.review_heading: I am very glad to take admission in such a good university.

reviews.review_heading: GD Goenka University is a good private college recognized by UGC, BCI, ICAR, PCI, and NAAC.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, pharmaceutical labs, library, CIL labs, machine room, gym, cafeteria, swimming pool, football ground, archery room, badminton rooms, table tennis court, lawn tennis court, pool room, steam and spa rooms are all available. The quality of the food is amazing. There is centralized AC, a study room, a common room, a fridge, Wi-Fi, a smart TV, and hygienic washrooms in every room. Medical facilities are available 24/7.

college_info.college_name: Cluster Innovation Centre: Courses, Fees, Admission 2026, Placements, Ranking

highlights.summary:
The admissions to various courses will begin soon at Cluster Innovation Centre, Delhi University.

The CUET UG 2026 registration portal is now closed for Cluster Innovation Centre admission to several UG courses. The CUET exam 2026 will be conducted from May 11 to May 31, 2026.

college_info.intro:
The Centre offers a range of UG, PG & PhD level courses in the field of Engineering, Humanities & Education. BTech & BA are the flagship courses offered by the college. BTech is offered at the UG level for the duration of 4 years. The program includes training in core Mathematics, IT, Science, Computer Science, disciplines and additional courses on Innovation and technology management, Electronics, Entrepreneurship, Business, Communications, Robotics, etc. After completing the programme students can work in both government & private sectors. BTech students can work as Software Engineers, Data Scientists, or can take up various fields relevant to their stream.
Cluster Innovation Centre also offers a four-year Bachelor of Arts (B.A. Honours) degree in Humanities and Social Sciences. Students can opt for papers across various subjects, semesters, and courses at the different Delhi University colleges as per their stream under meta-college concept. The streams offered in this course are Counselling, Heritage Tourism, and Media & Communication. Below mentioned are some of the popular programmes offered by Cluster Innovation Centre and their respective eligibility and fee structure:

faqs.answer: A:    With 70% in the class 12th you are eligible to get into Cluster Innovation Centre as the minimum percentage required is above 60% in any of the four subjects (including mathematics). However, it is not the only criterion to get a seat, you have to write an entrance test conducted by the university, they will give seats based on the merit list released a few days after the conduction of exam.
faqs.question: Can I get into Cluster Innovation Centre with 70% in class 12th?

faqs.answer: A:    Cluster Innovation Centre, Delhi University is not an expensive college. The fees of various courses at CIC, Delhi University is average. Considering other factors like cost of living and feasibility, Cluster Innovation Centre, DU can not be considered an average college in terms of cost.

review_content.Placements: There is no placement structure in Cluster Innovation Centre (CIC); you can't get any placement here. Even the internships are very less than those offered by other Delhi University colleges. It claims you don't need placements if you studied in Cluster Innovation Centre.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is really good; almost every room has air conditioners, and the building is also pretty. reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty, staff and facilities.

review_content.Placements: In our course, the student placement percentage was around 30–40%. The highest package was around 6 lacs, the average package was around 4 lacs, and the lowest was 3 lacs. The top recruiting companies were Flipkart and DRDO. In our course, 50–60% of students get internships from the college side. The top role offered was data analyst.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college department was newly constructed. Department labs, classrooms and libraries—everything was well furnished and had comfortable seats. Wi-Fi speed was also good to download. In our hostel, we have comfortable beds, tables and AC rooms. The quality of hostel food was average. Sports and medical facilities were also available.

reviews_list.review_title: The most unique and unpopular place for undergraduate .

review_content.Placements: Looking at the records of our past seniors and the Alumni, I found out that they have been placed nicely, and not because CIC has given them the placement through a central placement cell or something but how it evolved the students to become self-sufficient. CIC is a place that gives the students so much of freedom to learn and grow more than any other undergraduate centre or college. Recent passouts of my course are now enrolled at a good University for their higher education while past Alumni are mostly placed in MNCs or they have their own startups. A few of the seniors are in foreign for their further studies, mostly are on funded scholarships due to their strong profile.

faqs.answer: Yes, CIC, DU accepts CUET scores for admission to various UG and PG courses. The CUET is conducted by the University of Delhi through the National Testing Agency (NTA) and is an online process. The expected CUET score for taking admission in CIC, DU for the B.Tech program is 320/600 under SC & OBC (including PwBD) category. The overall cutoff for CUET is 604.5 marks. Additionally, to qualify for admission to the B.Tech program, students must earn an overall grade point average of 60 percent for the general category, 57 percent for OBC, and 54 percent for the reserved category in four math disciplines.

admission_process.title: Cluster Innovation Centre Admission 2025

paragraphs: Cluster Innovation Centre admission for all the programmes is subject to theCommon University Entrance Test (CUET)exam conducted by NTA. Candidates, willing to apply for admission must register for CUET exams and appear for the same.Cluster Innovation Centreoffers BTech, BA, BSc and PhD at the undergraduate, postgraduate and doctoral levels. Want to Know more about Cluster Innovation Centre admission along with course eligibility, selection criteria and admission process, check the below article:

Candidates interested in getting into a DU-affiliated college, i.e., CIC, DU are required to follow the CUET exam and DU CSAS registration process. After that, college and course allocation will be done. Check out the following table for details onCluster Innovation Centre course, which is inclusive of its eligibility, and selection:
Eligibility Criteria
Selection Criteria

Cluster Innovation Centrefeeincludes various components such as tuition fees, registration fees, exam fees, etc. Once selected, candidates are required to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university. Some of the fee components such as tuition fees are paid every semester.Cluster Innovation Centreseat intakevaries course-wise. To get a seat in any of the DU-affiliated colleges, candidates are required to pass CUET-UG. Admission to PG courses is based on CUET-PG score. Find below Cluster Innovation Centre fee intake and seat intake for all courses:
Popular Courses
Total Tuition Fee (Investment)
Seat Intake
Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Cluster Innovation Centre an affiliated college of Delhi University started considering the CUET UG exam for admission to its UG courses. For postgraduate courses, the Cluster Innovation Centre consider CUET PG conducted by NTA. The admission process for UG or PG courses contains six steps which include registration for CUET UG or PG, appearance in the relevant exam, registration for DU CSAS, CSAS counselling process, merit list release and seat allocation. The detailed admission process of the college is mentioned below:

Cluster Innovation Centre offers CUET-based admission to UG and PG courses. To be eligible for admission to BTech, BA and MSc courses, candidates are required to apply and appear for CUET-UG and CUET-PG, respectively. Interested candidates were able to apply online on the official websites of CUET UG and CUET PG.
Check the CUET UG application process in detail
Check CUET PG application process in detail
Candidates willing to get into Cluster Innovation Centre in any courses, who have registered for CUET are required to appear for the exam in the subject of their choice and get a valid score.
The Cluster Innovation Centre admission process after the declaration of CUET result is explained below:

Step 3.1:After declaring the CUET UG exam, candidates are required to register on the DU CSAS portal in multiple phases. Submit DSE + Course combination preferences in the order of priority on the CSAS dashboard.

Step 3.2:The University will release the dates for three DU CSAS Seat Allocation Lists. Candidates are required to select"freeze"to confirm the admission choice. Once candidates select this option, they will not be considered for "upgradation" of choice in further rounds of CSAS. Candidates must only select this option only if they are satisfied with the allocated seat.

Step 3.3:Once the candidate "Accepts" the provisionally allocated seat, the college will verify the eligibility and documents uploaded by the candidate online. The college has an option to 'Accept' or 'Reject' the admission of the candidates based on the verification.
Once the Cluster Innovation Centre approve, candidates are required to pay the 'Admission Fee' to confirm their seats.

faqs.answer: Yes, CIC, DU accepts CUET scores for admission to various UG and PG courses. The CUET is conducted by the University of Delhi through the National Testing Agency (NTA) and is an online process. The expected CUET score for taking admission in CIC, DU for the B.Tech program is 320/600 under SC & OBC (including PwBD) category. The overall cutoff for CUET is 604.5 marks. Additionally, to qualify for admission to the B.Tech program, students must earn an overall grade point average of 60 percent for the general category, 57 percent for OBC, and 54 percent for the reserved category in four math disciplines.

faqs.question: Can I get into Cluster Innovation Centre with 70% in class 12th?
faqs.answer: With 70% in the class 12th you are eligible to get into Cluster Innovation Centre as the minimum percentage required is above 60% in any of the four subjects (including mathematics). However, it is not the only criterion to get a seat, you have to write an entrance test conducted by the university, they will give seats based on the merit list released a few days after the conduction of exam.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for B.Tech at Cluster Innovation Centre?
faqs.answer: The seat intake for BTech courses at Cluster Innovation Centre is 50 seats in the year 2025. Among these seats,  30 of them are reserved for cadidates which do not belong to general category. In addition to the 30 reserved seats, there arealso 11 additional seats out of which 9 are supernumerary seats and 2 seats are for candidates getting admission through sports quota.

hostel_campus.college_name: Cluster Innovation Centre Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied but course structure need to be redefined.
reviews.review_text: Personally, I believe CIC has the best infrastructure among all the colleges in Delhi University. It offers essential facilities like Wi-Fi, digital labs, and spacious classrooms. CIC doesn't have its own hostel but provides secured accommodation in different hostels across the University of Delhi.

reviews.review_heading: Commendable faculty and the surroundings of my college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is really laudable. The classrooms are near and clean as well, and the whole college is fully air-conditioned. The quality of the food is very good, and the students get access to lifts to stir up the floors. The sports authority is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and unique course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good; almost every room has air conditioners, and the building is also pretty. It has a library, labs, open areas, and common areas, and even these places have ACs. The environment is really peaceful, not too much rush. The hostel they provide is also pretty good and offers good quality food.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty, staff and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college department was newly constructed. Department labs, classrooms and libraries—everything was well furnished and had comfortable seats. Wi-Fi speed was also good to download. In our hostel, we have comfortable beds, tables and AC rooms. The quality of hostel food was average. Sports and medical facilities were also available.

reviews.review_heading: The most unique and unpopular place for undergraduate .
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi in the campus, the classrooms are quite big with evolving chair for the students. The infra may excited many people very easily. And talking about the hostel facilities, there are University hostels available for the students to enroll at but there are limited seats only, students can only apply while out of the total,  40-50 students enrolled in the course, a total of 10 students can easily get the hostel. While there are actually less competitions for the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: A Nice Place For Engineering without JEE Main or Advanced.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is excellent, with fully air-conditioned facilities. Washrooms are well-maintained. Hostel accommodation is available for 1 or 2 individuals based on caste and minority status, although there are no separate hostels provided. Sports facilities, a gym, and medical services are available in the hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Cluster Innovation Centre, University of Delhi.
reviews.review_text: Our college doesn't have a placement cell. They provide off-campus placement. Many seniors got placed in our college. You can clear GSoc with the proper and wealthy suggestions of seniors. Many of them have cleared Gsoc in the 1st semester.

reviews.review_heading: A good option if you want to have personal skill improvement time with much lower fees.
reviews.review_text: CIC doesn't have a hostel; some seats are available in other college hostels. Due to unavailability, there may not be a good hostel life on campus. The course is unique, integrating management as a minor subject, which helps overall perspective development. Classrooms are way more advanced and comfortable.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for students who want to complete their B.Tech.
reviews.review_text: Hostel seats are limited, but the hostel is very good. It is near the college. Wi-Fi is available in both the college and the hostel. The infrastructure of the college is best on the north campus. The campus is air-conditioned. There are different labs.

reviews.review_heading: This college is best, if students are not getting IITs or top NITs.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is great. For the B.Tech batch, there are around 50 students in each year, so a total of 200 for IT engineering. Two other courses are also here. But students can think that a whole building is allocated for them. Out of that, there is great scenery outside of our campus that includes the university stadium. Students are in DU north campus, so the campus is not bounded to only CIC. But students can enjoy the whole north campus, and students have entry to all with one-two excep...

reviews.review_heading: Our college teaches concepts amazingly but doesn't give support.
reviews.review_text: Only CIC offers its students to join DU hostels, which are specifically for PG students. But from every class, only academically top 5 students get the hostels in which there is a reservation of seats as 2+1+2. There is no guarantee that hostels will be provided to students. Until now, it has been the situation except for few cases where few students couldn't get it. The classrooms are good, but the air-conditioners and elevators have recently stopped working, which never got repaired. So, the a...

reviews.review_heading: The college has good placements and awesome faculty.
reviews.review_text: The seniors and teachers of our course are good. Our seniors are like our brothers, and one of my seniors helped me a lot.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges in its kind.
reviews.review_text: Our university doesn't have a boys hostel. For girls, you can get it easily. The labs and infrastructure are excellent. The whole college is Wi-Fi enabled. You get access to all facilities provided by Delhi University like library etc.

reviews.review_heading: The college infrastructure is the best.
reviews.review_text:
The college infrastructure is the best. There is Wi-Fi available, the classrooms are fully air-conditioned. There is a central library for all DU students. 
The hostel is not allotted to all the students. Only some students or toppers in the entrance exam are allotted in the hostel. The medical facilities are available. Sports and games are allowed in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied from every aspect of our college.
reviews.review_text: We have fully furnished classrooms which are well-equipped with high quality table and chair for students and a podium for professors, we have whiteboard and projectors too in each classroom. All classes have access to central air-conditioning with individual air-conditioner for individual classes. All the labs are fully equipped with all the instruments which are needed there for performing tasks. The hostel facility is provided by the Delhi University itself and it is very good in every aspect...

content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available 24/7. The food is good. My department has good infrastructure with all the essential facilities required for academics. Classrooms are spacious, well-ventilated, and equipped with projectors. The campus has high-speed Wi-Fi. Though connectivity may fluctuate during speaking hours. Labs are well-maintained with updated systems and necessary software/equipment for practical sessions. The central library is a strong point, with a large collection of books, journals, e-resources, a reading space, and extended hours. Overall, the academic infrastructure is satisfactory and supports effective learning.

admission_overview.college_name: GITAM School of Technology Visakhapatnam Course Admissions 2026: Application & Selection

admission_overview.title: GITAM School of Technology, Visakhapatnam Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: GITAM School of Technology admission 2026 is entrance-based. GITAM conducts GAT and PGT for admission to UG and PG courses. GAT is GITAM Admission Test conducted at the university level for BTech programme. GITAM School of Technology, Visakhapatnam offers UG, PG, and doctoral levels courses including BTech, MTech, and PhD. Aspirants can apply for the preferred course online.

eligibility_selection.title: GITAM School of Technology, Visakhapatnam Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: GITAM School of Technology offers BTech, MTech and PhD courses. Candidates need to meet the eligibility criteria to apply for a course. The basic eligibility for BTech is Class 12 and graduation for MTech programme. Check below the eligibility and selection criteria for GITAM School of Technology courses:

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 with 50% or 5.0 CGPA aggregate in Intermediate or Class 12 examination from a recognised central / state board (except open schools) with Physics, Chemistry & Mathematics / Biology subjects, and qualified in GAT UG (Engineering)

Graduation with a minimum of 50% aggregate marks in the qualifying examination from a recognised University and a score obtained in GAT (Engineering PG) or B.E./B.Tech./AMIE in Mechanical/Production /Automobile /Marine /Aerospace or its equivalent
MTech / ME/Master's Degree with 55% aggregate

faqs.answer: Candidates must pass Class 12 with 50% or 5.0 CGPA aggregate in Intermediate or Class 12 examination from a recognised central / state board (except open schools) with Physics, Chemistry & Mathematics / Biology subjects, and qualified in GAT UG (Engineering) to apply for BTech at GITAM School of Technology, Visakhapatnam. Students scoring 50-60% must meet at least one of the below criteria:Score over 42% (85/200) in GAT and over 75% in Class 10Score over 55% (110/200) in GATScore over 85% in Class 10
faqs.question: Who is eligible for BTech at GITAM School of Technology, Visakhapatnam?

admission_process.title: GITAM School of Technology, Visakhapatnam Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Aspirants need to apply online for the preferred course. Candidates are selected for UG and PG courses based on their entrance exam scores. Check below the steps to get a seat in GITAM School of Technology, Visakhapatnam:

Students must have to fill the GAT application form for the admission. Interested students can visit the website to apply for the choice of courses, with the fee payment of INR 1,200 for PhD programmes.

The institute selects candidates for admission to BTech based on their GAT scores. Admission to MTech courses is based on GAT (PGT) scores of the aspirants. Selected candidates are called for a personal interview round for final admission.
After the selection rounds, students are called for document verification. Selected candidates need to pay theGITAM School of Technology, Visakhapatnam feesto confirm their seat.

faqs.question: What is the minimum eligibility required to apply for VLSI Design specialisation in MTech at GITAM Institute of Technology Visakhapatnam?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking to enrol for VLSI Design in M.Tech branch must have a BE/ BTech/ AMIE in ECE/ EEE/ EIE/ Instrumentation/ CSE/ IT or its equivalent degree.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for admission to GITAM Visakhapatnam full-time M.Tech programme?
faqs.answer: To be eligible for the M.Tech programme at GITAM Visakhapatnam, candidates must achieve a minimum of 50% aggregate marks in the qualifying examination from recognised University i.e., in class 12 and a score obtained in GAT (Engineering PG) 2024. This stringent eligibility criterion reflects GITAM Visakhapatnam's commitment to admitting students with a strong foundation in the essential disciplines for engineering.

faqs.question: What is the M.Tech course fee at GITAM School of Technology, Visakhapatnam?

faqs.question: Who is eligible for PhD in GITAM SOT, Visakhapatnam?

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission for PhD at GITAM, SOT Visakhapatnam?
faqs.answer: GITAM School of Technology offers admission to PhD course based on merit and performance of candidates in the interview round. The school may also conduct an entrance exam to select aspirants for PhD. Candidates need to complete master's degree in relevant discipline for admission to PhD programme.

faqs.question: Can I get admission to GITAM School of Technology, Visakhapatnam after Class 12?
faqs.answer: Candidates can apply for BTech at GITAM School of Technology, Visakhapatnam after completing Class 12.Candidates are admitted on the basis of their performance in GAT.

faqs.question: Can I take admission to GITAM School of Technology, Visakhapatnam with 60 percent in Class 12?
faqs.answer: Candidates can apply for BTech at GITAM School of Technology, Visakhapatnam after completing Class 12. Aspirants need to pass Class 12 with 50% or 5.0 CGPA aggregate in Intermediate or Class 12 examination to apply for BTech. Hence, aspirants with 60% in Class 12 can also apply.

reviews.review_heading: Really satisfied with our college curriculum, infrastructure, hostel rooms, food, etc.
reviews.review_text: Our college has the best hostel food, proper cleaning, and hygiene. It has top-class infrastructure and neat environment. Our college has its own hospital. About sports, every week we have a sports tournament which is conducted by our college. We have one of the best coaches.

reviews.review_heading: The college atmosphere is very good. Good to learn and enjoy. I am very much satisfied.

Hospitality is very good. Blankets are provided every day, food is very good in the hostel, and the canteen has reasonable prices and quality. There is a GIMS hospital easily accessible. There is an indoor and outdoor stadium and a high-class gym which is free for students.

reviews.review_heading: M.Tech MTA Review of GITAM.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities and library sources were very good. Classrooms had good facilities and were air-conditioned. Facilities in the hostel were good. They had good Wi-Fi, a games place, a TV hall, AC, and a lift facility to all the floors, with regular cleaning of the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus with decent placements.
reviews.review_text: GITAM offers good infrastructure with Wi-Fi-enabled campus, modern classrooms, and well-equipped labs. Library is digital and spacious. Hostels are decent with clean rooms, 24X7 water and security. Mess food is average. Canteen is better. Medical care, gym, and sports facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Balance the entire journey with the side of memories and the foundation for your future.
reviews.review_text: The college has old school vibe but right now everything has changed. It looks very professional and the infrastructure is requisite. Everything has changed since my joining. Many new blocks are constructed and many of my classrooms have been renovated.

reviews.review_heading: Review of GITAM School of Technology, Visakhapatnam.
reviews.review_text: This is one area where GITAM truly stands out. The campus has Wi-Fi almost everywhere. Most labs have well-functioning computers, with some equipped with high-performance systems. The library facilities are excellent. They offer free access to Athens and Scopus research papers. Nearly all classrooms and labs are air-conditioned, making it comfortable to study. The canteen serves reasonably priced food. The quality is generally good, sometimes even great. GITAM students also receive discounted tr...

reviews.review_heading: The college atmosphere is very good. good to learn and enjoy. I am very much satisfied.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are very advanced L1 classrooms. The whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The Knowledge Resource Center library has a vast collection of books and knowledge. Hospitality is very good. Blankets are provided every day, food is very good in the hostel, and the canteen has decent prices and quality. There is a GIMS hospital easily accessible. There is an indoor and outdoor stadium and a high class gym which is free for students.

reviews.review_heading: College life is beautiful with a challenging curriculum and colorful fests.
reviews.review_text: The rooms, both A/C and Non A/C, are well maintained with thorough cleaning regularly. The mess provides a 4 course meal, including evening snacks, offering varied and nutritious food to accommodate students from different states and countries as well.

reviews.review_heading: You can really have your best student life while having a good learning experience.
reviews.review_text: The campus is a Wi-Fi campus. Labs are well-equipped, and most of the classrooms are L1 AC classrooms. Library has many books available and the discussion rooms as well. The food was very hygienic and well-maintained. There is a GIMSR hospital where you can have the medical facility available 24 hrs, and the consultation is free for Gitam students.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest everyone to check college and campus life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is really good. It has clean environment and well equipped laboratories with all the necessary instruments for practical learning. Classrooms are spacious, fully air conditioned, and equipped with really high speed Wi-Fi, which creates a comfortable and modern learning environment.

reviews.review_heading: GITAM University is good and very supportive of students.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in GITAM University are top-notch, where every room is a smart room with projectors and unlimited Wi-Fi, and also there is a library access using our ID cards, where we can take books home by registering in the library and return them.

reviews.review_heading: A good campus, with decent placements.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are available, including Wi-Fi, good classrooms, and excellent libraries. All the sports grounds, an indoor badminton stadium, and an indoor basketball stadium are available. There is also a superb gym in the college with all the equipment.

reviews.review_heading: I am somewhat dissatisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: AC classrooms have a high interior design, but the Wi-Fi speed is slow, and there is a bad network for mobile SIMs. The hostel quality and mess food are both average. I would recommend choosing another college because there are many things, like the food isn't that good, and the fee is too high, only rich people can afford it.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: My review on GEC Thrissur.

content.Placements: Talking about placement percentage, it's like 75 percent when it comes to my course, and the highest package for my course is 32 LPA as per now, with an average of 4 LPA. Companies like MRF, Reliance, Saint Gobain, TCS, Infosys, Wipro recruit from my college.
content.Infrastructure: I'm a first-year student here, and I can share what I know about my college. The infrastructure is pretty good. The campus is 75 acres, though much of it is left unused. We have decent classrooms and a library, and the Wi-Fi is also good. Hostel facilities and food quality are satisfactory. We get decent facilities for 3k, so I'd say it's one of the best colleges you'll see in Kerala.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Pros and cons of the Government Engineering College, Thrissur.

content.Placements: Talking about the placement scenario in our civil department is lower compared to the other branches, like computer science and mechanical. The top recruiting companies are the Land T, Shobha Construction, and MRF, which visit the campus for placements. The package is offered at around 32 LPA, while the average packages range from 4 LPA to 6 LPA. On average, around 20% of civil students got placed, looking at the overall college placement of 60%-77%. The college's active placement cell and good industrial connections help students to get secure job offers. Site engineer, project manager, and structural engineers are some of the top positions.

content.Infrastructure: In civil department, well-equipped labs, spacious classrooms for 70-80 students. It has a seperate department library and Wi-Fi. The campus spans 75 acres of land. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is the second most-ranked college in Kerala under KTU University.

content.Placements: About 60% of students, including myself, secured placements from our college, with an average package offered between 3 LPA and 3.5 LPA, and key recruiters included Evess Recruitech, TCS, and 1M1B, additionally, 100% of students completed internships as it was a mandatory subject, leading to common roles like marketing manager and HR.

reviews.review_heading: My review on GEC Thrissur.
reviews.review_text: I'm a first-year student here, and I can share what I know about my college. The infrastructure is pretty good. The campus is 75 acres, though much of it is left unused. We have decent classrooms and a library, and the Wi-Fi is also good. Hostel facilities and food quality are satisfactory. We get decent facilities for 3k, so I'd say it's one of the best colleges you'll see in Kerala.

reviews.review_heading: Pros and cons of the Government Engineering College, Thrissur.
reviews.review_text: Even though the civil department is the oldest, it still boasts a well-equipped infrastructure to support academic pursuits. It comes with well-maintained labs like the CAD lab, environmental engineering lab, material testing lab, survey lab, and hydro informatics lab. The college library is also well equipped with vast collections of books, journals, and online resources. Talking about the college hostel facilities, it's laid with a clean and secure nature connected. Let me make one thing clear...

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure, faculty members are good, and placement is also good.
reviews.review_text: In civil department, well-equipped labs, spacious classrooms for 70-80 students. It has a seperate department library and Wi-Fi. The campus spans 75 acres of land. Gym, digital classroom, hostels, canteen, gym, and sports facilities are available. Hostel rooms and canteen should be improved.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very affordable & good engineering college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were honestly decent. It has a very historic hostel and campus. Labs have all the required instruments and machinery for practical work. A library was also available. A sports ground was also present. Hostels have all the essential facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is the second most-ranked college in Kerala under KTU University.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is same as that of a government office. This college is nearly of 70 acres. They have a very good ground, mainly there are 3 grounds. One is known as the hockey ground, the other basketball, and the other football. And the labs here are also good with really good infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: The campus provides good facilities and placements.
reviews.review_text: The campus provides good hostel facilities. Bedrooms are good with attached bathrooms. A 24-hour hot water facility is available. The mess is good. The canteen is also available. The college infrastructure is good. Classrooms and labs are good. It is Wi-Fi enabled with high-speed internet. The library is good. Medical facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: It has a strong infrastructure, good faculty, and decent placement rates.
reviews.review_text: It provides well-maintained classrooms, and modern features like a projector, Wi-Fi, and various engineering disciplines. The hostel is available with limited seats. It has a canteen. The mess facility is also provided. It has sports facilities like football and basketball.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are not bad. However, they are not good too. Since it is a government college, hostel feels and food charges are minimal. Rooms in hostels are available only for students whose houses are far from the district. If a student's house is more distance, then there are more chances of getting admission into hostels.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facility is available at less cost with two people sharing a room. Beds are available there and also food is included. The course structure for my course was really good and focused on research in the first year we had classes and studied various subjects like M.Teach but in the 2nd year, we had only labs and projects. reviews_list.review_title: Bad because of faculty members, bad placements in 2024, bad infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Many students did not get placed in our course at our college. They don't give the package details. CCE students get very lower salary package placements than CSE and other departments. Some get internships but most don't get internships. There are no top recruiting companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The mess food is the worst as every day we get the sambhar to eat. Our labs are pretty well-maintained. The canteen is small. There is importance for sports, games, and extracurricular activities except yoga.
review_content.Faculty: There are bad faculty members. They do not teach anything but only give difficult semester exams. The pass rate is barely. The curriculum is relevant but other department gets to learn topics earlier. Some are bad and some aren't. Quite good faculty members are also there. But mostly they don't provide marks. They only want us to study.

reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty and placements.

review_content.Placements: In a group of 55 members, only 10 members got placements, and 3 got Non-IT companies. The highest package is 12 LPA and the lowest is 3 LPA. No companies are recruiting for my course. A total of 15 members got internships at CDAC that were not based on interviews, just recommendations. Most roles offered are Non-IT.
review_content.Infrastructure: Amrita Chennai University is a new location in a village 60 km outside of the city, and they are taking a lot of time on infrastructure. The hostels are too bad; they didn't even clean the rooms. The warden told us to clean the room, only the bathrooms were cleaned. The food is average. We want to adjust, but there is no Zomato also.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Teachers are friendly. AI students get real projects. A 7.5+ CGPA ensures great company placements.

content.Placements: Till now, 80% of the students get placed with an average package of 5 lakhs. The companies are Accenture, TCS, and Infosys, who hire most of the people, and till now, 212 companies have come to the college for placements, so everyone gets placed in some company soon. The roles are Software Engineer and Data Analyst for my course.
content.Infrastructure: The college experience was decent overall. The Wi-Fi was fast and reliable, making it easy to access resources. Labs were average, and functional but lacking advanced tools. The food, however, wasn’t to my taste as I prefer spicy Andhra-style dishes, and the Tamil Nadu cuisine felt bland.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Thought the college was huge and a lot to explore, but it is a small campus of 13 acres.

content.Placements: 48 LPA is the highest package this year; some got above 10 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Microsoft, Amazon, AWS, etc. The average package was 9-10 LPA. Many top recruiting companies are there to recruit. 80-90 percent of students got internships in our college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college and labs are very good, but when it comes to the hostel, it is not as good as the classes and labs for 1st years. There are no common washrooms. We should clean our own rooms, which is good. But the hostels are far better than others I've seen in my intermediate.

individual_reviews.title: Placements are good but you can't experience a proper college life.

content.Placements: This year almost 40% of the students have been placed till now. The highest package is 26 LPA, and the lowest is 3.3 LPA; the average is 10 LPA. admission_process.title: Amrita School of Engineering, Chennai Admission 2026

paragraphs: The university offers admission on an entrance basis. Candidates must get through all the selection rounds of the respective course to get a seat. The admission process involves application form filling, an entrance exam followed by counselling, cutoff release, and seat allotment. Find below the step-wise explanation of the admission process:
STEP 1: Application Process

The Amrita School of Engineering, Chennai application process is conducted online. Applicants can go to the university's official website (https://aeee.amrita.edu/) to apply. The process involves online registration, form completion, document upload, and fee payment.
STEP 2: Selection Criteria

The aspirants are required to go through the course-specific entrance exam followed by other selection rounds (if applicable). For BTech & MTech courses, admission is granted based on the last qualifying examination & entrance exam score.
STEP 3: Counselling
Candidates seeking admission to the Amrita School of Engineering, Chennai BTech must undergo a round of counselling, which is conducted until all the seats are allocated.
STEP 4: Fee Payment & Admission Confirmation

Candidates who make it to the final selection list or are selected after counselling can pay the requiredAmrita School of Engineering, Chennai feeto confirm their seat. The university officials also inform the students of the directions or steps to be followed.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to M.Tech at Amrita School of Engineering, Chennai?
faqs.answer: No, candidates cannot get direct admission for M.Tech course at Amrita School of Engineering, Chennai campus. For M.Tech course admission, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. Aspiarnts should pass BE/BTech (Electronics and Communication, Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering,  Electrical and Electronics, Instrumentation and Control Engineering, Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering) and MSc Electronics.

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for admission to M.Tech at Amrita School of Engineering, Chennai?
faqs.answer: For admission to the M.Tech course at Amrita School of Engineering, Chennai, students need to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria in the first place. The selection criteria for this course is GATE (Non-GATE qualified students will be admitted based on academic records and interview performance). Candidates must pass BE/BTech (common eligibility).

faqs.question: What percentage is required for admission to M.Tech at Amrita School of Engineering, Chennai?
faqs.answer: To get into Amrita School of Engineering, Chennai for an M.Tech course, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. Students must pass BE/BTech (Electronics and Communication, Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering, Electrical and Electronics, Instrumentation and Control Engineering, Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering) and MSc Electronics. The course duration is two-years.

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for course admission at Amrita School of Engineering, Chennai?
faqs.answer: Yes, the selection criteria for BTech and M.Tech courses are entrance exam score. Candidates looking for course admission must complete the basic education as per courses. For the BTech course, candidates must complete Class 12 (common eligibility) and for M.Tech course admission, aspirants must complete BE/BTech (common eligibility). Students can also check the table below for more clarity to know the course-wise selection criteria at Amrita School of Engineering, Chennai:ourse NameSelection CriteriaBTechJEE Main,  AEEE + counsellingMTechGATE- Non-GATE qualified students will be admitted based on academic records and interview performance.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to various courses at Amrita School of Engineering, Chennai?
faqs.answer: Amrita School of Engineering, Chennai admissions are entrance-based. The institute considers national-level entrance exams for BTech and M.Tech courses, i.e., JEE Main or GATE as per respective courses. Admissions to Amrita School of Engineering, Chennai courses are based on entrance exam scores. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements for the respective courses. Selected candidates must keep their educational documents ready for verification purposes.

faqs.question: Is B.Tech available at Amrita School of Engineering, Chennai?
faqs.answer: Yes, the BTech course is available at Amrita School of Engineering. The university offers BTech courses at the UG level. Candidate must meet the eligibility criteria to enrol for BTech course admission set by the college. Aspirants must pass Class 12 or equivalent from a recognised board with at least 55% aggregate inPhysics, Chemistry & Mathematics separately and an aggregate minimum of 60% in Physics, Chemistry & Mathematics. The SE admission process is entrance-based.

faqs.question: Can I apply online for M.Tech admissions at Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham Chennai?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates seeking admission to Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham Chennai M.Tech courses can apply online via the university's online admission portal. Listed below are all the steps to be followed:1.Go to the official online admission portal.2.Click on the 'Apply Now' banner and fill out the registration form available on screen.3.Log in with credentials received in the email and fill out the application form.4.Pay the application fees.5.Preview and submit.

faqs.answer: Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham Chennai is considered hard to get especially for BTech course. labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Language Lab, Mechanical Lab, Physics Lab

reviews.review_heading: Teachers are friendly. AI students get real projects. A 7.5+ CGPA ensures great company placements.
reviews.review_text: The college experience was decent overall. The Wi-Fi was fast and reliable, making it easy to access resources. Labs were average, and functional but lacking advanced tools. The food, however, wasn’t to my taste as I prefer spicy Andhra-style dishes, and the Tamil Nadu cuisine felt bland.

reviews.review_heading: Thought the college was huge and a lot to explore, but it is a small campus of 13 acres.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college and labs are very good, but when it comes to the hostel, it is not as good as the classes and labs for 1st years. There are no common washrooms. We should clean our own rooms, which is good. But the hostels are far better than others I've seen in my intermediate.

reviews.review_heading: Bad because of faculty members, bad placements in 2024, bad infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The mess food is the worst as every day we get the sambhar to eat. Our labs are pretty well-maintained. The canteen is small. There is importance for sports, games, and extracurricular activities except yoga.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty and placements.
reviews.review_text: Amrita Chennai University is a new location in a village 60 km outside of the city, and they are taking a lot of time on infrastructure. The hostels are too bad; they didn't even clean the rooms. The warden told us to clean the room, only the bathrooms were cleaned. The food is average. We want to adjust, but there is no Zomato also.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are good but you can't experience a proper college life.
reviews.review_text: Faculty members are good but not great. Wi-Fi is provided, but it is restricted to many websites, like Netflix and Instagram. The food is the worst here. Sambar is provided daily, and the canteen food is sold at high prices. Hostel rules are bad. There are too many rules for girls; outside food is not allowed. Four members share a room.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the campus and good infrastructure. Good and friendly faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the campus is okay because it's a newly established campus. The new buildings are under construction. After completing, we can see excellent infrastructure with a peaceful environment. The faculty members are good and friendly. In the hostel, we have okay Wi-Fi speed due to full usage. The classrooms are good, the canteen is small, but the food is okay. The mess is also okay. Some days we should adjust.

reviews.review_heading: Great Learning Opportunities with Supportive Faculty and Active Campus Life.
reviews.review_text: Our department offers a variety of labs, Wi-Fi, modern classrooms, and a well-stocked library with all the necessary amenities. The hostel has a nice atmosphere with vegetarian mess and veg/non-veg options in the canteen. Medical facilities are available on campus, along with excellent sports and gaming facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Exceptional Placements, Top-Notch Faculty, and a Vibrant Campus Life at Amrita.
reviews.review_text: Each department, including Computer Science, has a minimum of three dedicated labs equipped with all the necessary resources. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and the classrooms are modern and well-maintained. The library provides a vast collection of books and e-resources for students. Hostels are separate for each academic year, with good medical facilities available on campus. The mess serves vegetarian food, while the canteen offers non-vegetarian options. The campus also has excellent sp...

reviews.review_heading: Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham- Chennai review .
reviews.review_text: Good. The food is okay, and sports are good. Hostels are good, but no AC. Separate washrooms are available for the seniors only in their third and fourth years. There are two canteens, a washing area to wash three clothes, and a basketball court and cricket ground.

reviews.review_heading: My opinion about my college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is somewhat difficult to adjust to as its taste is not that good and you have to move on, and the hostel rules are *. You'll fed up by hostel rules. Please choose a hostel if you want to join the college, and nearby, many PGs are available. Join them.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of size of campus, good faculty and below average placements in 2024
reviews.review_text:
1) Wi-Fi is slow in our college, as well as in our hostel.
2) The mess food is not tasty; they don't offer any special dishes, it's sambar and rasam every day.
3) The ground is very small; we can't even play cricket, but we need to play both football and cricket.
Positives:
1) The infrastructure of labs and classrooms is good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Amrita School of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The course infrastructure is good for people who already have some knowledge in programming, etc. Coming to hostel infrastructure, it is okay, not bad, but in summer it is very hot. There is a library which is okay and not good for people who will research more on anything; there are very limited sources.

reviews.review_heading: There are a few changes that need to be made in our college.
reviews.review_text: Our college is still under construction. They are building hostels and new blocks. The quality of the infrastructure is average. The hostel needs a good water facility and a nice infirmary because the it does not have an infirmary. The food is not up to the mark because it has no taste.

reviews.review_heading: My amrita : my right choice.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is okay. Wi-Fi facilities are appreciable. Classroom design is actually very good on our campus. Hostel facilities are also good, but there are some hazards in our hostel. There are some thieves in our hostel who steal our money. Recently, I lost 500 rupees.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, infrastructure and teaching .
reviews.review_text: The facility and infrastructure is good. Well established classrooms and Wi-Fi connection is there in the campus and the hostel. We huge library which is very good, hostel is very good there is no power cut water issue. Mess food is also good, there are very good paly grounds and games.

college_info.college_name: Amrita School of Engineering Chennai Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Amrita School of Engineering offers scholarships to meritorious students and also gives a range of scholarship waivers on the tuition fee to support students' education. All the students applying for admission are automatically considered for scholarships. The scholarships are awarded based on merit, economic need, equal opportunity, and affirmative actions for socially backward groups. Amrita School of Engineering Chennai scholarships are offered to students under the following criteria given below:

Amrita School of Engineering BTech students can apply for scholarships based on their merit. Admissions at Amrita School of Engineering Chennai are categorised into 2 categories, i.e. Scholarship and Non-Scholarship. Admission through scholarship is based on AEEE/JEE performance. Further, selection for the Non-Scholarship category is based on Class 12 marks in PCM (Physics, Chemistry & Maths) and one of the entrance examinations (AEEE/JEE) is mandatory to attend.

Apart from this, the college also offers scholarships to students seeking admission to international programmes. Amrita scholarships are offered to students according to their marks and admission interview performance. The criterion for Amrita scholarships is as follows:

college_info.intro:
Indian Institute of Information Technology Bhopal (IIIT Bhopal) extends a number of Engineering and Computer Science & Information Technology courses such as MTech, MCA, etc. with the IIIT Bhopal BTech being the flagship programme of the institute. This programme is highly sought-after among students for its career prospects and prestige with IIIT Bhopal being one of the top institutes for Engineering in the country.
The BTech course is offered under 9 specialisations allowing students to hone in on their preferred field with little detour. IIIT Bhopal aims to create an environment in which new ideas and research flourish and from which the leaders, innovators and IT-entrepreneurs of tomorrow emerge. college_info.college_name: IIIT Bhopal Fees 2026

fees_overview.description: Candidates can enroll for any of the IIIT Bhopal courses by paying the course fee. The fee for the available courses ranges from INR 4,14,000 - 8,64,000. The IIIT Bhopal fee is made up of a number of different elements, including the tuition, security deposit, and hostel fee. There are two types of IIIT Bhopal fee components: refundable and non-refundable. course_faqs.question: What is the total fee to pursue M.Tech at IIIT Bhopal?
course_faqs.answer: The total fees to pursue M.Tech at IIIT Bhopal iis a composition of many elements. Some of the prominent fee components are tuition fees, one-time deposits, etc. Apart from this, those who wish to reside on campus premises must also pay the hostel fees. The below table showcases a breakdown of the fee structure for M.Tech courses:Fee componentsAmount (for 2 years)TuitionINR 4.1 Lacs - INR 4.4 lakhHostelINR 1.86 Lacs - INR 2.77 lakhOne-time PaymentINR 18,840Total feeINR 7.23 Lacs - INR 8.41 lakhN

course_faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee for M.Tech programme at IIIT Bhopal?
course_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for M.Tech at IIIT Bhopal is INR 4.1 Lacs - INR 4.4 lakh. Candidates can pay fee via net banking, credit card, or debit card. The above fee is as per the official sources. It is subject to change.

overview_faqs.question: How many departments are there in IIIT Bhopal?
overview_faqs.answer: IIIT Bhopal has three departments, including Computer Science and Engineering, Information Technology and Electronics and Communication Engineering that collectively offer a full-time UGC-approved B.Tech programme. IIIT Bhopal admission is primarily entrance-based. The candidates are selected through national-level examinations conducted by different authorities. IIIT Bhopal was established in 2017, to encourage students to pursue higher education, research, and training across various fields of Information Technology.

overview_faqs.question: Is BTech free in IIIT Bhopal?
overview_faqs.answer: No, BTech programme isn't free at IIIT Bhopal. Candidates seeking to get admission are required to pay the tuition fee which ranges between INR 7.2 lakh, the fees excludes of Eamination Fee of Semester Registration Fee, Library Fee, Laboratory Fee, Internet Fee, etc. However IIIT Bhopal does have scholarship schemes for students. Students can visit the official website of NIT to apply for the scholarship. Refer to the IIIT Bhopal Scholarship page for more details

overview_faqs.question: What is the total course fee for B.Tech at IIIT Bhopal?
overview_faqs.answer: The total course fee for BTech at IIIT Bhopal is around INR 7.2 lakh. Total fee is calculated based on annual/ semester fee available for the academic year 2023-24, hence is indicative. Students can apply to State/Central government Scholarships. Along with the tuition fee, JEE Main application fee for BTech programme is also included. The application fee are INR 1,000 for boys and for girls, it is INR 800.

review_summary.college_name: IIIT Bhopal Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Physics and Computational Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The college with mixed reviews.

content.Placements: The percentage of placements is very good, and last year, 86% of students got placed with an average package of Rs. 1,800,000 and a median of Rs. 1,910,000, with the highest placement of 8.6 LPA. Additionally, 70-80% of students got internships last year with major companies like PayPal, Amazon, Meesho, and Flipkart.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are just okay. You can enjoy the hostel, but all hostels are only for 1 year. The Wi-Fi facilities are not good, but the classrooms are very good. We have 4 departments: CSE, ECE, Maths, and Physics. The mess food is not up to the mark sometimes, but sometimes it is delicious.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: College is under MANIT campus so placement is good but campus is not very cool enough.

content.Placements: The top packages are generally placed in ECE branch or CSE. 80-85% of IT students are placed (varies slightly year to year). The highest package is 30 LPA to 35 LPA. The lowest package is 5 LPA to 6 LPA. Average package is 14 LPA to 15 LPA. Overall, the highest offers can be higher, but the above figure reflects IT-specific outcome.
content.Infrastructure: Boys hostel is available only for 1st year, and it is very far from college. IIIT Bhopal does not currently have its own permanent hostel on a standalone campus. First-year students get hostel rooms at BHEL hostels near Bhopal, with college bus transport to academic blocks. Academic infrastructure is solid for coursework and projects. Residential facilities (hostel + mess) are adequate but not excellent. Permanent campus infrastructure is still under construction. Students often move to PGs after their first year for comfort.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Physics and Computational Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Review of IIIT Bhopal - Indian Institute of Information Technology.

content.Placements: The top recruiting companies are Amazon, PayPal, and the highest paying company is Atlassian, with the highest package of 85 LPA, and the average package is 17 LPA, with a minimum of 9 LPA. Approximately 85 percent of students got placed in good companies.
content.Infrastructure: We do not have a good Infrastructure in college. Hostels are taken from BHEL. The college campus is in MANIT, but IIIT is making a new campus of 65 acres. I think it will be completed by 2030, maybe 2027, for JEE Main students with campus and hostel facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Best IIIT for placements, scholarships, and facilities.

content.Placements: I am in my 3rd year now. Almost 50 students have been placed for an internship. Even I got a Visa internship, and the CP (Competitive Programming ) is the best for this college as it is an IIIT. The highest placement till now is 2.25 LPA, and the average is nearly 18 LPA for ECE and 22 LPA for CSE, which is less compared to the previous year.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is not so good in infrastructure, which is the reason many people don't prefer it, but it has good labs, library, and classrooms since it is a temporary college in NIT Bhopal, that's why not everything is good, but who needs a good building for good knowledge.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: IIIT Bhopal college review.

content.Placements: The placement scene is looking pretty good for IT students. We've got a solid average salary package of 14.7 LPA with big names like ServiceNow and Amazon coming in to recruit. The highest salary goes to four lucky students who snagged 34.4 LPA from PayPal for software development roles. 81 students landed jobs which gives us a placement rate of around 60 percent. I mean, it's not the best but considering the recession hitting colleges everywhere we're hoping things will bounce back. The lowest salary offered is 3.3 LPA, just to give you an idea.
content.Infrastructure: The campus infrastructure covers all the basic needs clean water, spacious science labs, an auditorium for events, a playground for sports, and a well-stocked library. The classrooms are tidy, and there's transportation and on-campus housing for students who need it. The mess is clean, and the food is decent a few more options would be nice.

admission_overview.title: IIIT Bhopal Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: The IIIT Bhopal admission 2025 form is available on the website. The institute accepts JEE Main scores for admission to BTech. IIIT Bhopal admission is primarily entrance-based. The candidates are selected through national-level examinations conducted by different authorities. Currently, IIIT Bhopal offers only one UG programme, BTech across three specialisations- CSE, ECE, and IT. Admissions at IIIT Bhopal are regulated through the Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA)/Central Seat Allocation Board (CSAB). Candidates must visit the official websites of these counselling bodies and apply through them for the IIIT Bhopal programme.

admission_process.title: IIIT Bhopal Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: IIIT Bhopal admission process 2025is a multi-step process which is conducted entirely online. The admission procedure for IIIT Bhopal is mentioned below:
Step 1: IIIT Bhopal Application Process

Candidates seeking admission at IIIT Bhopal are required to complete the application form for the course-specific entrance exam. After appearing for the respective entrance exams, candidates have to apply for the counselling process for the final seat allotment.
Step 2: Selection Rounds
For its flagship BTech course, IIIT Bhopal admits students with a valid JEE Main score. Candidates are allotted seats through JoSAA Counselling.
Step 3: Release of Cutoff list, Counselling & Admission Confirmation

The cutoff for BTech courses is released by the respective counselling bodies. The shortlisted candidates are then required to pay the admission fee to confirm their seats.Check IIIT Bhopal cutoff here.

IIIT Bhopal admission 2025is finalised with the payment of the course fee, which is inclusive of a one-time payment including caution money, identity card, etc. Also, candidates have to pay the application fee at the time of application form submission. Find below the fee for BTech at IIIT Bhopal:
