faqs.question: What are the factors that determine GATE cutoff for admission to M.Tech at IIIT Bhopal?
faqs.answer: IIIT Bhopal offers MTech courses based on GATE scores. The IIIT Bhopal cutoff 2024 has been concluded with the release of Round 7 across various All India categories. The cutoffs are subject to change based on a variety of factors, including the number of applicants, degree of difficulty, the question paper and goodwill of the institute, influence the cutoffs. Lets discuss all the factors influence the cutoffs:Total number of seats available:The cutoff primarily depends on the total number of seats available in medical colleges across the country for that particular year. If there are more seats, there are chances of lower cutoffs.Number of candidates appearing for the exam:The larger the number of candidates appearing for NEET, the higher the competition and the higher the cutoff scores. If the pool of students seeking admission are less for any institute then, it might affect its cutoff to decrease in future.Difficulty level of the question paper:If the question paper is perceived to

placement_data.title: IIIT Bhopal Placement Overview 2026
paragraphs: IIIT Bhopal placement data 2026 is released. The data is updated till Dec 2025 . As per the report, highest and average package received during IIIT Bhopal placements 2026 was INR 58 LPA and 19.92 LPA . The overall placement rate recorded in 2026 was 74.66%. 85.6% students received salary package above 18.23 LPA during the placement drive 2026.

During the placement drive 2025 , placement rate recorded in IT branch was 100% whereas in ECE and CSE branch , the placement percentage was 90% and 98.18%. The average package recorded in these three branch in 2025 was INR 12.66 LPA, 15.41 LPA and 19.18 LPA . The leading recruiters in recent past included Amazon, Microsoft, CISCO, CRED and Atlassian.

Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the IIIT Bhopal JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:
Important: Top IIITs Cutoff for JEE Main: Past Years Cutoff Ranks and Trends

In this section, candidates can view the last 8 years of IIIT Bhopal JEE Main cutoff ranks for various courses and categories by clicking on the download now links provided below to understand the past years' trends.

IIIT Bhopal JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the IIIT Bhopal CSE cutoff 2025 was 34325 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. For other core branch, such as ECE, the JEE Main last round closing ranks for admission was 59459, for the General category. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cutoff rank for admission.

For the General AI category students, the IIIT Bhopal B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 34325 and 72441 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 34325 and 35569, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at IIIT Bhopal. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. Students who appeared for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise JEE Main cutoff lists for BTech admission at IIIT Bhopal to understand the cutoff trends.

Tabulated below are the BTech specialisations available for admission based on the last round closing ranks of JEE Main. This will help students to make an informed decision to get the right college and specialisation for admission. The options below are available for students belonging to the General AI quota and are in the range of the most competitive BTech specialisation of IIIT Bhopal. To refine their searches, students can also use the provided filters.

As per the GATE cutoff 2025, the top two most challenging M.E./M.Tech specialisations were M.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and M.Tech. in Data Science with last round cutoff scores of 443 and 426, respectively, for the General AI quota. In the table below, candidates can view the branch-wise first and last round cutoff scores.

Tabulated below are the GATE CCMT last round cutoff scores for 2025, 2024 and 2023 across different rounds, categories and quotas. For the General AI quota, the last round cutoff scores varied between 389 and 443. While for the OBC category students, the final round cutoff scores were concluded between the range of 327 and 370 in the AI quota.

Tabulated below are the GATE cutoff lists across different rounds and years for ME/MTech admission at IIIT Bhopal - Indian Institute of Information Technology. The consolidated cutoff list will help students understand the past years cutoff trends.
According to the IIIT Bhopal MCA cutoff 2025, the General AI last round cutoff was 878. For the same category in 2024, the cutoff in the last round was 684.

Students should note that a higher numerical rank indicates lower competition and vice versa. Accordingly, the competition for the MCA course was highly competitive in 2024, with a last round cutoff being 684. hostel_campus.college_name: IIIT Bhopal Infrastructure Details & Reviews

facilities: Separate hostels for boys and girls

reviews.review_heading: The college with mixed reviews.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are just okay. You can enjoy the hostel, but all hostels are only for 1 year. The Wi-Fi facilities are not good, but the classrooms are very good. We have 4 departments: CSE, ECE, Maths, and Physics. The mess food is not up to the mark sometimes, but sometimes it is delicious.

reviews.review_heading: College is under MANIT campus so placement is good but campus is not very cool enough.
reviews.review_text: Boys hostel is available only for 1st year, and it is very far from college. IIIT Bhopal does not currently have its own permanent hostel on a standalone campus. First-year students get hostel rooms at BHEL hostels near Bhopal, with college bus transport to academic blocks. Academic infrastructure is solid for coursework and projects. Residential facilities (hostel + mess) are adequate but not excellent. Permanent campus infrastructure is still under construction. Students often move to PGs afte...

reviews.review_heading: Review of IIIT Bhopal - Indian Institute of Information Technology.
reviews.review_text: We do not have a good Infrastructure in college. Hostels are taken from BHEL. The college campus is in MANIT, but IIIT is making a new campus of 65 acres. I think it will be completed by 2030, maybe 2027, for JEE Main students with campus and hostel facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Best IIIT for placements, scholarships, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college is not so good in infrastructure, which is the reason many people don't prefer it, but it has good labs, library, and classrooms since it is a temporary college in NIT Bhopal, that's why not everything is good, but who needs a good building for good knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: IIIT Bhopal college review.
reviews.review_text: The campus infrastructure covers all the basic needs clean water, spacious science labs, an auditorium for events, a playground for sports, and a well-stocked library. The classrooms are tidy, and there's transportation and on-campus housing for students who need it. The mess is clean, and the food is decent a few more options would be nice.

reviews.review_heading: An underrated college with good placements.
reviews.review_text: The indian Institute of Technology Bhopal (IIT Bhopal) is located in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India. It includes contemporary campus with modern academic blocks, residential hostels for students, staff housing, and well equipped laboratories. The campus is designed to support teaching and research in a variety of engineering and science disciplines. Facilities include Wi-Fi-enabled lecture halls, smart classrooms, a central library, sports grounds, and dining/mess. Though detailed publicly availa...

reviews.review_heading: Good college for placements and Madhya Pradesh students.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available in the college are best because we have access to the library, sports complex, and others of MANIT Bhopal. The infrastructure of the hostel is not good, and you have to live in PG and rented rooms after 1 year. Mess food is good, and medical facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is very good, and all the facilities are available for the students, whether it is for studies, sports, or other activities. Wi-Fi is all over the campus, and a stocked library is present for the students. The quality of the mess is very good and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Indian Institute of Information Technology, Bhopal.
reviews.review_text: There are five air-conditioned laboratories with 150+ systems in each lab, all of which are in good condition. Also, 4 to 5 lab assistants and coders are appointed for every individual laboratory with all the facilities. Students are allowed to use all the resources available in the college without any distractions.

reviews.review_heading: IIIT Bhopal College Review.
reviews.review_text: The hostel, along with the mess, is run sufficiently. Classrooms have Wi-Fi, and the LAN can be accessed from the hostel rooms. Basically, you are able to get everything that you want on the university grounds. The classrooms are airy and equipped with projectors. There is a big stadium for cricket and football, apart from an indoor stadium for badminton.

reviews.review_heading: Not a value for money for MCA.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good with clean classroom, seminar halls, Wi-Fi, and spacious ground. Library, canteen, and sports facilities are common and contribute to overall student development. Campus is situated at MANIT Bhopal building and building name is NTB.

reviews.review_heading: Review of IIIT Bhopal - Indian Institute of Information Technology.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is looking very nice. College Wi-Fi is available 24 hours; labs are very advanced. Classrooms are also good, and the library is very big with all types of books. Hostel rooms are good. Mess food is average, but canteen food is good, and there are also good medical and sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: IIIT Bhopal is an institute of national importance with excellent placement records.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure for this course is excellent. They provide us with the best for getting placed in excellent companies. Talking about hostel, they are average, neither very good nor very bad. There are three hostels, RGPV, BHEL, and NITTTR. NITTTR is the closest in terms of distance, but it is the worst out of these three. BHEL and RGPV are approximately at equal distance from the college, and both are decent.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good. Placements are still ongoing.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure provided for our course is good. We have access to labs equipped with computers and high-speed internet. The Wi-Fi speed in college is good. If you want to use a library, you can access the Manit library, as our college doesn't have one. Hostel facilities are available only for the first semester.

reviews.review_heading: Disappointed after taking admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: There is no campus in the college. Classrooms are in very bad condition, and there are no ACs even after paying a huge amount of fees. Even the fans do not work properly. There is no library in the college. The Wi-Fi connection is very poor. There are no sports facilities provided due to the lack of a campus. The food in the mess is just okay.

college_info.college_name: IIIT Bhopal Scholarship Details

paragraphs: IIIT Bhopal offers various UG and PG level programmes with the fee structure consisting of tuition fees, hostel fees and various other miscellaneous fees. IIIT Bhopal BTech fee structure comprises of a tuition fees of INR 8.64 Lakh for the duration of 4 year. Apart from this, the course involves hostel fees and one-time payments which in total costs a BTech course of INR 12.50 Lakh. Similarly, programmes such as MTech costs the tuition fees of INR 4.1 Lakh- INR 4.4 Lakh. Furthermore, a programme such as MCA is offered at the tuition fees of INR 6.6 Lakh.

The total course fee for BTech at IIIT Bhopal is around INR 7.2 lakh. Total fee is calculated based on annual/ semester fee available for the academic year 2023-24, hence is indicative. Students can apply to State/Central government Scholarships. Along with the tuition fee, JEE Main application fee for BTech programme is also included. The application fee are  INR 1,000 for boys and for girls, it is INR 800.

No, BTech programme isn't free at IIIT Bhopal. Candidates seeking to get admission are required to pay the tuition fee which ranges between INR 7.2 lakh, the fees excludes of Eamination Fee of Semester Registration Fee,  Library Fee,  Laboratory Fee, Internet Fee, etc. However IIIT Bhopal does have scholarship schemes for students. Students can visit the official website of NIT to apply for the scholarship. Refer to the IIIT Bhopal Scholarship page for more details

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, RVITM Bangalore accepts COMEDK scores for admission to BE programme. However, candidates can also get selected for BE based on their score in KCET. COMEDK is a national-level entrance exam conducted once in a year in Computer-based mode. The exam is usually conducted in May every year. In 2024, COMEDK cutoff for RVITM Bangalore BE was 14477 for CSE and 22853 for ECE. The ranks are not very competitive. reviews_list.review_title: Review about RVITM College, Bengaluru.

review_content.Placements: 60% of students get average placements. The top recruiting company is JP Morgan. An average number of students get placed successfully. Philips, PhonePe, Oracle, and Cisco also visit our campus. Other courses offered are Computer Science and Mechanical Engineering.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not really good. It is only a one-building college with not enough lifts and limited facilities. The hostel is not worth the money you pay, we even moved out after one year. The fee increase every two years. The food is not that great, and there is a lot of favoritism towards South Indian students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely dissatisfied with it. It provided good placements for the 2021-2024 batch.

review_content.Placements: I am from the 2021-2024 batch. Students who get placed are above 50%. Top courses are BBA, B.Com, BAC, and MS. The salary offered in BBA is Rs. 49,000 per month and in B.Com, it is Rs. 51,000 per month. The highest package is offered to students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Library, classrooms, labs, and Wi-Fi are available. The hostel is not there. The quality of facilities is not much. Sports and games are there. Food is good, and it provides quality food. Facilities available for students are good. There is a junior college and a seniors college 2 kilometers away. There is AC and a projector in classrooms. There is a lift also.

The hostel facility is good and the rooms are two sharing rooms. Food quality is good.

overview_faqs.question: How much does BE at RVITM Bangalore cost?
overview_faqs.answer: Some of the components included in the fee structure for RV Institute of Technology and Management courses are tuition fees, caution money, hostel fees, etc. The total tuition fees for the BE courses range from INR 8.1 Lacs to INR 11.3 lakh. Hence, the fee varies based on the chosen course specialisation. Candidates further must note that the given fee details are as per the official website/ sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

review_summary.college_name: RVITM Bangalore Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Supportive teachers, decent infrastructure, and better placement opportunities.

content.Placements: Around 70% of ISE students at RVITM got placed in 2025. The highest package was 26-29 LPA, the lowest about 4.5 LPA, and the average around 10-11 LPA. Top recruiters included Amazon, Deutsche Bank, JP Morgan, Wipro, Tata Motors, PayPal, Cisco, Flipkart, Walmart, and Oracle. About 70-80% of students secured internships at major firms like Cisco and Flipkart, with a stipend of up to 30K per month. Common roles offered were Software Engineer, Analyst, Graduate Engineer Trainee, Supply Chain Engineer, Trainee Analyst, and Data Scientist.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Excellent infrastructure, supportive faculty, and a great learning environment.

content.Placements: I am currently pursuing BE (CSE) from the 2023-27 batch at RVITM. College has excellent infrastructure, supportive faculty, and good learning opportunities. Placements are improving with top companies like Amazon, Oracle, Google, Microsoft, and many are visiting here. Students also get internship opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: Our course has good infrastructure with Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, classrooms, and a library that provides both physical and digital resources. There are adequate sports and recreational facilities that allow students to engage in games and fitness activities.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review about RVITM College, Bengaluru.

content.Placements: 60% of students get average placements. The top recruiting company is JP Morgan. An average number of students get placed successfully. Philips, PhonePe, Oracle, and Cisco also visit our campus. Other courses offered are Computer Science and Mechanical Engineering.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not really good. It is only a one-building college with not enough lifts and limited facilities. The hostel is not worth the money you pay, we even moved out after one year. The fee increase every two years. The food is not that great, and there is a lot of favoritism towards South Indian students.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely dissatisfied with it. It provided good placements for the 2021-2024 batch.

content.Placements: I am from the 2021-2024 batch. Students who get placed are above 50%. Top courses are BBA, B.Com, BAC, and MS. The salary offered in BBA is Rs. 49,000 per month and in B.Com, it is Rs. 51,000 per month. The highest package is offered to students.
content.Infrastructure: Library, classrooms, labs, and Wi-Fi are available. The hostel is not there. The quality of facilities is not much. Sports and games are there. Food is good, and it provides quality food. Facilities available for students are good. There is a junior college and a seniors college 2 kilometers away. There is AC and a projector in classrooms. There is a lift also.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Average placements with below average college life, join if you are interested in RV brand.

content.Placements: RVITM placements are combined with RV College of Engineering. Don't expect huge packages: 60-70% placement percentage with an average package of 8-9 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Qualcomm, Philips, PhonePe, Oracle, and Amazon. The highest package is 29 LPA, the lowest 2.5 LPA. Top roles offered are Hardware Engineer, Software Engineer, and Software Intern.
content.Infrastructure: There is only one single building; no big campus. Classrooms and labs are good. There is a library, but resources are limited. Wi-Fi in college is poor. Hostel rooms are good, but the fee is high, and only vegetarian food is served. There are no big grounds to play on, just a cricket turf and basketball court.

admission_overview.college_name: RVITM Bangalore Admission 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Selection Process & Dates

admission_process.title: RVITM Bangalore Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: RVITM admissionsare entrance-based. The institute considers scores in entrance exams such as COMEDK UGET, Karnataka PGCET, KCET, etc. for admission to specific courses.RVITM Bangaloreoffers BE at the UG and MCA at the PG level. The institute offers courses in affiliation withVisvesvaraya Technological University (VTU) Belagavi. Candidates can get admission at RVITM under the Government and Management Quota. Interested candidates can apply for the accepted entrance exam for admission in the institute.

The institute offers admission to BE and MCA programmes based on national or state-level entrance exams. Aspirants seeking admission under the Management Quota also need to pass the accepted exam for admission. Besides, aspirants have to fulfill the eligibility requirements for the preferred course. The basic eligibility for BE is Class 12 and graduation is required to apply for MCA. Below areRVITM Bangalore coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
BCA/ Bachelor's degree in CSE or equivalent degree or,

Passed BSc/ BCom/ BA with Mathematics at Class 12 or at the graduation level with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for candidates belonging to reserved category, applies to only Karnataka State Students)
Class 10 with Science andMathematicsas subjects with at least 70% aggregate
Class 11 with Physics and Mathematics as subjects with at least 60% aggregate
Class 12 with at least 60% in Physics and Mathematics separately
*The eligibility and selection mentioned for MCA is same for Management Quota as well.
Download:RVITM Bangalore Brochure

The total fee of RVITM includes various components such as caution deposit, exam fee, tuition fee, etc. Once the selection process is over, candidates have to pay the course fee to confirm their seat. The Management Quota fee also includes a miscellaneous fee that must be paid annually. Below is theRVITM Bangalore feeand intake for all courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

RVITM offers admission to candidates under the Government and Management Quota. Aspirants have to meet the requirements specific to their mode of admission. Below are the steps to get a seat at RVITM:
Step 1: RVITM Bangalore Application Process 2025

Candidates have to first apply and appear for any of the accepted entrance exams for admission. Once the entrance test is over, aspirants need to register on the official website of KEA for counselling.

Aspirants applying for admission under the Management Quota need to send the scanned documents in PDF format of Class 10, Class 12 and all degree marksheet (if required) along with their mobile number to the admission email id mentioned on the official website of RVITM.
Step 2: Selection

Candidates need to appear for COMEDK or KCET for BE and KMAT or Karnataka PGCET for MCA programmes. For admission under Management Quota, aspirants can also apply for BE with a valid score in COMEDK or JEE.
Step 3: Counselling & Seat Allotment

Once the results are out, aspirants need to apply for KEA Counselling. Once the candidates receive an allotment order from KEA, they need to report at the campus of RVITM with original documents for verification. Below are some of the documents required at the time of final admission:

headings.text: Steps for RVITM Bangalore Admission Process 2025

lists: Original admission order issued by KEA
Class 10 and Class 12 original marksheet
Original first to sixth semester degree marksheets (for MCA)
Transfer Certificate
Student who have studied outside Karnataka need to submit Migration Certificate
Photocopy of student Aadhaar Card, etc.

courses_data.description: RVITM Bangalore offers a four-year BE programme divided into eight semesters. The institute offers BE in three specialisations, namelyComputer Science and Engineering, CSE-AI & ML andElectronics & Communication Engineering. Besides, the institute also offers lateral entry to the BE programmes. Admission to the BE courses is based on KCET or COMEDK scores. Candidates who have completed PUC or an equivalent with at least 45% aggregate and 60% subject-wise grade in Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics are eligible to apply for BE. Candidates can also get admission in BE under the Management Quota.

faqs.question: Does RVITM Bangalore offer lateral entry to BE?
faqs.answer: Yes, RV Institute of Technology and Management offer direct admission to the third semester of BE programme. Aspirants who have completed Diploma are eligible to get lateral entry to the BE course. Candidates should also pass the DCET or Diploma Common Entrance Test conducted by KEA for admission.

faqs.question: Is PCM required to apply for BE at RVITM Bangalore?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates must pass PUC or an equivalent with at least 45% aggregate and 60% subject-wise grade in Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics to apply for BE programme at RV Institute of Technology and Management. Aspirants should hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

faqs.question: Which are the BE specialisations offered at RVITM Bangalore?
faqs.answer: RV Institute of Technology and Management offers a four-year BE programme spread across eight semesters. Candidates who have completed PUC or equivalent qualification can apply for BE. Below are the BE specialisations offered at RVITM:Computer Science & EngineeringCSE-AI & MLElectronics & Communication Engineering

courses_data.name: RVITM Bangalore MCA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: RVITM Bangalore offers a two-year MCA programme at the PG level. The course is divided into four semesters. The institute offers admission to 120 seats in the MCA programme based on KMAT or Karnataka PGCET scores of the candidates. Those who have completed BCA/ bachelor's degree in CSE or equivalent degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate are eligible to apply for the MCA programme.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MCA at RVITM Bangalore?
faqs.answer: Aspirants who have completed BCA/ Bachelor's degree in CSE or equivalent degree or passed BSc/ BCom/ BA with Mathematics at Class 12 or at the graduation level with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for candidates belonging to reserved category, applies to only Karnataka State Students) are eligible to apply for MCA at RV Institute of Technology and Management.

faqs.question: How much is the fee for MCA at RVITM Bangalore?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for MCA at RV Institute of Technology and Management isINR 4 lakh. The total fee includes various components such as tuition fee, caution deposit, exam fee, etc. The fee for Management Quota is different. Aspirants have to pay the course fee at the time of admission in the form of DD to confirm their seat.

faqs.question: What documents do I need for MCA admission at RVITM Bangalore?
faqs.answer: Candidates who are selected for admission to MCA programme at RV Institute of Technology and Management have to report at th campus for document verification. Below are the documents required at the time of admission:PGCET rank sheet or KMAT score cardOriginal Class 10 and Class 12 marksheetOriginal 1st to 6th semester degree marksheetOriginal provisional degree certificateOriginal Transfer CertificateCaste Certificate (if allotted under PGCET caste category)Migration Certificate (for students o

faqs.question: What are the cutoff marks for RVITM Bangalore?
faqs.answer: R V Institute of Technology and Management KCET cutoff 2023 has been released for several BTech specializations.As per the R V Institute of Technology and Management KCET cutoff 2023, the Round 1 and the Last Round closing ranks for B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering were 7076 and 8655, respectively, for the General All India category.

faqs.question: How can I get a seat in RVITM Bangalore?
faqs.answer: RV Institute of Technology and Management Bangalore offers seats to candidates based on their entrance exam scores. Candidates can get admission under Government Quota or Management Quota. The institute selects candidates for BE programme based on their KCET or COMEDK score. For MCA, aspirants must have a valid score in KMAT or Karnataka PGCET. Once the aspirants have passed the entrance exam, they need to participate in KEA Counselling for seat allotment. Once selected, aspirants have to pay the course fee to confirm their seat.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at RVITM Bangalore?
faqs.answer: Candidates have to pass an entrance exam for admission at RV Institute of Technology and Management. The institute considers KCET or COMEDK UGET scores for BE and KMAT or Karnakata PGCET for MCA. Aspirants seeking admission under the Management Quota also need to have score in the accepted entrance exams for admission. The eligibility criteria varies for the Management Quota students. Hence, the institute offers direct admission to candidates with a valid score in the accepted entrance exam under Management Quota.

faqs.question: Can I get admission at RVITM Bangalore without KMAT?
faqs.answer: The answer to this question depends on the course applied by the candidates. RV Institute of Technology and Management considers KMAT scores for admission to MCA programme. However, it is not mandatory to have a KMAT score. Aspirants can also get a seat in MCA with a valid score in Karnataka PGCET. KMAT is a state-level entrance exam conducted once in a year in online mode for two hours.

faqs.question: Does RVITM Bangalore accept COMEDK?
faqs.answer: Yes, RVITM Bangalore accepts COMEDK scores for admission to BE programme. However, candidates can also get selected for BE based on their score in KCET. COMEDK is a national-level entrance exam conducted once in a year in Computer-based mode. The exam is usually conducted in May every year.In 2024, COMEDK cutoff for RVITM Bangalore BE was 14477 for CSE and 22853 for ECE. The ranks are not very competitive. Hence, aspirants can get admission with a decent rank in COMEDK.

reviews.review_heading: Supportive teachers, decent infrastructure, and better placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: There is good Wi-Fi, working labs, well-ventilated classrooms with recorded lessons, and the library has a wide variety of academic books. Since I'm not from a hostel. I wouldn't say too much about it. It is very good regarding facilities, but okay in the food available in the mess and canteen. Nice sports, games and also have NSS and NCC.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent infrastructure, supportive faculty, and a great learning environment.
reviews.review_text: Our course has good infrastructure with Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, classrooms, and a library that provides both physical and digital resources. There are adequate sports and recreational facilities that allow students to engage in games and fitness activities.

reviews.review_heading: Review about RVITM College, Bengaluru.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not really good. It is only a one-building college with not enough lifts and limited facilities. The hostel is not worth the money you pay, we even moved out after one year. The fee increase every two years. The food is not that great, and there is a lot of favoritism towards South Indian students.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied with it. It provided good placements for the 2021-2024 batch.
reviews.review_text: Library, classrooms, labs, and Wi-Fi are available. The hostel is not there. The quality of facilities is not much. Sports and games are there. Food is good, and it provides quality food. Facilities available for students are good. There is a junior college and a seniors college 2 kilometers away. There is AC and a projector in classrooms. There is a lift also.

reviews.review_heading: Average placements with below average college life, join if you are interested in RV brand.
reviews.review_text: There is only one single building; no big campus. Classrooms and labs are good. There is a library, but resources are limited. Wi-Fi in college is poor. Hostel rooms are good, but the fee is high, and only vegetarian food is served. There are no big grounds to play on, just a cricket turf and basketball court.

reviews.review_heading: A review of the college, faculty members, and environment in which I have completed my 2 years.
reviews.review_text: Department has all facilities for students to excel and all books which are required for the course and also for extra topics which student wants to learn more about. Since I am not living in the hostel, I can't say much about it, but my friends say it is okay to stay there.

reviews.review_heading: Pretty satisfactory with the peaceful atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: The students of RVITM are provided with good Wi-Fi with relatively high speeds. The canteen is located in the basement. It has a pretty big eating area and provides tables for the consumers. The menu has a variety of foods. Apart from the normal foods, many snacks are also sold.

reviews.review_heading: Review of R V Institute of Technology and Management.
reviews.review_text:
There were very highly prepared classrooms with advanced technology and the labs are also excellent and the library is too much good I have ever seen. 
They provide the facilities not free, some cost is there, the hostel is very good, the rooms are also better, and mainly the food is very nice; it tastes like home-made food. Overall, it is excellent .

reviews.review_heading: Faculty is good, bad placements for 2025, campus crowd is good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available throughout the college but it's not as strong. Labs are well maintained and equipped with necessary equipment. Library is good with access to many academic books. There's a good number of classrooms to accommodate all the students with a smart board along with a normal chalk board. There's also a lecture recording facility where recorded lectures are posted on the app for students to access throughout the semester. There's a canteen in the basement which is okay overall. Serve...

reviews.review_heading: Moderate placement success with opportunities for improvement.
reviews.review_text: We have good lab facilities. There are software skill labs like Matlab which many colleges do not have. The lab instructors are equally qualified as our professors in the aspects of the lab. The college hostel charges about Rs. 1,68,000 for one academic year. We have bus facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Our college infrastructure may be small, but the knowledge we get inside is as large as the Amazon.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our college are very good. There is a very fast Wi-Fi connection. Labs are maintained exceptionally. And the lab instructors are very knowledgeable. Cascadi heard that even the hostel facility is awesome. I don't stay in the hostel, so I don't know much about it. There are also good ground medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Really great college. Excellent faculty. Great atmosphere. Good placements. Good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college has good parking space both for students and teachers. The building is equipped with elevators. The college has a good canteen and a stationary shop. The college has a well-built auditorium. The hostel is 5 minutes away from the campus. The rooms in the hostel have attached washrooms. We have both washing machines in the hostel and laundry service. The food is good. The students conduct a meeting once in a while to discuss the food menu. The hostel serves only vegetarian food, but no...

reviews.review_heading: The best college is RV forever.
reviews.review_text: Our course has many facilities. In our college, we have Wi-Fi facilities and good washrooms. Labs in the college classrooms are clean, and canteen food is good. We have a large library. We also have hostel facilities, including games and good food in the mess. Many games are available.

reviews.review_heading: Best college and great value for money.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and campus life are decent, and you can enjoy it. The hostel is off-campus, about 1.5 km from the college, and there is a bus for travel, but the food and all are not that good at the hostel. There are PGs near the college, and the students are adjusted.

reviews.review_heading: Very good college; professors are nice; the hostel is around 1 km from the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is amazing; every class has a smartboard facility and online learning support. The library has enormous books, journals, and research papers. Labs are sophisticated here, and lab attendees are supportive. The campus is just 3 acres but has all the facilities like a gym, canteen, and interaction area inside the campus.

reviews_list.review_title: It's a good college, best campus.

review_content.Placements: 85 percent of students got placements in companies like Dr. Reddy, Cipla, Sun Pharma, etc. Packages range from 3 LPA to 7 LPA. 70 to 80 percent of students got internships. Basically, top roles after B.Pharma include options like drug inspector, medical and pharmaceutical analyst, and many more.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is everywhere and very fast. Digital classrooms are available, and some non-AC classrooms are also there. According to hostelers, food is good in both boys’ and girls’ hostels. Medical facilities are available. Sports facilities are good, and clubs are also well managed.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Good college but Visakhapatnam college is better.

review_content.Placements: We got internship opportunities from our professors and HOD. I have done an internship in elevate labs which was online where I did tasks that needed python, SQL, and blue skills. I have done a project related to all these skills. In the 5th semester, the eligibility for campus placement requires 0 backlogs. Verizon was one company that was visited in my course. The highest package was 6 LPA, and average package was 4 LPA. Almost 60 to 70% of the students got the placements. I would like to pursue a master's degree after my degree.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel was good. There were four people in a room where you get your own bed, wardrobe, table, and chair. The meal quality was good, and you had it almost every day. You had a different menu. Wi-Fi was all over the campus. Library was good, and all types of books were available. There was also an e-library. Classrooms were spacious and digitally updated. Labs were spacious and had centralized AC.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It has great infrastructure and an average faculty. Placements are improving.

content.Placements: Placement rate is good. The highest package offered is 15 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 3.2 LPA. The average package offered ranges from 4.5-5 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Google, Amazon, Cognizant, etc., hire students. The top role offered is HR. Our college provides internship programs and hackathons to participate in, which will be helpful for students.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms. Good quality of facilities is provided, but it can be better in terms of food. The hostel food is not as good as it should be. It provides everything, but the taste of the food is not good. We can eat it. The college conducts sports events.

For good students, many internship programs are available through the campus. If we do well in internships, we will get a good placement at the end of the course.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities available in the classrooms are basic. Some of them have air-conditioners, and some of them just have normal fans. As it is a private university, we have to pay for the luxury, and the same happens in the hostel. However, everything is well-maintained and clean.

admission_process.title: GITAM University Hyderabad Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: GITAM University Hyderabad admission process 2026 is done systematically and consists of multiple stages. Each of these steps is broken down below:
STEP 1: GITAM School of Technology, Hyderabad Application Process 2026.

All the potential candidates desiring to be admitted to GITAM Hyderabad should commence with the online application. Applications to the institution are made on its official site. It is also the responsibility of applicants to ensure that they take their applications and pay the necessary application fee in time.
STEP 2: Screening and shortlisting of applications.

The university admits to the courses of Btech, BPharm, BA, BSc using different entrance exam scores, which include GAT, AP EAMCET, CAT, CUET, among others. Post selection requirements, students are required to go to the university campus to undergo the counselling process. It also takes into consideration the academic performance of the candidates to be selected.
STEP 3: Confirmation of Admission.

Once the group interview and personal interview sessions are complete, the institution shall inform the shortlisted candidates about their position in the institution. In this message, he or she will usually transmit it through email or other suitable channels. The selected candidates will need to pay the first instalment of the GITAM University Hyderabad fee before the stipulated deadline in order to be assured of their admission. This action makes them sure that they have a seat in the programme.

courses_data.description: GITAM University Hyderabad MBA admission is ongoing on its official site. The university has an MBA with a duration of 2 yrs in a full-time mode. To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to meet the requirement set by the university. GITAM Hyderabad accepts various entrance test scores which include ITAM Business Aptitude Test (GBAT), CAT, MAT, NMAT, CMAT, SNAP, or AP/TG ICET test scores. To grab the seat candidates must have a valid score in one entrance exam accepted and conducted by the university. Further, candidates are also required to fulfil the basic eligibility i.e. pass a graduation degree with 60% aggregate from a recognised board. Check out the following information to know the eligibility, accepted entrance exam, fee and seats of theGITAM University Hyderabad MBAprogramme:

faqs.question: What percentage is required for admission to MBA at GITAM University Hyderabad?
faqs.answer: To get into GITAM University Hyderabad for a MBA course, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. Candidates must pass Graduation with a minimum of 60% aggregate. GITAM University Hyderabad offers full-time MBA courses of two years' duration. Candidates can get into this course based on a valid GITAM Business Aptitude Test (GBAT), CAT, MAT, NMAT, CMAT, SNAP, or AP/TG ICET entrance exam score, followed by GDPI round.

faqs.question: Is MBA available at GITAM University Hyderabad?
faqs.answer: Yes, MBA is available at GITAM University Hyderabad. The university offers entrance-based admission and has a total of 180 seats. Candidates seeking admission to MBA must have a Bachelor's degree in relevant discipline with 60% aggreagte from a recognised university. Further, candidates must appear and score well in the one exam such as GBAT/ CAT/ MAT/ NMAT/ CMAT/ SNAP/ AP/TG ICET, followed by GDPI round.

faqs.question: How to get admission in GITAM School of Technology Hyderabad?

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in GITAM University Hyderabad?
faqs.answer: GITAM University Hyderabad admissions is entrance-based. Candidates are required to fulfil the eligibility criteria and clear the entrance exam for admisison. Admission is through the university entrance exam and the college also accepts various entrance exam score, such as NEET, JEE Main, TS EAMCET and others. To get admisison, candidates are also required to visit the university official website to fill out the online application form.

faqs.question: Which entrance exams are accepted by GITAM School of Technology Hyderabad?
faqs.answer: GITAM School of Technology Hyderabad offers UG and PG courses across various streams such as Science, Engineering, Management, and others. GITAM School of Technology conducts its entrance exams such as the GITAM Admission Test (GAT). The school accepts national-level entrance exams like TS EAMCET, JEE Main, CUET, JEE Advanced, UCEED, MAT, CAT, GATE, and others.

faqs.question: What is the course fee of B.Tech at GITAM School of Technology Hyderabad?

The library, cafeteria, recreation and study rooms, 24/7 campus-wide connectivity, hostels, auditorium, research centers, laboratories, hospital/medical services, banking services in close proximity to the campus, and other amenities are available.

sports.description: GITAM Hyderabad has indoor and outdoor sports facilities. The outdoor facilities include a Cricket Ground, Football Turf, Tennis Court, Basketball Court, Volleyball, Athletic Track and Net Practice Zones. The indoor facilities include Table Tennis, Badminton, Chess, Carrom, and Gymnasium. Ground:

reviews.review_heading: It has great infrastructure and an average faculty. Placements are improving.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms. Good quality of facilities is provided, but it can be better in terms of food. The hostel food is not as good as it should be. It provides everything, but the taste of the food is not good. We can eat it. The college conducts sports events.

reviews.review_heading: It offers a good environment and quality education. It is a bit expensive.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available in the classrooms are basic. Some of them have air-conditioners, and some of them just have normal fans. As it is a private university, we have to pay for the luxury, and the same happens in the hostel. However, everything is well-maintained and clean.

reviews.review_heading: It's a good college, best campus.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is everywhere and very fast. Digital classrooms are available, and some non-AC classrooms are also there. According to hostelers, food is good in both boys’ and girls’ hostels. Medical facilities are available. Sports facilities are good, and clubs are also well managed.

reviews.review_heading: Good college but Visakhapatnam college is better.
reviews.review_text: Hostel was good. There were four people in a room where you get your own bed, wardrobe, table, and chair. The meal quality was good, and you had it almost every day. You had a different menu. Wi-Fi was all over the campus. Library was good, and all types of books were available. There was also an e-library. Classrooms were spacious and digitally updated. Labs were spacious and had centralized AC.

reviews.review_heading: It is good on campus because of greenery and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Hostel food is really nice, and its hospitality is also nice. According to security purpose, it is really good for girls. Sports are also there, we can play badminton, hockey, cricket, etc. In hostel, there are carrom, chess, and gym facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: It has very good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure available here is far better compared to other universities. Here, the rooms are neatly maintained with workers cleaning every day. All the classrooms, library, mess, and all are maintained with air conditioning and everyday cleaning.

reviews.review_heading: GITAM has a holistic kind of environment where students can study stress free.
reviews.review_text: There are good facilities available in our campus, including Wi-Fi, computer labs, Library, playgrounds, and clubs. The facilities at the hostel are too good, including sports facilities, a gym, a medical room, a hostel library, and nicely furnished rooms. The quality of food is good in our hostel canteens.

reviews.review_heading: 2025 GITAM Hyderabad CSE review.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus, AC classrooms for university courses, and a vast library with thousands of books available for reading.  The hostel is good, but a little on the expensive side. The food is good in college hostels compared to other colleges. Canteen food is also delicious. A sports ground is available for playing.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied, really good infrastructure with well-maintained equipment.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in my college are really good and well-maintained. We are provided with all the required things for our course. We have well-working Wi-Fi, AC classrooms with projectors, AI, and 360 degree cameras for better monitoring of students. The food in our college is the best. We have many varieties of food, and they are hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Review of GITAM University, Hyderabad.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. All department course infrastructure is good. The college provides Wi-Fi 24 hours a day. Labs are advanced. Classrooms are good. The library is very big and has all types of books. The hostel is good. Food is decent. In college, there are 3 canteens. Good facilities for medical and sports.

reviews.review_heading: Balanced experience: Decent teaching, good events, and scope for industry upgrades.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is quite good. We have well-equipped labs, reliable Wi-Fi, clean classrooms, and library with good collection of books. Hostel rooms are neat and maintained regularly. Mess food has variety dishes with good taste. Sports facilities include a box cricket, indoor games. Basic medical help is available all time.

reviews.review_heading: All over good faculty members, average placements, good infrastructure, and bad food in hostel.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is good. Labs are fabulous. Classrooms are good, few are AC and few are non-AC. Wi-Fi is the issue nearby. Hostel is worse. Non taste food, common washrooms, no games, and medical is okay. The mess and canteen should improve a lot.

reviews.review_heading: My review of GITAM Hyderabad.
reviews.review_text: All classrooms are well-equipped with Wi-Fi routers, projectors, and smart CCTV cameras with AI detection technology to detect cheating in exams. The library is 3-floored and has almost everything we will need for our studies. It also has a separate workplace for digital work. The hostel is a bit expensive but good. It is comfortable with regular cleaning and attentive staff members. Mess food is relatively much better than other private colleges with delicious and a vast variety of meals. Howev...

reviews.review_heading: GITAM- A quick review based on my personal experience.
reviews.review_text: Great labs and well-maintained classrooms. The cafeteria serves good food. The sports areas are impressive with plenty of space and proper equipment. Overall, the campus infrastructure is solid and supports academics and extracurricular activities really well.

reviews.review_heading: A little bit satisfied because of good faculty members and placements in 2024.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is very nice. Classrooms are good. Labs are average. The hostel food is worth paying hostel fees. My college hostel has 3 blocks like A, B, and C. The food in the mess and canteen is good. Our college provides medical facilities, sports, and games.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: If you are not able to pay high fees, then you should definitely take admission in this college.

review_content.Placements: In the last 2 years, 70% of students are placed from the college. The highest package is 22 LPA. Many companies come to recruit students from our college, including Tata Consultancy Services (TCS), Infosys, IBM, Tech Mahindra, Capgemini, L&T Infotech, TatvaSoft, and Cognizant. The most common roles offered to students, particularly those in IT and Computer Engineering, include Software Engineer, Data Analyst, Web Developer, and other similar profiles.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is good infrastructure according to fees because it is a government college. This year, all new computers are added in the college. The Computer Engineering Department at VGEC is well-equipped to support the academic curriculum and practical training of students. This lab is specifically designed with high-end computers and networking software like Wireshark and Packet Tracer for hands-on experience in networking.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: College is decent and good. Placement is good. The only problem is not tech fest or anything.

review_content.Placements: Mostly, the students preparing for web development get placed easily in our college. 4 LPA is the average package offered by companies. By the end of the 4th year, 99.99% of students in my course, which is computer engineering, get placed in companies, and our placement portal is also good.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our lab has Wi-Fi and AC, and the library also has lots of books. The hostel is also good, and the food is decent, but the only problem is the water issue, which we face in the hostel many times. Other classes also have projectors. Our college definitely needs a good canteen.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information and Communication Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good academics and infrastructure with decent placements, industry readiness depends on self effort.

content.Placements: Some reports and student reviews suggest placements vary between 60 to 80 percent, depending on the branch. The highest package offered is 22 LPA. Typically, the lowest packages offered are 2.5 to 3 LPA, average package lies around 4 to 5 LPA. TCS, Tech Mahindra, and TatvaSoft Internship ratio: Approximately 50 to 80 percent of students secure internships either through campus drives or independently. Common internship companies include Infosys, Adani, TCS, Torrent Power, Reliance and other tech firms.
content.Infrastructure: Vishwakarma Government Engineering College (VGEC), Ahmedabad has academic blocks, library Computer laboratories. Practical sessions and Mini and major projects are offered. Research and experimentation opportunities are provided. Spacious and well-ventilated classrooms equipped with projectors, whiteboards, and audio systems in many rooms. A large collection of textbooks, reference books, and journals. Access to e resources, e books and digital journals. Reading rooms with a quiet study environment.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and great teachers are available.

content.Placements: 90 per cent of students get placed in the college, the numbers can be fewer or more, it depends. The highest package is around 10 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. Top companies like Tatvasoft, Argusoft, and Simform recruit. There are various roles that can be offered depending on your own skills.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi are in all the departments. In the library, there is Wi-Fi. In the hostel, there is a LAN that can be connected to through a laptop. Classrooms are good with great infrastructure. The quality of food in the hostel is not so good. I won't recommend eating from there. Sports are great.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: If you are not able to pay high fees, then you should definitely take admission in this college.

content.Placements: In the last 2 years, 70% of students are placed from the college. The highest package is 22 LPA. Many companies come to recruit students from our college, including Tata Consultancy Services (TCS), Infosys, IBM, Tech Mahindra, Capgemini, L&T Infotech, TatvaSoft, and Cognizant. The most common roles offered to students, particularly those in IT and Computer Engineering, include Software Engineer, Data Analyst, Web Developer, and other similar profiles.
content.Infrastructure: There is good infrastructure according to fees because it is a government college. This year, all new computers are added in the college. The Computer Engineering Department at VGEC is well-equipped to support the academic curriculum and practical training of students. This lab is specifically designed with high-end computers and networking software like Wireshark and Packet Tracer for hands-on experience in networking.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: College is decent and good. Placement is good. The only problem is not tech fest or anything.

content.Placements: Mostly, the students preparing for web development get placed easily in our college. 4 LPA is the average package offered by companies. By the end of the 4th year, 99.99% of students in my course, which is computer engineering, get placed in companies, and our placement portal is also good.
content.Infrastructure: Our lab has Wi-Fi and AC, and the library also has lots of books. The hostel is also good, and the food is decent, but the only problem is the water issue, which we face in the hostel many times. Other classes also have projectors. Our college definitely needs a good canteen.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: VGEC Chandkheda - Good academics and average placements.

content.Placements: In mechanical engineering, the highest package is around 11 LPA, and average is around 4 LPA to 5 LPA. Actually in my class, there are 160 students. ONGC, Adani, Tata Motors, Hitachi, and other top recruiting companies come to our college, and also placement rate is also good.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of this college is good but it's very old structure. The quality of food available in the mess. Canteen is quite good, and food quality is also affordable and tasty. For sports and games, there are nets for volleyball and also for football.

reviews.review_heading: Good academics and infrastructure with decent placements, industry readiness depends on self effort.
reviews.review_text: Vishwakarma Government Engineering College (VGEC), Ahmedabad has academic blocks, library Computer laboratories. Practical sessions and Mini and major projects  are offered. Research and experimentation opportunities are provided. Spacious and well-ventilated  classrooms equipped with projectors, whiteboards, and audio systems in many rooms. A large collection of textbooks, reference books, and journals. Access to e resources, e books and digital journals. Reading rooms with a quiet study enviro...

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and great teachers are available.
reviews.review_text:
Wi-Fi are in all the departments. In the library, there is Wi-Fi. In the hostel, there is a LAN that can be connected to through a laptop.
Classrooms are good with great infrastructure. The quality of food in the hostel is not so good. I won't recommend eating from there. Sports are great.

reviews.review_heading: If you are not able to pay high fees, then you should definitely take admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: There is good infrastructure according to fees because it is a government college. This year, all new computers are added in the college. The Computer Engineering Department at VGEC is well-equipped to support the academic curriculum and practical training of students. This lab is specifically designed with high-end computers and networking software like Wireshark and Packet Tracer for hands-on experience in networking.

reviews.review_heading: College is decent and good. Placement is good. The only problem is not tech fest or anything.
reviews.review_text: Our lab has Wi-Fi and AC, and the library also has lots of books. The hostel is also good, and the food is decent, but the only problem is the water issue, which we face in the hostel many times. Other classes also have projectors. Our college definitely needs a good canteen.

reviews.review_heading: VGEC Chandkheda - Good academics and average placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this college is good but it's very old structure. The quality of food available in the mess. Canteen is quite good, and food quality is also affordable and tasty. For sports and games, there are nets for volleyball and also for football.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vishwakarma Government Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: In my college, facilities are good. Our college has Wi-Fi and a good library with many books. In my college, classrooms are good. The infrastructure is good. In my college hostel, the mess food is cheap and low-quality. Rooms are of low quality. My college canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good. Teachers are also supportive.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good, and there was an IIT in this place before, so it is good. Facilities in the hostel are very good. There is one reading room where an Ethernet connection is available. There are also labs where high-power PC are located.

reviews.review_heading: I recommend that students choose VGEC college for their bachelor's degree.
reviews.review_text: VGEC has dedicated laboratories for its various engineering departments, auditorium, seminar halls, medical facilities, canteen, and mess. Sports complex and grounds like volleyball court, kabaddi court, and table tennis. Hostel for both girls and boys are available. Library is available.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college and faculty members. An 8+ CGPA can get you a decent placement.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are limited. Although Wi‑Fi is available, it is not widely usable due to range issues. Overall, the classrooms and campus are good, and the library is improving. Mess food quality is excellent, and the staff is also good. Games and sports grounds are available, but sports equipment like football, rackets, etc. You have to bring it on your own.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and facilities with scope for improvement in practical learning.
reviews.review_text: Computer Engineering department at VGEC has well-maintained classrooms, Wi-Fi access, and updated computer labs. The central library is spacious and provides a good range of technical books. Hostel rooms are average, with basic facilities. The food in the mess is decent but repetitive. Sports grounds are available for cricket, volleyball, and basketball. Medical facilities are limited but available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good for self-study and financially too, as the tuition fees are very nominal.
reviews.review_text: Their classrooms and libraries are good, although the library is small and not as big compared to other colleges. Food quality is not good, very bad. There are no medical facilities. Yes, there are big sports facilities as the college organizes Vishwacup every year for sport enthusiasts.

reviews.review_heading: Well-balanced campus life with good placement and decent infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our ECE department has well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, and access to a central library with technical books and journals. Hostel facilities are decent with spacious rooms, regular water supply, and 24/7 security. The mess provides average quality food, and the canteen offers a good variety. Basic medical facilities, indoor/outdoor sports, and recreation spaces are also available for students.

reviews.review_heading: My college is really good for placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very attractive. Provides very good placement for students. My course in this college offers better study compared to other courses. Regular exams are conducted by the faculty members for special subjects. Companies like Adani, Reliance, Torrent Power, Tata, etc., join for placement.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure and facilities are very good.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very simple due to the government non-AC classes. College Wi-Fi is sufficient for liberal work if you want high internet then it's not the case where you can work there. Hostels are also good for staying. Sports group is also there.

reviews.review_heading: Good college as compared to many other colleges in Ahmedabad.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities provided by the college are the best and good. The location of the college is very good. Classrooms are quite good and spacious. The college also has a canteen, various sports grounds, and indoor games. The library is very good and also has Wi-Fi. The infrastructure of the college is the best, and the college is in the best place in that location.

admission_process.title: Chandigarh University, UP Campus Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Chandigarh University, UP Campus admissions to all the UG and PG programmes are done via CUCET. The Chandigarh University admission process begins with applying for the CUCET exam.
Interested to know more about Chandigarh University, UP Campus admission 2025. Find below the complete Chandigarh University, UP Campus admission process 2025:
Step 1: Chandigarh University Application Process 2026

For Chandigarh University, UP Campus, the first step is to fill out an online application form. Candidates are required to visit the official website of Chandigarh University toregister for CUCET. They also have to pay an application fee ofINR 1,000before submitting the application form.
Step 2: Chandigarh University Selection Criteria 2026 via CUCET

The registered candidates are required to appear for the CUCET entrance exam on their chosen date. Candidates can check out theCUCET exam patternand qualify for the exam with a valid score. TheCUCET resultwill be intimated to the students through e-mail and will also be displayed on (https://cucet.cuchd.in) in candidates' login accounts.
Step 3: Chandigarh University Final Seat Allotment
Candidates whose names appeared on the result list will be required to pay the admission fee to confirm their seats within a stipulated deadline at Chandigarh University, UP Campus.

college_info.college_name: Chandigarh University, UP Campus Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Chandigarh University, UP Campus offers merit and need-based scholarships at undergraduate and postgraduate levels. CUCET (Chandigarh University Common Entrance Test) aims to uphold Chandigarh University’s mission of offering accessible and affordable education. The test is designed to reduce financial barriers for students, ensuring that financial limitations do not hinder talented individuals from pursuing world-class education. By offering up to 100% scholarships and financial support through the test, the university encourages academic brilliance, attracts motivated students, and fosters an inclusive environment conducive to learning and personal growth.

Chandigarh University has committed up to INR 210 crores in scholarships, INR 170 crores for the CU Punjab campus and INR 40 crores for the CU Uttar Pradesh Campus. This initiative provides a pathway to exceptional educational and career opportunities, rewarding high-performing students and granting access to diverse, competitive programs across disciplines. Additionally, there are several scholarships available for reserved category students, wards of defense personnel, and early bird admission scholarships along with teaching assistantships in the form of stipends offered at CU.
Details for all these scholarships are as follows:

1. Chandigarh University Common Entrance Test (CUCET) 2025-26: To streamline the examination process, the Chandigarh University Common Entrance Test (CUCET) has been divided into two distinct phases: CUCET Phase-1 and CUCET Phase-2. The details for scholarships offered based on CUCET are as follows:
Scores in CUCET
CUCET Phase I: Percentage of Waiver
CUCET Phase II: Percentage of Waiver
80 - 90 marks
Eligible
Eligible

Chandigarh University Common Entrance Test (CUCET) 2025-26 provides a convenient exam experience by allowing candidates to take the test from their own homes. Aspirants can check the key requirements and exam details in this space:
Key Requirements and Exam Details:
Conclusion

In conclusion, visit the official website of the university, the Chandigarh University Common Entrance Test (CUCET) not only provides a valuable opportunity to access world-class education but also ensures that financial barriers do not hinder talented students from achieving their academic dreams. With generous scholarships up to 100% based on exam performance, CUCET paves the way for students to unlock their full potential and step into a promising future.
2. Post Graduate Scholarship for Professional Courses for SC/ST
This financial assistance (offered via UGC) is offered to 1,000 SC/ST candidates who are pursuing postgraduate courses in professional* subjects via the National Scholarship Portal.
NOTE: MA, MSc, MCom, MSW, and Mass Communication & Journalism courses are not accepted as professional courses.

3. Merit Scholarship Schemes for the Academic Session 2025-26: Students at CU can also avail merit scholarships on the basis of their scores in the national level entrance exams or last qualifying exam. The details for all these scholarships are as follows:

4. Scholarship Scheme for PG Courses (based on UG scores): Maximum 10% of total intake seats in each Course shall be offered under the scheme.

NOTE: Industry Collaborated courses referred at PG level are not applicable for the above said scheme.
5. NATA/ JEE (Main)-Based Scholarships for BArch students

The university has also introduced a scholarship scheme i.e. Architecture Scholarships on the basis of NATA/ JEE Main Score for the students admitted during the academic session 2025-26. The details for this scholarship are as follows:

6. Teaching Assistant Stipend: Chandigarh University also offers an assistantship option for MSc and ME students. They get INR 5,000 and INR 8,000 per month, respectively, for a maximum of 10 months per year.
7. CGPA-Based Scholarships: 10% scholarships of the total are also given to the students who have attained 9.0 or above CGPA provided that the student is not availing any other scholarship.

8. Scholarship Scheme for wards of defence personnel: 5% seats in all courses of Chandigarh University are reserved for the wards and spouses of defence martyrs and their immediate dependent members. Additionally, defence officers in service who want to take up any course at CU with a study leave are offered 20% waiver on the semester fee. Concession details are as follows:

9. CU Sports Policy for the academic year 2025-26: Chandigarh University also offers sports scholarships to students after conducting the trial rounds for them.

10. Scholarship for Family Members of CU staff (2025-26): The wards/spouses and real brother/ sisters of CU staff (with at least one year of regular service at CU) are offered 50% concession in academic fees. It will continue till the staff member is working with Chandigarh University.
11. Early Bird Scholarship for PG students (2025-26): Students seeking admission to Master of Engineering Programs can avail early-bird scholarships as per the following conditions:
12. Other fee concessions: Apart from the above-mentioned scholarships, old students of CU, single girl child, CU teachers’ ward, orphan students and alumni of CU are also awarded scholarships.
NOTE: All eligible students can avail one scholarship at one time. In case of branch change, scholarship will be discontinued.

For renewal of scholarships at Chandigarh University, it is mandatory that the students admitted under all the above schemes shall have to maintain a minimum of 7.5 CGPA in regular semester exam in first chance without any semester drop/ failing which the concession shall be discontinued.

college_info.intro:
NMIMS Navi Mumbai extends BTech and MBA as its flagship courses. These courses are offered through its School of Technology Management and Engineering and School of Business Management for a duration of 4 and 2 years or at the UG and PG levels, respectively. A few highlights of these programme are given below:
These courses are highly sought-after for their career prospects after graduation with MBA students being highly attractive for companies looking to fill leadership positions. While BTech graduates can take on roles in a range of lucrative Tech roles in a number of prestigious industries.
The NMIMS Navi Mumbai fees for these course will depend on the course level, type and specialisation. For example the NMIMS Navi Mumbai MBA fees will generally range between INR 18.75 Lakhs and INR 21 Lakhs in terms of tuition fees. faqs.answer: A:    The eligibility criteria for taking an admission in Narsee Monji Institute of Management Studies Navi Mumbai is 45% in class 12th. It also accepts the exams like JEE main, MHT CET, NMIMS CET. It asks for required score in NMAT by GMAC in case of MBA . In case of BBA LLB and BA LLB, a candidate should have valid score in CLAT and LSAT India exam .
faqs.question: Can I take admission to Narsee Monjee Institute of Management Studies Navi Mumbai with 60% in Class 12?

faqs.answer: A:    NMIMS is private deemed university which accepts students on basis of NMAT (Narsee Monjee Aptitude test) score. There is no such complusion to pass CAT exam to get admission in NMIMS. Not every university requires CAT examination for admission in MBA.Every university has its own entrance exam and different admission process with different criteria.
faqs.question: Can I get into Narsee Monjee Institute of Management Studies Navi Mumbai without CAT?

faqs.answer: A:    Any Bachelor's Degree in recognised University or equivalent degree recognised by AIU.Where minimum 50% marks taken consideration and also the students need to under go entrance test where students must score pass marks .The final selection is based on performance of student in NMAT after that written test and personal interview.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Most liberal, enthusiastic campus.

review_content.Placements: College offers jobs in several roles like business operations, project analyst, and data analyst, with the package statistically varying from 3.2 to 4.3 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Accenture, TCS, Deloitte, Infosys, and so on. College was so ideal about the internship process.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities of the college are not sufficient. There are average facilities, which were okay enough to do the courses. The hostel menu had Limited varieties of food in limited quantities only. Student arrivals keep on increasing throughout the year, considering the minimum fee payments.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.B.A. LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: NMIMS: The ocean of opportunities.

review_content.Placements: Around 20-40% of students are selected for placement as the criteria for placement are an 8+ CGPA. Also, top MNCs like Wipro and Amazon come on campus. Apart from that, the placement department is incredibly helpful in locating internships and in guiding with CVs.
review_content.Infrastructure: For law students, there is a fully functioning library along with access to digital databases like Manupatra, Livelaw, and many more. Also, there is the center of attention: the Moot Court room. The hostel has a functioning mess which serves 3 meals a day along with evening snacks.

course_faqs.question: How much education loan can I get for NMIMS MBA?
course_faqs.answer: The total amount of education loan that can be availed for MBA at NMIMS various from bank to bank. Maximum amount of loan up to INR 50 Lacs at 7.90% with repayment up to 15 years can be taken from SBI. Using EMI option from Grayquest, the fee can be paid as monthly EMI payment. The interest is charged between 2.1-7.7% depending upon the number of EMIs from 3 to 12.

course_faqs.question: Which MBA programme in NMIMS has the lowest fee?
course_faqs.answer: The annual fee of MBA-Pharmaceuticals is INR 9 lakh. So the total fee of this programme is INR 18 lakh. So, MBA Pharmaceuticals has the lowest fee of all MBA programs in NMIMS.

course_faqs.question: Can I get education loan for MBA at NMIMS?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, many banks provide education loans for MBA at NMIMS. MBA students at NMIMS can avail education loans from SBI, Bank of Baroda, ICICI, IDBI, IDFC First Bank, Central Bank of India and Bank of Maharashtra. Students also have the option of getting loans from financial institutes such as ITI Group, Credila and Grayquest.
