overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for MBA at Narsee Monjee Institute of Management Studies Navi Mumbai?
overview_faqs.answer: Shri Vile Parle Kelavani Mandal's Narsee Monjee Institute of Management Studies is a private deemed university located in Navi Mumbai. The Narsee Monjee Institute of Management Studies Navi Mumbai university also has campuses in Sirpur, Banglore, and Hyderabad. The NMIMS (MBA) fee is from 7LPA to 11.95LPA.For MBA business analytics fees is 9.05LPA and for MBA digital transformation fee is 8.52LPA. There are 100% placement chances in this institute.

overview_faqs.question: Is Narsee Monjee Institute of Management Studies Navi Mumbai good for B.Tech?
overview_faqs.answer: Narsee Monjee Institute of Management Studies Navi Mumbai is known for its B.Tech courses. The curriculum is revised every semester to keep up with changes in the industry. The teachers are knowledgeable and aims to provide a competitive and good study experience and equip students with good skills needed in technical industry. The exams are challenging to prepare students for the competitive field. The institution provides plenty of placement and internship opportunities. The top recruiting companies were Hindustan Unilever and Tata etc. In conclusion, the institution is good for B.Tech and candidate should consider NMIMS Navi Mumbai for better future.

overview_faqs.question: What is the total tuition fees for MBA at NMIMS Navi Mumbai?
overview_faqs.answer: NMIMS Navi Mumbai MBA tuition fees range from INR 16.3 Lacs and INR 21 lakh. This fee is provided in range as the fee for MBA and MBA Tech is different. Students who wish to know the entire breakdown can visit the official website of the institute.

overview_faqs.question: Does the tuition fee of MBA in NMIMS include the fee of the hostel accomodation?
overview_faqs.answer: NMIMS charges an extra fee for hostel accomodation. The MBA tuition fee does not include the accomodation charges.

review_summary.college_name: NMIMS Navi Mumbai Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: College review NMIMS 2022-2026 batch

content.Placements: Only one batch has passed out till now, and as per my knowledge, 70 percent got placed with the highest 42 LPA and the lowest 6 LPA. Top recruiters are Capgemini, startups, TCS. 50 percent get internships. AI/ML engineer, software engineer, python developer are roles offered by this course.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is lavish with digital classrooms having smart TVs for teaching. The library has all facilities for students with proper study materials available, and the college has ACs everywhere on the campus. The hostel of the college is pretty good. There is a sick room available with proper doctor facility and even a canteen with good quality food at a low range.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Hospitality Operations and Management - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: This University is best in Mumbai.

content.Placements: This University offers high placement opportunities for the BBA students. The highest package of this college is 50 LPA and the lowest package of this college is 4 LPA. There are many well-known companies like HCL, TCS that visit this college for placement purposes. At least 60% is required for the internship opportunity.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this course is very good for the students. This University provides many facilities for the students including all-time Wi-Fi facilities. This University classrooms are fully air-conditioned. This University has a big library for the students where students learn together. This University hostels are also very good for the students and the food quality is very good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Most liberal, enthusiastic campus.

content.Placements: College offers jobs in several roles like business operations, project analyst, and data analyst, with the package statistically varying from 3.2 to 4.3 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Accenture, TCS, Deloitte, Infosys, and so on. College was so ideal about the internship process.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities of the college are not sufficient. There are average facilities, which were okay enough to do the courses. The hostel menu had Limited varieties of food in limited quantities only. Student arrivals keep on increasing throughout the year, considering the minimum fee payments.

individual_reviews.course: B.B.A. LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: NMIMS: The ocean of opportunities.

content.Placements: Around 20-40% of students are selected for placement as the criteria for placement are an 8+ CGPA. Also, top MNCs like Wipro and Amazon come on campus. Apart from that, the placement department is incredibly helpful in locating internships and in guiding with CVs.
content.Infrastructure: For law students, there is a fully functioning library along with access to digital databases like Manupatra, Livelaw, and many more. Also, there is the center of attention: the Moot Court room. The hostel has a functioning mess which serves 3 meals a day along with evening snacks.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Trips related to my MBA college.

content.Placements: The percentage of students who are placed in our course is 58%, which was much lower. For other courses, it is usually above 70%. The recruiting companies would offer only a few offers with no improvements. No active internships are arranged by the college.
content.Infrastructure: The college management has good structures and layers for maintaining its campus in a good way. The campus satisfactorily serves the students with greater needs. Their motto and aim are to bring the college to a better position than before, which can also be attained.

admission_overview.college_name: NMIMS Navi Mumbai Admission 2026: Dates, Courses & Fee, Application Process

admission_overview.title: NMIMS Navi Mumbai Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: NMIMS Navi Mumbai admissions are both merit and entrance-based. It is a campus of deemed-to-be University - SVKM’s NMIMS (located in Vile Parle, West Mumbai). It offers various programmes in the field of Management, Law, Science and Technology at the UG and PG levels such as BTech, MBA Tech, BBA, BSc, BA LLB, BBA LLB and MBA. NMIMS University offers various programmes at the UG level. Admission to all the UG programmes, apart from BTech and MBA (Tech), is offered based on a valid score in NPAT exam. Admission to BTech and MBA (Tech) is based on NMIMS-CET. Interested students can read the following article to know about the courses, eligibility, and admission criteria for Narsee Monjee Institute of Management Studies, Navi Mumbai.

eligibility_selection.title: NMIMS Navi Mumbai Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2026
eligibility_selection.description: NMIMS Navi Mumbai course admissions are entrance-based and subject to the preset admission criteria. At the UG level, NMIMS Navi Mumbai campus offers BBA, BTech and BSc programmes to the students. Admission to BBA and BSc is based on NPAT and BTech admission is based on NMIMS-CET. A merit list will be prepared based on academic and entrance exam performance for final selection. A general eligibility is as below: Check the table below to know about the eligibility and selection criteria for NMIMS University Navi Mumbai courses:

courses_table.eligibility: UG degree with a minimum aggregate of 50% from a recognised university
Class 12 with a minimum of 60% aggregate

- A pass in Class 12 or equivalent from a recognised board including the International Baccalaureate Diploma with a minimum aggregate of 50% in PCM - Those awaiting their Class 12 or equivalent exam result can also apply
Class 12 or equivalent board with a minimum aggregate of 60% in any stream with Mathematics/ Statistics/ Mathematics & Statistics (Science/Commerce/Arts)
Class 12 with a minimum of 50% aggregate from a recognised board

faqs.answer: NMIMS Navi Mumbai eligibility requires students to complete the qualifying exam from a recognised board/ university. A general eligibility for the NMIMS Navi Mumbai campus courses is as below:NMIMS Navi Mumbai UG eligibility is to pass Class 12 with required marks and subjectsNMIMS Navi Mumbai PG eligibility require students to complete graduation from a recognised university

faqs.answer: The mode of application at NMIMS Navi Mumbai is online. Students can apply through the university page so long as they meet the course specific eligibility requirements. admission_process.title: NMIMS Navi Mumbai Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: NMIMS Navi Mumbai admission processcan be completed online at the university's website. The university accepts students on an entrance basis only, hence, students have to register for the accepted exams. TheNMIMS admission processinvolves application, selection, and admission confirmation. Interested students can follow the steps below to complete NMIMS University, Navi Mumbai admission process:
NMIMS Navi Mumbai Application

Students can get the application fromofficial website of NMIMS Navi Mumbai. Besides, candidates can also apply online. Aspirants need to pay an application fee to apply for a course. Candidates will also need to submit the specified documents during the application process.

NMIMS Navi Mumbai shortlists students based on merit in the last qualifying exam. The university also accepts entrance exam scores such as and NMAT, NMIMS-CET, NPAT, etc. GD/ Competence Test followed by Personal Interview is done for some courses for final selection.
Admission Confirmation
Once selected, candidates need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the college.

NMIMS Navi Mumbai fee strcuture includestuition fees, admission fees, and more. Some of the components are charged only once, while the remaining are to be paid either annually or semester-wise. The fee vary based on the course and specialisation. Check the table below to know about theNMIMS Navi Mumbai feesfor some of the offered courses:
Note: This data is from official sources and can change.

NMIMS Navi Mumbai seat intakeis limited. The university offers seats to students based on entrance scores and the seat intake can change based on programme and specialisations. Students can check the table to know about theNMIMS University Navi Mumbai seatsfor popular programmes:
Note: This data is from official sources and can change.

faqs.question: Is it tough to get BTech admission at NMIMS Navi Mumbai?
faqs.answer: Admission to BTech at NMIMS Navi Mumbai is competitive as it is based on performance in NMIMS-CET or JEE Main. Students with a good academic record and good entrance exam score have better chances. The choice is made on the basis of merit and cutoff marks.

faqs.question: What is the typical admission cycle for MBA at NMIMS?
faqs.answer: Typically, the admission cycle for MBA at NMIMS begins with the NMAT registration in August-October. The NMIMS online application also opens around August- October simultaneously. The NMAT examination takes place in November-December. After shortlisting of candidates, the Competency Assessment Test and Personal Interview rounds are conducted in January- February. The merit list is declared between February-April. After the submission of fee, the new academic session at NMIMS begins in June.

faqs.answer: Yes, NMIMS Navi Mumbai does need NPAT for admission to its BSc courses. Candidates need to register and take the NPAT exam and obtain the necessary score. Admission is done based on NPAT performance along with Class 12 academic performance and eligibility criteria.

placement_report.college_name: NMIMS Navi Mumbai Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: NMIMS Navi Mumbai Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: NMIMS Navi Mumbai has released its placement report 2025 of its school. As per the report, the highest package and average package offered to School of Business Management students during placements 2025 stood at INR 19 LPA and INR 12.85 LPA, respectively. A total of 100 companies participated during SBM placements 2025. Further, the highest package offered to School of Commerce during NMIMS Navi Mumbai placements 2025 were INR 6.83 LPA and INR 5.28 LPA, respectively. The highest and average package offered to School of Hospitality Management students was INR 4.32 LPA and INR 3.8 LPA. Additionally, the highest package and average package offered during BTech & MBA (Tech) placements 2025 were INR 42.3 LPA and INR 15 LPA, respectively. For BA LLB and BBA LLB the highest package stood at INR 7.40 LPA. The highest and average package recorded for School of Economics was INR 6 LPA and INR 5.6 LPA.

library.description: The well-stocked library provides easy access to a world of knowledge to all the students and faculty. The library has a fabulous location and design and is easily accessible from all corners of the college premises. The well-curated library boasts of a rich collection of books, journals (National/International), audio-visuals, CD’s, newsletters, etc. on engineering and management subjects. The Library has an open access system facilitating the free use of material on the shelves. It has a separate Reading Hall with ample capacity. The library is fully automated and is currently employing KOHA software for managing the library functions. To meet the present and future needs of its users, the online database is made available through EZproxy. Users can access all the e-database in college premises as well as from home also. The library has access to more than 30 databases which are catering to the intellectual growth of faculty and student community.

reviews.review_heading: College review NMIMS 2022-2026 batch
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is lavish with digital classrooms having smart TVs for teaching. The library has all facilities for students with proper study materials available, and the college has ACs everywhere on the campus. The hostel of the college is pretty good. There is a sick room available with proper doctor facility and even a canteen with good quality food at a low range.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by NMIMS School of Hospitality Management, Navi MumbaiReviewed on 26 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This University is best in Mumbai.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this course is very good for the students. This University provides many facilities for the students including all-time Wi-Fi facilities. This University classrooms are fully air-conditioned. This University has a big library for the students where students learn together. This University hostels are also very good for the students and the food quality is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Most liberal, enthusiastic campus.
reviews.review_text: The facilities of the college are not sufficient. There are average facilities, which were okay enough to do the courses. The hostel menu had Limited varieties of food in limited quantities only. Student arrivals keep on increasing throughout the year, considering the minimum fee payments.

reviews.review_heading: NMIMS: The ocean of opportunities.
reviews.review_text: For law students, there is a fully functioning library along with access to digital databases like Manupatra, Livelaw, and many more. Also, there is the center of attention: the Moot Court room. The hostel has a functioning mess which serves 3 meals a day along with evening snacks.

reviews.review_heading: Trips related to my MBA college.
reviews.review_text: The college management has good structures and layers for maintaining its campus in a good way. The campus satisfactorily serves the students with greater needs. Their motto and aim are to bring the college to a better position than before, which can also be attained.

reviews.review_heading: MBA from NMIMS Navi Mumbai.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good. There are huge classrooms with air conditioning and projectors. There is a gym and a huge cafeteria that is clean. We also have sports facilities, and we have Wi-Fi all over campus. The college is pretty aesthetic, and the building is in pretty good shape. Moreover, it's clean. Canteen food is also really very good.

reviews.review_heading: It is not so cherished forever.
reviews.review_text: The college arranges ATM facilities for students and visitors for emergency purposes. The college mess is so messed up and fully occupied at all times.  Sometimes, the food served in the mess does not justify our money. It always delays in providing any timely services.

reviews.review_heading: It is not at all restricted and is slightly liberal.
reviews.review_text: Canteen contractors focus on providing nutritious food rather than yummy and tasty food. The college provides a holistic approach to support students in achieving something in sports. They care about the wellness and nutrition of students. The administration block is located at the central portion of the college campus.

reviews.review_heading: Completely dissatisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Charges levied from the students for availing of most of the facilities on the campus are like the overpriced ones. So I shifted to using the public bus facilities to reduce my allowances, and also avoided eating canteen food due to its higher cost, but I benefited from the college by getting a scholarship for my tuition fees.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college and course but the placements are bad and exams are difficult.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is great overall. Although Wi-Fi doesn't allow social media that's fine. The library is good but not enough books. For sports people went to another ground. The hostel is bad though and the food isn't good. The canteen is alright though.

reviews.review_heading: They provide enormous offers to our batch students.
reviews.review_text: All the reference books and textbooks are available in the library, as specific racks are allocated for all the disciplines to avoid unnecessary confusion. Importance to sports activities is not given by the college according to their rules. College management works in the favor of students.

reviews.review_heading: The college has given us good growth.
reviews.review_text: Safety and security alarms were fixed in the main area of the college campus. Our college is located in a vast area of about 4500 acres. Water facilities were available at all times. We may able to see a lot of students got crowded in the canteen areas in intervals.

reviews.review_heading: About NMIMS B.A. LL.B. hons Mumbai campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at our time was relatively new. Everything was fresh because of renovation. We had a good library and had Wi-Fi access. Though my year was during COVID I really enjoyed our campus. It had spacious classrooms with projector, and the mess was okay.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers are the most strict officers.
reviews.review_text: It's prestigious organisations that support students from various economic backgrounds to complete their higher education. Auditorium was located at the administrative block, and 1,000 seats were built with clear audio and visual technologies.

reviews.review_heading: I'm absolutely satisfied with facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our department are awesome. The classrooms and labs are well-maintained and cleaned. A well-stocked library is also present. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is very hygienic, and many varieties are there.

paragraphs: NMIMS Navi Mumbai MBA tuition fees range from INR 16.3 Lacs and INR 21 lakh. This fee is provided in range as the fee for MBA and MBA Tech is different. Students who wish to know the entire breakdown can visit the official website of the institute.

Shri Vile Parle Kelavani Mandal's Narsee Monjee Institute of Management Studies is a private deemed university located in Navi Mumbai. The Narsee Monjee Institute of Management Studies Navi Mumbai university also has campuses in Sirpur, Banglore, and Hyderabad. The NMIMS (MBA) fee is from 7LPA to 11.95LPA.
For MBA business analytics fees is 9.05LPA and for MBA digital transformation fee is 8.52LPA. There are 100% placement chances in this institute.

NMIMS provides Scholarships to need based and merit students. To get Scholarship the students should be eligible to apply and receive scholarship which is determined by Institute. NMIMS Mumbai students get a Central Sector Scheme of Scholarship for economically weaker sections from General, SC, ST & physically handicapped categories.
The annual fee of MBA-Pharmaceuticals is INR 9 lakh. So the total fee of this programme is INR 18 lakh. So, MBA Pharmaceuticals has the lowest fee of all MBA programs in NMIMS.

The BTech and MBA programmes are among the most popular offerings at GL Bajaj Group of Institutions Mathura. GL Bajaj Group of Institutions BTech students are placed among the top companies such as Deloitte, PNB Housing, MAQ Software, and others. The institute offers the BTech programme in several branches such as Computer Science and Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science and Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence & Data Science, and others. The USPs of GL Bajaj Group of Institutions, which make it popular among the students, are listed below:

GL Bajaj Group of Institutions Mathura MBA faculty are highly eligible, skilled, and dedicated to providing support and guidance to students. There are vast career options open for MBA students to choose from such as Business Administration Researcher, Marketing Executive, Business Consultant, Business Analyst, Operations Manager, Sales Analyst, and Investment Analyst. faqs.answer: A:    GL Bajaj Group of Institutions offer direct admission under Management Quota as per the university norms. Candidates seeking admission under Management Quota are informed by the authorities for test or interview for selection. Such candidates need to report to the college along with the specified documents for admission.
faqs.question: Can I join GL Bajaj Group of Institutions - GLBGI directly?

faqs.answer: A:    GLBGI eligibility criteria varies course-wise. Candidates need to pass Class 12 to apply for BTech programme. Graduation is required to apply for GL Bajaj Group of Institutions MBA programme. Besides, candidates also need to pass the entrance exam for admission to specific courses. For BTech, candidates need to pass JEE Main whereas, CUET-PG/ CAT/ MAT are accepted for MBA.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for GLBGI?

faqs.answer: A:    GL Bajaj Group of Institutions has not specified the minimum aggregate for UG courses. However,  60% in Class 12 is a decent score and can get candidate admission in BTech programme. Besides Class 12 score, candidates must also pass JEE Main for admission to BTech programme. For BTech (LE), CUET score is considered for admission.

reviews_list.review_title: The campus life is vibrant here.

review_content.Placements: The placement opportunities in our college are quite good. Around 70–80 percent of students get placed every year in reputed companies. Major recruiters include TCS, Capgemini, LTI Mindtree, Wipro, EY, EPAM, and Accenture. The average package offered is around 4 LPA to 5 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of our college is very good. Classrooms are spacious. They have smart boards and projectors. The library is well-stocked with books and digital resources. Laboratories are well-maintained with modern equipment. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. Hostel is clean and safe. Along with good food and proper maintenance. Sports facilities, a gym, and medical facilities are also provided. It creates a very good learning environment.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: This college is the best in terms of placements.

review_content.Placements: Almost 65% of students get placed, the highest package for 2024 is 20 LPA, and the average package for CSE students is 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Flipkart, Swiggy, and Accenture come to our college. In the third year, 50% of the students got offers for internships in software development engineering.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available on the campus for students. Computer labs are good but in tech labs, some machines are not working properly. Classrooms are good, but we feel hot in summer because there is no AC. Hostels are okay. Games like carrom and chess are available. If we are hostellers, then we can play games because in the middle of classes, there is no permission to play.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: My college provide best faculty members.

review_content.Placements: In my college, placements are very good compared to other private colleges affiliated with AKTU University. If we talk about placement percentage in the 2023-24 session, the placement percentage was around 75%. The highest package offered is around 26 LPA. Overall, the average package is around 5 LPA. The median offered package is 3.5 LPA. You should focus more on the average package which can sometimes be misleading and not tell you the complete picture. Top recruiting companies are Accenture, TCS, Wipro, and Palo Alto.
review_content.Infrastructure: College hostel is not good, and the food in the hostel is very bad. All other amenities are present in the college like a gym, library, medical emergency, and sports ground. College hostel is not too big, but it has all the amenities in it. College warden is not good.

content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available on the campus for students. Computer labs are good but in tech labs, some machines are not working properly. Classrooms are good, but we feel hot in summer because there is no AC. Hostels are okay. Games like carrom and chess are available. If we are hostellers, then we can play games because in the middle of classes, there is no permission to play.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My college provide best faculty members.

content.Placements: In my college, placements are very good compared to other private colleges affiliated with AKTU University. If we talk about placement percentage in the 2023-24 session, the placement percentage was around 75%. The highest package offered is around 26 LPA. Overall, the average package is around 5 LPA. The median offered package is 3.5 LPA. You should focus more on the average package which can sometimes be misleading and not tell you the complete picture. Top recruiting companies are Accenture, TCS, Wipro, and Palo Alto.
content.Infrastructure: College hostel is not good, and the food in the hostel is very bad. All other amenities are present in the college like a gym, library, medical emergency, and sports ground. College hostel is not too big, but it has all the amenities in it. College warden is not good.

admission_overview.college_name: GL Bajaj Group of Institutions Course Admissions 2025 (Open): Application, Fee, Eligibility, Selection

admission_process.title: GLBGI Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: GL Baja Group of Institutions admissionis entrance-based. The institution accepts JEE Main, CAT, MAT or CUET score for admission to specific courses. GLBGI also offers direct admission under Management Quota to eligible candidates. The institution offers UG and PG courses in the Engineering and Management stream in affiliation withAKTU. Interested candidates can apply online forGLBGI admissions.

GLBGI offers BTech and MBA courses at the UG and PG levels. The institution also offers lateral entry to the BTech programme. Candidates must fulfil the eligibility criteria set for their course for admission. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 whereas graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. Find belowGLBGI coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
CUET-PG/MAT/CAT
Download:GLBGI Brochure

GL Bajaj Group of Institutions offers admissions based on the merit of the candidates. Candidates can also apply for direct admission under Management Quota. Below is step-wise GLBGI admission process:
Step 1: GLBGI Application Process 2025

The mode of application is online. Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can apply for their preferred course. Aspirants will need to upload certain documents to complete the application process.
Step 2: Selection Process

Once the registration process is over, GLBGI shortlists candidates based on entrance exam scores. For BTech admission, aspirants need to pass JEE Main. MBA aspirants must qualify CUET-PG for admission. Candidates can apply for lateral entry based on their CUET score. Besides, the institution offers direct admission under the Management Quota as per the university norms. Such aspirants will be informed by the authority for a test or an interview.
Step 3:Admission Confirmation
On confirmation of admission, selected candidates are required to report with the specified documents. They need to pay aGLBGI feeto confirm their seat in the institute.

faqs.question: Can I get admission to GL Bajaj Group of Institutions - GLBGI with 60% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: GL Bajaj Group of Institutions has not specified the minimum aggregate for UG courses. However,  60% in Class 12 is a decent score and can get candidate admission in BTech programme. Besides Class 12 score, candidates must also pass JEE Main for admission to BTech programme. For BTech (LE), CUET score is considered for admission.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by GL Bajaj Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: Yes, GL Bajaj Group of Institutions accepts national-level entrance exams for admission to UG and PG courses. For BTech admission, aspirants need to pass JEE Main. MBA aspirants must qualify CUET-PG for admission. Candidates can apply for lateral entry based on their CUET score.

faqs.question: Can I join GL Bajaj Group of Institutions - GLBGI directly?
faqs.answer: GL Bajaj Group of Institutions offer direct admission under Management Quota as per the university norms. Candidates seeking admission under Management Quota are informed by the authorities for test or interview for selection. Such candidates need to report to the college along with the specified documents for admission.

faqs.question: What is the admission process of GL Bajaj Group of Institutions - GLBGI?
faqs.answer: GL Bajaj Group of Institutions offer admission to UG and PG courses based on entrance exam scores. The institution accepts CUET-UG for BTech (LE) and CUET-PG for MBA programme. Candidates can also apply for MBA with CAT/ MAT scores. Admission to BTech is based on JEE Main score. Direct admission is also offered under Management Quota. Besides, candidates must also fulfil the eligibility requirements specified for their course.

description: GL Bajaj Group of Institutions cutoff 2025 has been announced for admission to BTech programme for all categories and rounds in the both the All India and Home State quota. Students can scroll to the exam-wise sections below for details about GL Bajaj Group of Institutions UPTAC Cutoff 2025 and other exams. A few more exam-related updates are in the pointers below:

The GL Bajaj Group of Institutions cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the GL Bajaj Group of Institutions BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 529665 and 1282444 for the General AI category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineerin

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 529665 for the general AI quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 950061 in 2023 and 317110 in 2022. On analysing the cutoff data of three years, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering demonstrated fluctuating trend.

GL Bajaj Group of Institutions - GLBGI accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to GL Bajaj Group of Institutions can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

GL Bajaj Group of Institutions JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. Candidates can refer to the table below to download the consolidated year-wise counselling rounds for GL Bajaj Group of Institutions - GLBGI.

As the GL Bajaj Group of Institutions UPTAC Cutoff 2025 has been concluded for all rounds and categories under the AI and HS quota. During last round B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering proved to be the toughest for this category, with the closing cutoff being .

For 2025, in the last round, the top three most competitive specialisations for admission in the General AI category students were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, followed by B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning), and B.Tech. in Computer Science, with the closing ranks of , and , respectively.

For admission to GL Bajaj Group of Institutions for B.E. / B.Tech students have to clear the UPTAC exam and attain valid ranks to qualify for a seat at this institute. Students can see the table below to know the important dates for admission to GL Bajaj Group of Institutions - GLBGI.

hostel.description: Each room in the hostels is spacious and well ventilated designed for comfort and are equipped with a bed, study table and cupboards provided for the students. library.description: The library has around ten thousand volume of books, more than hundred National & International research journals and 50 e-journals,DELNET, a digital library network connects the institute to 1000+ libraries along with electronic database accessing facility,Inter-Library loan facility allowing the users to borrow books from abroad and Book Bank facility is also there at the library .

reviews.review_heading: Yes, you can definitely try this college for B.Teach.
reviews.review_text: The mess of the college is not that good, but for survival, you can use this mess. In terms of breakfast, it's good and totally great for new students. However, existing students may feel like it’s unhealthy and not good for their health, but overall it's acceptable.

reviews.review_heading: Review of GL Bajaj Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: All facilities provided by the college are sufficient for students. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Classrooms are air-conditioned, but not all classrooms have air conditioning. Library facilities are provided. There are a large number of books available. Mess and hostel facilities are good and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: The campus life is vibrant here.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is very good. Classrooms are spacious. They have smart boards and projectors. The library is well-stocked with books and digital resources. Laboratories are well-maintained with modern equipment. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. Hostel is clean and safe. Along with good food and proper maintenance. Sports facilities, a gym, and medical facilities are also provided. It creates a very good learning environment.

reviews.review_heading: This college is the best in terms of placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available on the campus for students. Computer labs are good but in tech labs, some machines are not working properly. Classrooms are good, but we feel hot in summer because there is no AC. Hostels are okay. Games like carrom and chess are available. If we are hostellers, then we can play games because in the middle of classes, there is no permission to play.

reviews.review_heading: My college provide best faculty members.
reviews.review_text: College hostel is not good, and the food in the hostel is very bad. All other amenities are present in the college like a gym, library, medical emergency, and sports ground. College hostel is not too big, but it has all the amenities in it. College warden is not good.

reviews.review_heading: This college is the best in terms of academics.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is also very good compared to other colleges, all the facilities are available here. Everything from the infrastructure of this college is very good, and the hostels here are also very good. Good hygienic food is available in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: My college provide the best environment in terms of coding.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty small, but the campus is an overall good campus. There are good facilities for sports. The hostel is nice for first-year students. The canteen serves a variety of food. Sports are good in college. There are various types of sports like football and cricket. There is a good library in college to learn various subjects.

reviews.review_heading: My college is best in terms of placement.
reviews.review_text: The only problem with my department is that the lab and practical equipment are too old and it is not easy to take observations easily. There is enough equipment, but most of them are not working properly. The only thing you can do is perform your practical on Saturday if you are free. If I talk about the hostel, the 1st year boys hostel and girls hostel are good but the senior hostel is below average.

reviews.review_heading: My college is the best in academics.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is really nice, with all the basic amenities and things like various technical and non-technical labs. In-campus hostel facilities are also nice. Food quality is not comparable to home food, but it is still edible, better than other colleges in the locality.

reviews.review_heading: This college provides the best placement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is decent but not very overwhelming. There are two libraries in the college, which are pretty good. The labs are also decent. The hostel food is not good, considering the fee they charge per year. Canteen facilities are miserable. The sports facilities are great here.

reviews.review_heading: Campus life is comfortable.
reviews.review_text: Students can choose between AC and non AC rooms based on their preference and budget. AC rooms typically cost around 95,000 per year, while non AC rooms are approximately 75,000 annually. Additional facilities like laundry services are available at extra charges. The institution emphasizes holistic student development by providing a conducive living and learning environment on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities, decent placements.
reviews.review_text: GL Bajaj Group of Institutions offers strong academic facilities with 24/7 Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, spacious air-conditioned classrooms, and a central library stocked with books, journals, and e-resources like IEEE and Springer. Hostels provide secure accommodation with single/double sharing, attached bathrooms, and reliable utilities. Mess serves vegetarian meals with weekly menu changes, though food quality is rated average, canteens offer additional options. Medical facilities include a cam...

reviews.review_heading: The real on ground report of GL Bajaj Group of Institutions - GLBGI.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are still very old-fashioned, even most of the rooms don't have hi-tech projectors, and only good thing is air conditioning. Wi-Fi is available but students are not allowed to use it. Library does not have an AC. Mess food is very basic. Canteen has minimum options and is overpriced with trash taste. In rainy season the ground is filled full with water.

reviews.review_heading: GL Bajaj Group of Institutions - GLBG.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is not so good. About college classes, it gives quite a school-time feeling. We have an English lab, Chemistry lab, Physics lab, and Graphic lab. There are 2 seminar halls. The CSE department has different labs for TAFL, Cyber Security, Data Structures, Operating Systems, and Object-Oriented Programming. Talking about the hostel, there are 2-by-2 seater rooms with AC facilities also available. The hostel food is not good at all, we often get sick.

reviews.review_heading: College is good and a value for money.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi in the library, the washrooms are good, and the faculty is also good. AC and non-AC rooms are available in the hostel, and the food quality in the mess and canteen is average. Other facilities like medical, sports, and games are also good, and places like Vrindavan are nearby.

review_summary.college_name: Sardar Patel College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Extraordinary good placements in 2025.

content.Placements: Nearly 90% of those who have applied have already been placed in reputed companies, with 3 more months to go for the final year to end. The highest package is 11.4 LPA and the lowest is 3.75 LPA. The average might be around 6 to 6.5 LPA. Top recruiters include Mahanagar Gas Ltd and Thyssenkrupp in the core mechanical domain, while ICICI Bank and AXIS Bank are in the non-core domain. Internships aren't offered by our college, one needs to find them on their own, except for a few PPO opportunities provided at the end of the 3rd year. The top roles offered are in Design, Thermal, Project Management, and Sales domains.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The Sardar Patel College of Engineering is one of the best institute in Mumbai.

content.Placements: The placements are pretty average. The highest package every year is around 10-15 LPA, and the average is 4-5 LPA for the Civil, Electrical, and Mechanical branches. Each year, many top companies visit the college, for example, L&T, Mahanagar, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel facilities are pretty good, as all the rooms are well maintained, and the cleanliness is also well maintained. The mess quality is below average, but there are some other canteens on the campus that provide good meals, so whenever you like having one, you can go there. Additionally, there is an AC in the hostel study room with a good Wi-Fi network.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Power Electronics and Power Systems - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Great college of my times.

content.Placements: The college has a good placement record and the college provides a good return on investment. The college has a 100% placement record. The placement cell not only attracts market leaders for placement drives but also helps and guides us during the placement drive at the college. The highest package for our batch was around 26 LPA and the average package went up to 15 LPA. Google, Arista Network, TCS Research, McKinsey, Honeywell, Texas Instruments, Microsoft, etc. are the companies that participated in the college placement drive. Around 75+ companies took part in the college placement drive.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Power Electronics and Power Systems - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: It's a good college for M.Tech and B.Tech.

content.Placements: The report for the placement campus got 71 companies. The package for this college is 21LPA for the civil branch and other branches as well. Every student is offered based on their marks, backlogs, and their own credits. Personal development is good.
content.Infrastructure: Now the infrastructure is well-updated; each Wi-Fi has good speed, and every single room is cleaned regularly. The area is always kept clean for a healthy environment. As for the hostel, its food tastes good, and the labs are also updated with proper stuff.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with all the things I had experienced so far.

content.Placements: Almost 60% of the students in our batch successfully secured job placements. The remaining few students who were not eligible to participate in the placement process did not secure jobs due to the requirements set by the companies, but they also had opportunities to get internships at big companies. There is a great selection of companies offering placements set by the placement coordinator. There are companies that offer packages of INR 8.5 LPA, and there are a lot of other big companies that also offer good packages.
content.Infrastructure: There are a lot of things that need renovation and updating in the infrastructure. Though the course offered is not bad compared to other colleges, and the hostel facility is also good based on what my classmates have gone through during their stay in the hostel. And I will recommend students join the hostel if seats are available.

paragraphs: Sardar Patel College of Engineering admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG and PG levels in stream includingEngineering.Sardar Patel College of Engineeringadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asJEE Main, GATE, and MHT CET. hostel_campus.college_name: Sardar Patel College of Engineering Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Extraordinary good placements in 2025.
reviews.review_text: Labs are fully functional. The hostel quality is above average and cost-effective. There are 4 playgrounds and adequate sports equipment for recreational activities.

reviews.review_heading: The Sardar Patel College of Engineering is one of the best institute in Mumbai.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities are pretty good, as all the rooms are well maintained, and the cleanliness is also well maintained. The mess quality is below average, but there are some other canteens on the campus that provide good meals, so whenever you like having one, you can go there. Additionally, there is an AC in the hostel study room with a good Wi-Fi network.

reviews.review_heading: Great college of my times.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is decent, not fancy. It's a government hostel. It is 400 miles away from the college building. The mess food is decent too. It's near the hostel accommodation. The hostel has limited seats for each branch and each year and is allocated on the basis of merit and caste quota. The college has a library with well-stocked books in it. The college also provides Wi-Fi facilities for students as well as faculty members.

reviews.review_heading: It's a good college for M.Tech and B.Tech.
reviews.review_text: Now the infrastructure is well-updated; each Wi-Fi has good speed, and every single room is cleaned regularly. The area is always kept clean for a healthy environment. As for the hostel, its food tastes good, and the labs are also updated with proper stuff.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with all the things I had experienced so far.
reviews.review_text: There are a lot of things that need renovation and updating in the infrastructure. Though the course offered is not bad compared to other colleges, and the hostel facility is also good based on what my classmates have gone through during their stay in the hostel. And I will recommend students join the hostel if seats are available.

reviews.review_heading: This college has placements that are good enough.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are good enough and medical facilities are also there. Every year college organises a competition. In college, a huge playground is also present. Wi-Fi in college has good strength, which means phones always have a range on campus no matter where you are.

reviews.review_heading: It is a better college. Students will get supportive staff and the environment is best.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of SPCE is average as this college is very old. But all needful facilities are available. Purified cold drinking water is available on every floor of the building. The building is of 2 floors. Quadrangle provided in the middle of the building. Washroom facilities are available on every floor. The environment of the college is best as SPCE is on Bhavan's campus. There are 3 to 4 other colleges also there. Space has its hostel whose seat filling is done based on merit. There are...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our college.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi, a 24*7 study room, computer labs, a library, etc. The hostel facilities include Wi-Fi, hot water, a water filter, and a water cooler. There is a volleyball and cricket ground in the college. Indoor games like carrom and table tennis are provided.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of the faculty members and good placements in 2022.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities, such as Wi-Fi labs, digital classrooms, and a library, are present. The quality of facilities in the hostel is good. The only issue is that there is a water shortage. The food available in the mess and canteen is good. Medical facilities are also provided. There is also a ground for sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest you join this college. It is one of the best colleges in Maharashtra.
reviews.review_text: The campus is spared over 47 acres of land. The campus life is quite lavish, with trees, a lake, and peacocks. The canteen and mess are decent. It has a gym and huge sports grounds with many sports equipment.

reviews.review_heading: It is a really good college for engineering.
reviews.review_text: Sardar Patel College of Engineering has a fully computerized central library. The boys' hostel has 97 rooms, with 278 beds. The rooms are available on single occupancy and sharing basis. The in-campus hostel, girls' hostel has 19 rooms, with 67 beds, and sharing rooms are available.

reviews.review_heading: Facilities, faculty members and the college crowd are very good.
reviews.review_text: There is a 4G Wi-Fi connection for all students and faculty members in our college. The library system is up-to-date, and there are e-learning boards in all the classrooms. Labs are well-equipped, and the canteen is also near the college, which is affordable, good and hygienic. Regular sports are also conducted.

reviews.review_heading: There are very good placements and management in 2014 passed out batch.
reviews.review_text: There is a good infrastructure in all labs and workshops. Labs and classrooms are equipped with all tools and software. There is a nice environment, and air-conditioners are available in labs. All labs are equipped with internet and Wi-Fi. There are 2 types of canteens for all students, and the sports arena is also very good. But there should be a volleyball court. Medical facilities are also decent.

reviews.review_heading: I have good experience with faculty members and the crowd.
reviews.review_text: The campus of our college is the best. It is situated in a city like Mumbai, and it has many trees and a lake too. The canteen is average with a variety of dishes. Mostly, all the labs have required equipment, and our college provides on-hand experience for many experiments. All the required books are available in the library to refer to, and it is the best part.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sardar Patel College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: We were provided with digital classrooms and facilities of library, labs for all subjects and Wi-Fi. The hostel is also much better and gets even better when we go from 1st year to 2nd and then to 3rd year. Wi-Fi facility was also available in our hostel, and we also got a medical facility. There were a mess and canteen with hygienic food. There was a huge ground in front of the hostel, which contains football and cricket ground. Various sports are held near the workshop area.

highlights.summary:
The CSAB Special Counselling 2025 Round 3 has concluded with the announcement of the seat allotment results for Birla Institute of Technology, Mesra - Patna Extension Center admission to BE/BTech courses.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Birla Institute of Technology, Mesra - Patna Extension Center:

faqs.answer: A:    On completion of B.Arch from Birla Institute of Technology Patna, architecture graduates can look at a wide variety of job opportunities in architecture and related fields. They can work as architects, urban planners, interior designers, landscape architects, and their average starting salaries range between INR 4,50,000 and INR 6,00,000 per annum. Top recruiting firms include Larsen & Toubro, Tata Consulting Engineers, and Shapoorji Pallonji, offering packages up to INR 10,00,000 per annu
faqs.question: What are the job opportunities after doing B.Arch. from Birla Institute of Technology Patna?

faqs.answer: A:    Birla Institute of Technology (BIT) Patna offers on-campus placement opportunities for students after the sixth semester. According to some reviews,  the college is good for placements and has a placement rate of 75–85%. The average salary package is around 6.5–7 LPA, with the highest salary offered at 10 LPA. Some say that the highest package offered on campus is 28 LPA, and the highest off-campus placement is 45 LPA .
faqs.question: Is Birla Institute of Technology Patna good for placements?

faqs.answer: A:    According to a 2023 report,  100% of Computer Science and Information Technology students at Birla Institute of Technology (BIT) Patna received campus placement offers. The report also states that 69% of Electronics and Communication students,  73% of Electrical Engineering students,  44% of Mechanical Engineering students, and 28% of Civil Engineering students received campus placement offers. Computer Science and information technology branch student has more placement
faqs.question: Which branch of B.Tech has more placements at Birla Institute of Technology Patna?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Birla Institute of Technology, Mesra - Patna Extension Center offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA. Whereas, at PG level, Birla Institute of Technology, Mesra - Patna Extension Center offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Birla Institute of Technology, Mesra - Patna Extension Center fee structure for all the courses is around INR 4,27,000 to 13,18,000.

faqs.answer: A:    The total tuition fee for the Master of Business Administration (MBA) programme at Birla Institute of Technology (BITP) Patna is INR 5.18 lakh. This includes a one-time admission fee of INR 27,500, and a hostel fee of INR 66,000. In addition, students must pay the mess fee, which ranges from INR 2,500 to INR 3,500 per month. Students must pay the mess in advance of INR 15,000 and INR 10,000 for girls at BIT Patna. The MBA programme is a two-year PG course that admits 60 students. Applicants must meet the entry requirements, which include having at least 50% in graduation
faqs.question: What is the fee for MBA at Birla Institute of Technology Patna?

faqs.answer: A:    The fee structure for BCA programme in Birla Institute of Technology (BIT) Patna is almost INR 6. 5 Lakhs for 3 years. Here's a breakdown of the estimated costs: 1st year: Approximately INR 2. 2 Lakh (admission fee, tuition fee and other charges).  2nd year: Approximately INR 2. 1 Lakh which comprises tuition fee, hostel charges and other misc charges.  3rd year: About INR 2.2 Lakh which includes fees for tuition, hostels, and other charges.   Note: These are estimates and can be slightly different based on institute’s regulations and may comprise of any other costs and charges that are not included here.

faqs.answer: The admission procedure to Birla Institute of Technology, Patna is fairly tough but there is stiff competition as well. For admission, the institute considers the marks of national level entrance examination such as JEE Main for B.Tech and B.Arch, GATE for M.Tech and again CAT for MBA. For undergraduate programs minimum 50 % in class 12th with PCM is compulsory. For postgraduate programs a certified bachelor’s degree in the related field with 55% and above is necessary. Passing some cutoff does not guarantee admission into the institute since the management takes into consideration factors such as entrance test results, academic achievements and interviews. A favourable academic background and high scores in entrance examination can enhance the likelihood of admission.
faqs.question: Q: Is it easy to get admission in Birla Institute of Technology Patna?

faqs.answer: Admission to B.Tech at BIT Patna is based on your JEE Main score and subsequent counselling process. Here's why:Standardized Entrance Exam: JEE Main is a national engineering entrance exam that ensures a fair selection process based on a common metric. This eliminates the possibility of direct admissions bypassing the merit system.Transparency and Competition: Relying solely on JEE Main scores makes the admission process transparent and meritocratic. Students compete for seats based on their performance in the exam
faqs.question: Q: Can I get direct admission at Birla Institute of Technology Patna?

faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for the Master of Business Administration (MBA) programme at Birla Institute of Technology (BITP) Patna is INR 5.18 lakh. This includes a one-time admission fee of INR 27,500, and a hostel fee of INR 66,000. In addition, students must pay the mess fee, which ranges from INR 2,500 to INR 3,500 per month. Students must pay the mess in advance of INR 15,000 and INR 10,000 for girls at BIT Patna. The MBA programme is a two-year PG course that admits 60 students. Applicants must meet the entry requirements, which include having at least 50% in graduation
faqs.question: Q: What is the fee for MBA at Birla Institute of Technology Patna?

faqs.answer: The median salary for B.Tech students at Birla Institute of Technology Patna is as low as INR 5. 7 LPA only. The leading recruiters are TCS, Wipro, Infosys, and HCL providing packages of INR 3. 5 to 9 LPA. The highest package of INR 9 LPA was up for grabbing through various companies including Microsoft and Amazon. Computer Science and Electronics students gets slightly a better average of around INR 6. 5 LPA while mechanical and civil engineering students get an average of around INR 4. 5 LPA. There can be differences in placement statistics year by year.

review_summary.college_name: Birla Institute of Technology, Mesra - Patna Extension Center Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Academically, the college is good. Placements are fine, but core branches do not get a good package.

content.Placements: Almost 50-60% of students got placed at this college. The highest package was 34 LPA last year. Many companies visit the college and recruit students like TCS, PayPal, etc. The average package ranges from 8-9 LPA. But some students also got less package that ranges from 3-5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not so vast and big, but it's good and well-maintained. The hostel is also good. The food provided in the mess is up to the mark, unlike other places. Good hygiene is maintained properly here. We have games period week. Medical facilities are also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Placements are average. Some faculty are too good and genius, but the infrastructure is bad.

content.Placements: Almost 60–70% of students get placed, and most of them get placed off-campus. The college adds them as on-campus placements, and the on-campus placements are mostly from mass recruiters. Here, I have seen that they show 100% placements in CSE, but it is not 100%. It is only for students whose CGPA is above 7.5.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not so good, and the land area is also less, it's about 23 acres. But the library facilities are too good. The college has a large library with a good amount of books. The ground is also not too big, and the hostel doesn't have any wardrobes, which makes it too bad.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a good option for students.

content.Placements: We do not have many placement options, and I do not know the reason behind it. Only a handful of companies visit the college for placements. Overall, if students are looking for some moderate options, then they do not have to worry about it because many students look for the options on their own.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average, and it is being modified. It has been under construction for a long time, which disappointed us, and the rest is good. It has a library, hall, sitting places and a cafeteria. Classrooms are well-maintained.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: College have good infrastructure and a good environment too

content.Placements: Our college provides the best placement in Patna. Top recruiters like Amazon, Flipkart, Accenture, Dell, etc., hire more than 90% of student get placement from our campus if they are good or average on their studies. Last year, placement was 89% onwards. So, choosing this college in Patna would be the best decision.
content.Infrastructure: We have more than 2 labs for computers. More than 100 computers are placed in the lab. We have library facilities. Our classroom also has all the basic amenities for students. Our hostel facilities are also good. Seniors are very friendly here, so there is no chance of ragging in the college premises. Mess and canteen also have various types of food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It's a good option if you are not getting any NIT, IIT or any other good private college.

content.Placements: Around eighteen percent of students were placed last year. The highest package offered at our college was around 40 lacs, and the average package at CSE was around 14 lacs. The highest package was taken by a student on campus. Internships are not as good as at other colleges.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is decent and you will see greenery around the campus. The college is small as compared to other NITs. You will get a LAN network in your hostel; classrooms are not good, and the library is also not, but a special digital library is there.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Birla Institute of Technology Patna?
faqs.answer: Admission to B.Tech at BIT Patna is based on your JEE Main score and subsequent counselling process. Here's why:Standardized Entrance Exam:JEE Main is a national engineering entrance exam that ensures a fair selection process based on a common metric. This eliminates the possibility of direct admissions bypassing the merit system.Transparency and Competition:Relying solely on JEE Main scores makes the admission process transparent and meritocratic. Students compete for seats based on their performance in the exam

faqs.question: What is the admission process for B.Tech at Birla Institute of Technology Patna?
faqs.answer: BIT Patna Admissions 2024: The college offers admissions at undergraduate, postgraduate and doctoral programmes. Candidates aspiring for BIT Patna B.E./B.Arch admissions need to qualify for JEE Main. Qualified candidates are offered admissions based on AIR in JEE Main through CSAB (Central Seat Allocation Board)/JoSAA (Joint Seat Allocation Authority).

faqs.question: Is it easy to get admission in Birla Institute of Technology Patna?
faqs.answer: The admission procedure to Birla Institute of Technology, Patna is fairly tough but there is stiff competition as well. For admission, the institute considers the marks of national level entrance examination such as JEE Main for B.Tech and B.Arch, GATE for M.Tech and again CAT for MBA. For undergraduate programs minimum 50 % in class 12th with PCM is compulsory. For postgraduate programs a certified bachelor’s degree in the related field with 55% and above is necessary. Passing some cutoff does not guarantee admission into the institute since the management takes into consideration factors such as entrance test results, academic achievements and interviews. A favourable academic background and high scores in entrance examination can enhance the likelihood of admission.

reviews.review_heading: Academically, the college is good. Placements are fine, but core branches do not get a good package.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not so vast and big, but it's good and well-maintained. The hostel is also good. The food provided in the mess is up to the mark, unlike other places. Good hygiene is maintained properly here. We have games period week. Medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are average. Some faculty are too good and genius, but the infrastructure is bad.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not so good, and the land area is also less, it's about 23 acres. But the library facilities are too good. The college has a large library with a good amount of books. The ground is also not too big, and the hostel doesn't have any wardrobes, which makes it too bad.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good option for students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average, and it is being modified. It has been under construction for a long time, which disappointed us, and the rest is good. It has a library, hall, sitting places and a cafeteria. Classrooms are well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: College have good infrastructure and a good environment too
reviews.review_text: We have more than 2 labs for computers. More than 100 computers are placed in the lab. We have library facilities. Our classroom also has all the basic amenities for students. Our hostel facilities are also good. Seniors are very friendly here, so there is no chance of ragging in the college premises. Mess and canteen also have various types of food.

reviews.review_heading: It's a good option if you are not getting any NIT, IIT or any other good private college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is decent and you will see greenery around the campus. The college is small as compared to other NITs. You will get a LAN network in your hostel; classrooms are not good, and the library is also not, but a special digital library is there.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Their are so many Facilities like library, canteen, Wi-Fi, high profile classrooms. Teachers were also very much helpful and supportive towards every student. The quality of food in canteen was very good and hygienic with affordable prices and their was medical facilities also in the campus, and every year college organises the sports day for the students.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with all the facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not good in hostel rooms so students have to use Wi-Fi through a LAN connection and router but it provides less speed. Library has good Wi-Fi connectivity. Mess and hostel facilities are good. Mess serves tasty and hygienic food items.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the good faculty members, infrastructure, and other facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course are good and well cleaned. The hostel is good. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good. The price of food in the college canteen is quite expensive.

reviews.review_heading: I'm somehow satisfied with my college because of its goodwill and brand in today's world.
reviews.review_text:
Quite good infrastructure for studying and living in hostels with proper food in the canteen. Library is available for the  students to read and enhance their knowledge.
Wi-Fi is also available at the campus and there are lots of games for those who are interested.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good in Patna.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. Labs, library, canteen, auditorium, yoga room, and dance room are available. I am satisfied with the infrastructure. Garden is beautiful.

reviews.review_heading: Overall college life was fun.
reviews.review_text: Hostel used to be clean and clear. Rooms were good and Mess was also good. In first year two students use to share the room whereas from second year onwards single room was provided. Library was also there in college. Semester books used to be given by library itself.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best private college ever in India.
reviews.review_text: In the electrical department, the facilities and infrastructure are awesome. Wi-Fi and labs are well maintained. The quality of facilities in our hostel is awesome, and the quality and quantity of food in the mess are fantastic. Medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: If you live in Bihar and want to pursue BBA, then you can surely join this college.
reviews.review_text: I must say that the infrastructure of this college is the best. It has well-furnished classrooms and a library. There is hostel accommodation and mess facilities. There is a lot of space for sports activities. A parking facility is also available. Labs and canteens are in better condition.

reviews.review_heading: I am pretty satisfied because the placements provided for the previous batch were decent enough.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is pretty good. There are well-equipped classrooms as well as labs. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and the quality of the food served in the mess is decent enough. Sports facilities are quite good. There is a dispensary for students who require medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: For UG course, it is value for money in every aspect except placement.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of BIT Patna are really good. The course and department were good, classroom and library are very good in BIT Patna. Hostel facility is available with the mess and canteen facility is available. The medical facility is good. Sports and games take place regularly.

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates need to pass a minimum of Class 12 for Bannari Amman Institute of Technology BTech/ BE course. reviews_list.review_title: Our college provided organized placements for students.

review_content.Placements: Around 78% of students got placement offers at many companies. The highest package was 8 LPA, and the lowest was 3 LPA. Students were eligible for placement from the 6th semester. Companies like Tata, L&T, and Wipro frequently hire students. Many students also got internship opportunities. Some stipend was given during the internship program. So, according to placements, this college was good.
review_content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure was actually pretty good. Many facilities were available for students. The whole campus was Wi-Fi enabled, every classroom had a smart board, and all rooms were properly maintained and clean. A huge library was present, which was fully air-conditioned.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Neat and good if you are interested in more studies.

review_content.Placements: Around 85 to 90 percent of students are placed, even more based on your skills. The highest is 27 LPA and the lowest 3 LPA, also the average is around 4–5 LPA, it changes annually. In my course, they offer companies like Cadence, Siemens, ABB, Soliton, etc. Also around the locality, it is even complicated sometimes, but based on your skills, it is moreover easy.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, library, and classrooms are neat and good, also maintained neatly. Hostel also provides neat facilities and fulfills your basic requirements. Medical facility is also good; there is a medical center inside the campus. Games and sports are given importance if you have interest. And at last, food in the mess is quality-wise good, but taste-wise it’s okay, manageable to eat overall, okay.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Excellent infrastructure, supportive faculty, and great placement opportunities.

review_content.Placements: I am a 2023 to 2027 batch B.Tech IT student. 90 to 95 percent of students from our department get placed every year. The highest package offered recently is 22 LPA, the average package is 5 to 6 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies include TCS, Infosys, Cognizant, Zoho, and Amazon. 70 percent of students also get internship opportunities in reputed companies through college support. Most of the roles offered are software developer, data analyst, and associate engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure at BIT is excellent. Classrooms are clean, well-lit, and equipped with smart boards. Every department has well-maintained labs with modern equipment and high-speed Wi-Fi. The central library is huge, with a good collection of books and digital resources. Hostel facilities are also very good. Rooms are neat, and food in the mess is hygienic, with a variety of dishes. Medical care, indoor and outdoor sports, and gym facilities are all available inside the campus.
