review_summary.college_name: Bannari Amman Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Strict discipline with good hostel facilities and self learning environment.

content.Placements: I am part of my course batch from this college. Around 60 to 70% of my classmates are placed on campus placements. The highest package is around 10 LPA, and the lowest package starts from 3 LPA. Additionally, an average package is around 4 LPA to 5 LPA. Some of the top companies which recruited from my college include TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, Cognizant, and Zoho. Around 50 to 60% of my classmates secured internships from companies related to IT and software. Top three job positions are software engineer, system engineer, analyst, and associate engineer.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Bannari Amman Institute of Technology is the best Engineering College.

content.Placements: Bannari Amman Institute of Technology is the best Engineering College in Erode. This college's placement facilities are excellent. The placement training staff conduct more campus interviews every year. More than 25 reputed companies like TCS, Wipro, Tata Motors, and TVS Ashok Leyland visit this college for campus interviews for recruitment. More than 95 percent of students are placed every year. The highest salary package is 12 LPA, while the lowest salary package is 3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Bannari Amman Institute of Technology has the best infrastructure facilities among colleges. This college has many laboratory facilities and more computer laboratories available. The college has a well-stocked library. This college provides separate hostel facilities for both boys and girls. Hostel food is very hygienic and healthy. Some sports ground facilities are also available in this college.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college provided organized placements for students.

content.Placements: Around 78% of students got placement offers at many companies. The highest package was 8 LPA, and the lowest was 3 LPA. Students were eligible for placement from the 6th semester. Companies like Tata, L&T, and Wipro frequently hire students. Many students also got internship opportunities. Some stipend was given during the internship program. So, according to placements, this college was good.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure was actually pretty good. Many facilities were available for students. The whole campus was Wi-Fi enabled, every classroom had a smart board, and all rooms were properly maintained and clean. A huge library was present, which was fully air-conditioned.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Neat and good if you are interested in more studies.

content.Placements: Around 85 to 90 percent of students are placed, even more based on your skills. The highest is 27 LPA and the lowest 3 LPA, also the average is around 4–5 LPA, it changes annually. In my course, they offer companies like Cadence, Siemens, ABB, Soliton, etc. Also around the locality, it is even complicated sometimes, but based on your skills, it is moreover easy.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, library, and classrooms are neat and good, also maintained neatly. Hostel also provides neat facilities and fulfills your basic requirements. Medical facility is also good; there is a medical center inside the campus. Games and sports are given importance if you have interest. And at last, food in the mess is quality-wise good, but taste-wise it’s okay, manageable to eat overall, okay.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Excellent infrastructure, supportive faculty, and great placement opportunities.

content.Placements: I am a 2023 to 2027 batch B.Tech IT student. 90 to 95 percent of students from our department get placed every year. The highest package offered recently is 22 LPA, the average package is 5 to 6 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies include TCS, Infosys, Cognizant, Zoho, and Amazon. 70 percent of students also get internship opportunities in reputed companies through college support. Most of the roles offered are software developer, data analyst, and associate engineer.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure at BIT is excellent. Classrooms are clean, well-lit, and equipped with smart boards. Every department has well-maintained labs with modern equipment and high-speed Wi-Fi. The central library is huge, with a good collection of books and digital resources. Hostel facilities are also very good. Rooms are neat, and food in the mess is hygienic, with a variety of dishes. Medical care, indoor and outdoor sports, and gym facilities are all available inside the campus.

admission_overview.college_name: Bannari Amman Institute of Technology Admissions 2025: Courses, Fee, Eligibility, Application, Scholarships

admission_overview.title: BAIT Coimbatore Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: BAIT Coimbatore admissions are both merit entrance-based. The institute considers CET conducted by the Association of Management of Coimbatore for PG courses. The institute also accepts TANCET, CEETA PG and GATE for admission to specific courses. Bannari Amman Institute of Technology offers courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels in the Engineering stream. The institute offers courses in affiliation with Anna University.

eligibility_selection.title: BAIT Coimbatore Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Candidates who plan to get admission in any of these courses must appear for the respective entrance exams. Besides, aspirants must also fulfil the course-specific eligibility for admission. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 whereas graduation is required for PG programmes. Aspirants can get into the flagship programme i.e. BTech of BAIT based on their Class 12 marks and TNEA rank. Below are BAIT Coimbatore courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria:

courses_table.eligibility: HSc or equivalent with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for Backward Class/ MBC & DNC/ SC/ SCA/ ST)
Bachelor's degree or equivalent in the relevant field with at least 50% (45% in case of candidates belonging to the reserved category)
Bachelor's degree of a minimum of 3 years with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category)

faqs.answer: Admission to BTech or BE course of BAIT Coimbatore is via TNEA Counselling. Aspirants can apply for TNEA with their Class 12 marks. Hence, aspirants do not require to qualify JEE Main for BE/ BTech admission. Aspirants only need to fulfil the eligibility criteria for admission.
faqs.question: Does BAIT accept JEE score?

faqs.answer: Candidates need to complete a minimum of three-years bachelor's degree or equivalent with at least 50% aggregate (45% in case of candidates belonging to reserved category) to apply for BAIT Coimbatore MBA programme. Candidates who have passed a three-year Diploma after Class 10 or BE/ BTech/ BArch/ BPharm or Class 12 + AMIE can also apply for the MBA course.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MBA at BAIT?

faqs.answer: Bannari Amman Institute of Technology accepts the TANCET scores for admission to the MBA course. The cutoff was released for various categories under the All India quota. Students can refer to the table below to know the category-wise cutoff scores for BIAT MBA Cutoff 2025.Category - AI quotaBIAT TANCET MBA Cutoff 2025General 1426OBC2818MBC4340
faqs.question: What is TANCET MBA cutoff for Bannari Amman Institute of Technology?

faqs.answer: Bannari Amman Institute of Technology admission  is primarily Merit-Based and Entrance-Based. Students are selected on the basis of various national-level entrance tests, like TANCET, Joint Entrance Examination Main, JEE Advanced, Graduate Aptitude Test in Engineering, etc. and merit scores. However, TNEA cutoff for the general category is stated to be 13,079 - 19,768 rank. The TNEA cutoff for the OC category is 13,079 - 22,440 rank.
faqs.question: Where can a candidate check Bannari Amman Institute of Technology cutoff 2023?

admission_process.title: BAIT Coimbatore Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Bannari Amman Institute of Technology admission processbegins with registration via online mode. Candidates must fulfil the eligibility and selection requirements for admission to the institute. Below are the steps to get a seat in the institute:
Step 1: BAIT Coimbatore Application Process 2025

Aspirants applying for BTech need to register for TNEA after completing Class 12. Aspirants need to apply for the accepted entrance exam for admission. For PG courses, aspirants can collect the form from the Association of Management of Coimbatore office on payment of INR 50.
Step 2: Selection

The institute selects candidates for BTech or BE based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Besides, CET is conducted by the Association of Management of Coimbatore for admission to PG courses. The institute also accepts TANCET for MBA and CEETA PG/ GATE for ME courses.
Step 3: Counselling & Seat Allotment

Candidates need to apply for TNEA Counselling for BE/ BTech admission. The seats are offered to aspirants based on their merit. For PG courses, the seats are allocated based on the entrance exam scores of the aspirants. Selected aspirants must pay theBannari Amman Institute of Technology feesto confirm their seat in the institute.
Check out more details about Bannari Amman Institute of Technology in the video below:

The total fee for MBA is a cumulative of multiple components such as caution deposit, tuition fee, exam fee, etc. Candidates have to pay the course fee to confirm their seat at the time of admission. faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores does BAIT accept for admission to MBA?
faqs.answer: Bannari Amman Institute of Technology accepts TANCET for admission to MBA programme. The institute also considers Common Entrance Test conducted by the Association of Management of Coimbatore. CET question paper for MBA includes five parts with the assessment skills. Candidates are required to answer 100 objective type questions in two hours. Each question is followed by four probable answers.

Students can choose from various specializations, across the Engineering domain, from offerings like Agricultural Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Biotechnology, among others.

faqs.question: What is the fee for M.Tech at BAIT Coimbatore?

Aspirants who are selected need to pay the programme fee to confirm their seat in the institute. Besides, aspirants also need to pay an application fee to register for CEETA-PG.

faqs.question: How much does BTech CSE cost at Bannari Amman Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: Bannari Amman Institute of Technology (BAIT) Coimbatore fee structure is cumulative of a variety of components. The tuition fee amount in the course fees is charged annually or semester-wise. BAIT BTech CSE tuition fee amount isINR 2 lakh. Students have to pay the admission fees or the first semester fees to secure their seats. The tuition fee mentioned here is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to revision and hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: Can I get admission to Bannari Amman Institute of Technology with 60% in Class 12th?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass a minimum of Class 12 for Bannari Amman Institute of Technology BTech/ BE course. As per the official website, aspirants need to complete their Class 12 or equivalent with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for Backward Class/ MBC & DNC/ SC/ SCA/ ST) for BTech/ BE admission. Hence, aspirants with 60% in Class 12 have a good chance of getting a seat in the institute.

faqs.question: When will the TNEA notification be out?
faqs.answer: TNEA 2026 notification will be out in May 2026.TNEA stands for Tamil Nadu Engineering Admissions. The Directorate of Technical Education, Tamil Nadu conducts TNEA every year. It is an online counselling window. All Indian National candidates who wish to take admission to Government and Government Aided Engineering Colleges, University Departments and Constituent Colleges of Anna University, Annamalai University and for the seats surrendered by Self-Financing Engineering Colleges in Tamil Nadu have to apply for TNEA counselling.TNEA counselling is a Unified Single Window Admission System for Indian Nationals only. The courses offered via this online counselling are BE/BTech and BE (sandwich) courses. TNEA counselling is conducted online in 4 rounds as per the schedule. Candidates need to participate in corresponding rounds based on their rank.

description: BAIT cutoff 2025 for admission to the BE/BTech program at the undergraduate level has been released. The cutoff list is out for the General, OBC, SC, ST, EWS, and PWD categories. Candidates can check out the exam-wise section below to get an idea of the BAIT cutoff 2025 across different exams, courses, rounds, and categories. Further updates are provided below:

BAIT TANCET Cutoff 2025 is out for admission to MBA/PGDM for all rounds and categories for students belonging to the AI quota. The maximum TANCET cutoff required for admissions in the last round was 1426 for MBA/PGDM admission in the General category. Tabulated below is the TANCET first and last round cutoff 2025.

BAIT MBA/PGDM cutoff 2025 can be seen in this section, along with the previous 2-years cutoff data, i.e., 2024, and 2023. In 2025 the last round rank for MBA/PGDM stood at 1426 among the students belonging to the General AI quota. For the OBC AI quota, the cutoff rank for the same course was 2818.
After comparing both the categories, the last Round cutoff rank for General AI category students was more competitive for admission than the OBC AI students.

BAIT accepts the TANCET cutoff for admissions to various specialisation of MBA/PGDM. Students who are interested in admissions at this institute can refer to the table below to know the important dates regarding registration, exam, etc.

TANCET 2025 cutoff for BAIT is available in the table below, along with last two years cutoff data.The cutoff has been released for all rounds and categories. Students preparing for admission can download the consollidated round and year-wise cutoff data to understand the cutoff trends.

Students can view the BAIT BTech cutoff for 2025, as well as the cutoff details for 2024 and 2023 across various rounds, categories, and branches. For the General AI category, the most competitive branch for admission during the last round at BAIT was B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering, with a cutoff rank of 14432.

hostel_campus.college_name: Bannari Amman Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Strict discipline with good hostel facilities and self learning environment.
reviews.review_text: There is good infrastructure in this college, including Wi-Fi-enabled campus, well-equipped labs, neat and clean classrooms, and a well-maintained library with sufficient resources. Hostels are good and well-maintained. Similarly, the food served in the mess is decent and hygienic. Basic medical facilities are available inside the campus. College has good sports and games for students.

reviews.review_heading: Bannari Amman Institute of Technology is the best Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: Bannari Amman Institute of Technology has the best infrastructure facilities among colleges. This college has many laboratory facilities and more computer laboratories available. The college has a well-stocked library. This college provides separate hostel facilities for both boys and girls. Hostel food is very hygienic and healthy. Some sports ground facilities are also available in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provided organized placements for students.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure was actually pretty good. Many facilities were available for students. The whole campus was Wi-Fi enabled, every classroom had a smart board, and all rooms were properly maintained and clean. A huge library was present, which was fully air-conditioned.

reviews.review_heading: Neat and good if you are interested in more studies.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, library, and classrooms are neat and good, also maintained neatly. Hostel also provides neat facilities and fulfills your basic requirements. Medical facility is also good; there is a medical center inside the campus. Games and sports are given importance if you have interest. And at last, food in the mess is quality-wise good, but taste-wise it’s okay, manageable to eat overall, okay.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent infrastructure, supportive faculty, and great placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at BIT is excellent. Classrooms are clean, well-lit, and equipped with smart boards. Every department has well-maintained labs with modern equipment and high-speed Wi-Fi. The central library is huge, with a good collection of books and digital resources. Hostel facilities are also very good. Rooms are neat, and food in the mess is hygienic, with a variety of dishes. Medical care, indoor and outdoor sports, and gym facilities are all available inside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Life at Bannari Amman Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Faculty are well educated and able to clear the questions of the students. They motivate the students to get placements in companies. The college has well advanced labs, internet, big classrooms, and a big library. The hostel was clean and neat, the food quality was average, and there is a medical center.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best for career development and placements. The college is a little bit strict.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides 24x7 Wi-Fi facility, air-conditioned labs, a library, classrooms, and a cafeteria. The food is good. Only vegetarian food is served, and on hostel days, they provide non-vegetarian food. We get non-vegetarian food in the cafeteria. We can also order food from outside. The hostel also has a Wi-Fi facility. Medical facilities are good. Sports and games are good, but we do not get enough time.

reviews.review_heading: Top college with the best placements in Tamil Nadu.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in my college are not bad. The infrastructure for my course is excellent. Wi-Fi is limited. Classrooms are neat, and the library has AC. The hostel also has Wi-Fi, with fans and study lights. The quality of food is good sometimes. Medical facilities are good, and sports and games are good.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is good and if you want to get placed you have to stand out among many.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good and decent as like every other college nothing special about this. One thing is there are special labs and students are allowed to use them anytime and utilize them. Sports facilities are also decent for sports anyone can use them.

reviews.review_heading: I like the infrastructure and this college.
reviews.review_text: CSBS department at Bannari Amman Institute of Technology has modern classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, well-equipped computer labs, and a large digital library. Hostels are clean and comfortable with good facilities. The mess provides hygienic food with decent variety. Medical support is available 24X7 on campus. Students have access to gyms, indoor and outdoor sports, and recreation areas. Overall, the campus offers a well-rounded and student-friendly environment.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college. If you put in hard work, you will get rewards.
reviews.review_text: Our college has many special labs to develop your skills. Wi-Fi will be available in labs, classrooms, and the library. The hostel is good and it is clean. In college, mess food is good. Our college has a medical center. They give importance to sports like cricket, football, kabaddi, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Simply, if you study well, develop skills, and perform good among others, it is good for you.
reviews.review_text: For my course, facilities like labs are good, not very great, but quite decent compared to other colleges of the same level. Wi-Fi is available everywhere in the college and also in the hostel. The hostel food is also very decent (only vegetarian) compared to same-tier colleges. Sports facilities depend on the sport.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in college.
reviews.review_text: It has special embedded, VLSI, PCB labs, smart classrooms, library, and training avenues. Hostel infrastructure is good. Food is also good. Sports, games, and medical facilities are very good. The food is very good in both hostels and day scholars' mess. The cafeteria has various food items too.

reviews.review_heading: Our college infrastructure is good and peaceful. The rules are acceptable.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of our college are good and well-constructed. Wi-Fi connections are good. The lab, library, and classrooms are neat and peaceful always. The quality of facilities in our hostel is good. The food is healthy and tasty. We can avail all facilities, including sports and games, in our hostel. All are good.

reviews.review_heading: A good college to change one's life.
reviews.review_text: In our college, we have specific labs for specific departments. They provide Wi-Fi all over the college, even in the hostel, with a 5GB daily data limit for each student's mail ID. Classrooms are good, with cameras, smart boards, and projectors in every class. There's a three-floor library where students can study peacefully without any external disturbances, with AC in the library. The boys' hostel is average with average food. There's also a medical center inside the college, and all sorts of ...

college_info.college_name: Bannari Amman Institute of Technology

data.description: The Bannari Amman Institute of Technology's facilities include large classrooms with cutting-edge technology. A learning facility with a sizable collection of books, journals, and other study resources is part of the BIT Erode infrastructure and is accessible to both students and faculty members. Students can use the library's e-resources and other resources to learn material for their specific courses. Auditoriums and seminar rooms are part of the Bannari Amman Institute of Technology's infrastructure. Each department at BIT Erode has a seminar room with room for 180 people. All of BIT Erode's academic and cultural events take place in an auditorium with a capacity for 750 people. Several laboratories are available at the Bannari Amman Institute of Technology for studies in chemistry, physics, textile technology, and other subjects. The students and instructors of BIT Erode have access to a computer lab. Hostel accommodations are available at the Bannari Amman Institute of Technology for both male and female students; there is a separate hostel for each gender. Facilities at the Bannari Amman Institute of Technology include a canteen for both students and professors, a mess with space for 4100 people, and a canteen that serves BIT Erode students with clean and nutritious meals.

The placement of the college is good as there are numerous numbers of companies coming in for recruitment every year along the hour for different profiles and different positions.
